<script>
/* Launch splash on every open. After 3.5s: signed-in users enter the app; signed-out users see the gate. */
(function(){try{
  function lsHasSession(){try{for(var i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){var k=localStorage.key(i);if(k&&k.indexOf('sb-')===0&&k.indexOf('-auth-token')!==-1)return true;}}catch(_){}return false;}
  var EVOLVE_DEVICE_AUTH_LS='evolve_device_auth_v1';
  var EVOLVE_DEVICE_AUTH_LS_LEGACY='consistency_device_auth_v1';
  function readDeviceAuthLs(){try{var r=localStorage.getItem(EVOLVE_DEVICE_AUTH_LS);if(!r){r=localStorage.getItem(EVOLVE_DEVICE_AUTH_LS_LEGACY);if(r){localStorage.setItem(EVOLVE_DEVICE_AUTH_LS,r);localStorage.removeItem(EVOLVE_DEVICE_AUTH_LS_LEGACY);}}return r;}catch(_){return null;}}
  function deviceTrustPresent(){try{var raw=readDeviceAuthLs();if(!raw)return false;var o=JSON.parse(raw);return !!(o&&o.uid);}catch(_){return false;}}
  function sessionLikelyPresent(){if(lsHasSession()||deviceTrustPresent())return true;if(typeof authGateSessionPresent==='function'&&authGateSessionPresent())return true;return false;}
  var splash=document.getElementById('authSplash');
  var gate=document.getElementById('authGate');
  if(splash)splash.classList.add('is-visible');
  function urlLooksLikeAuthReturn(){try{var h=window.location.href;if(h.indexOf('code=')!==-1)return true;if(h.indexOf('error_description=')!==-1||/[?&]error=/.test(h))return true;if(h.indexOf('access_token=')!==-1)return true;}catch(_){}return false;}
  function fadeLaunchSplash(onDone){
    if(!splash){document.documentElement.classList.remove('evolve-auth-intro');if(typeof onDone==='function')onDone();return;}
    splash.style.pointerEvents='none';
    splash.classList.add('is-fading');
    window.__authSplashFadeTimer=setTimeout(function(){
      window.__authSplashFadeTimer=null;
      if(splash){splash.classList.remove('is-visible');splash.classList.remove('is-fading');splash.style.pointerEvents='';}
      document.documentElement.classList.remove('evolve-auth-intro');
      if(typeof onDone==='function')onDone();
    },450);
  }
  window.__authGateRevealTimer=setTimeout(function(){
    window.__authGateRevealTimer=null;
    if(sessionLikelyPresent()||urlLooksLikeAuthReturn()){
      fadeLaunchSplash(function(){if(typeof scheduleHeaderBrandMarkTheme==='function')scheduleHeaderBrandMarkTheme();});
      return;
    }
    if(gate)gate.classList.add('is-visible');
    fadeLaunchSplash();
  },3500);
}catch(_){}})();
</script>
<div id="cookieConsentBar" class="cookie-consent-bar" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="cookieConsentTitle" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="cookie-consent-panel">
    <h2 id="cookieConsentTitle" class="cookie-consent-title">Cookies &amp; your data</h2>
    <p class="cookie-consent-text">Evolve stores your goals, habits, and weeks on this device. If you <strong>accept</strong>, we also save an encoded copy in cookies for extra persistence alongside local storage. If you <strong>decline</strong>, we only use local storage and do not write that cookie backup.</p>
    <div class="cookie-consent-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="acceptCookieStorage()">Accept</button>
      <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="declineCookieStorage()">Decline</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="overlay app-dialog" id="mGuide"><div class="modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="guideModalTitle">
  <h2 id="guideModalTitle">How Evolve works</h2>
  <div class="guide-grid">
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Consistency</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">This app builds lasting good habits via fear of loss (streaks), short-term dopamine rewards, and long-term savings pots, turning tedious tasks like no late-night eating or early sleep into addictive routines. Collateral benefits—like weight loss from consistency—emerge naturally as you level up life. Tailored for ADHD, it leverages behavioral quirks for fun, structured wins without overwhelm. Consistency helps you grow... consistency.</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Goals</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Goals are means to an end. Each goal has its own habits, reward, consistency score and pot total. The <strong>% on the disc</strong> is your <strong>rolling consistency</strong>: qualifying closed weeks divided by all <strong>scorable</strong> closed weeks in the current chapter (after any pot reset, only weeks <strong>after</strong> that reset count—until then the disc shows 0%). A week enters the % once it has closed for scoring (at <strong>midnight Sunday</strong> local time when that week locks)—not while you are still filling it in on the Log. <strong>This week</strong> shows in the weekly treat line, Log, and dashboard week snapshot.</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Habits</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Habits tie to one goal and qualify weekly via thresholds (e.g., 5/7 days, 10km). Any qualifying habit unlocks the goal's short-term reward — like badminton or cinema. If a habit starts mid-week, targets are <strong>proportionally scaled</strong> for the remaining days. See <strong>Tiers</strong> below and the <strong>Goals</strong> tab if you need to move a habit or change Core vs Growth — structure cooldowns apply (7d / 28d for adults; 7d for kid profiles; see Tips).</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Weeks & logging</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Weeks run <strong>Monday–Sunday</strong>. Each week’s tracker <strong>locks at midnight Sunday</strong> (local time). If notifications are allowed on your device, Evolve can send Sunday nudges to help you finish logging before then.</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Tiers</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Core habits decide whether a <strong>closed</strong> week counts toward your consistency % and whether the goal is “on track” for the week — all core blocks for that goal must qualify. Growth habits add to your pot when they qualify but never block the week — except in <strong>recovery</strong> below the floor, when growth adds £0 until rolling % reaches the floor again. Habits added <strong>mid-week</strong> get proportionally scaled targets for that partial week.<br><br><strong>First-time habit editor:</strong> the first time you open <strong>Add habit</strong>, a short guided step highlights <strong>Tier</strong> and explains core vs growth in normal mode and in recovery (below that goal’s consistency floor).</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Rewards and pot</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Weekly qualifying habits add a fixed amount (e.g., £30) to your savings pot—a self-commitment where you set aside real cash toward a big goal like an e-bike kit. It's not virtual money but your binding promise to fund it, aligned with your consistency floor. While a goal is <strong>below that floor (recovery)</strong>, only <strong>core</strong> habits add to the pot; <strong>growth</strong> habits add £0 until rolling % is back at the floor.</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Saved habits</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">When a goal is completed, habits rest here until you reopen them toward the next goal.</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Below the floor: recovery mode</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">The consistency <strong>floor</strong> is fixed at <strong>80%</strong>. While below the floor, your <strong>rolling %</strong> (and the disc) still use only closed weeks in the <strong>current chapter</strong> after any pot reset. When rolling % is <strong>below the floor</strong>, the goal is in <strong>recovery</strong>: you still log habits as normal; only <strong>core</strong> habits add £ to the <strong>banked</strong> pot, and <strong>growth</strong> habits add £0 until rolling % is back at or above the floor. Recovery tracks your last rolling % in this chapter: a <strong>strict drop</strong> (ties are not drops) while already below the floor resets the <strong>banked</strong> pot and disc to a fresh chapter—<strong>0% and £0 toward the goal cost</strong> from closed weeks only. <strong>History</strong> still shows what each past week earned; the <strong>open week</strong> can still show this week’s not-yet-banked £ until Sunday closes it. When rolling % reaches the floor again, recovery ends and full pot rules return. Weekly treats still follow core habit qualification — recovery changes how the <strong>pot</strong> accrues, not whether you can log.</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Profiles</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Under <strong>Settings → Account</strong>, the <strong>Profile</strong> section at the top: tap a tile to switch, the <strong>+</strong> tile to add someone, <strong>Rename</strong> for a quick name and bubble-colour edit, or <strong>Delete this profile…</strong> when you have more than one. <strong>This profile</strong> under that has display name, bubble colour, birthday, and (in kid mode) animations. Then <strong>Sign-in &amp; sync</strong> covers account sign-in and optional <strong>cloud sync</strong>. <strong>Settings → Appearance</strong> is only <strong>Pick your theme</strong> (accent colours). <strong>Settings → Advanced</strong> includes <strong>Revert to yesterday</strong> / <strong>Revert to 2 days ago</strong> when signed in with sync (archived cloud copies), plus a <strong>manual</strong> JSON file export or import (import only adds new profiles; existing local data is not overwritten). <strong>Settings → About</strong> (last tab) is a short app summary. When you tap your name in the header, only the profile avatars open (same tiles as the <strong>Profile</strong> section under <strong>Settings → Account</strong>, without add / rename / delete). Each profile has its own goals, habits, week history, and insights.</div></div>
    <div class="guide-block"><strong>Insights</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Insights are short, science-backed (or occasionally funny) notes about habits, the brain, and consistency. They can appear in a pop-up when you earn one, and a rotating excerpt shows under <strong>Your Goals</strong> on the dashboard. <strong>Insights n/total</strong> opens everything you’ve discovered, grouped by category with source links where available.<br><br><strong>When insights tend to fire:</strong><br>• New habit<br>• First-time <strong>Add habit</strong> Tier spotlight (unlocks “Core and growth habits”)<br>• About once per calendar week when you have any qualifying habit (participation nudge)<br>• 2-, 4-, or 8-week consistency milestones<br>• Tier shifts on the disc (red ↔ amber ↔ green)<br>• Early in a month or year when you are already in the steady band<br>• After a rough <strong>closed</strong> week, when you are back on track in the live week<br>• Sometimes a random “any time” science or fun card from the library<br><br>Copy is written for non-medical readers. Tap <strong>Got it ✓</strong> to dismiss; if another is queued, it appears next.</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="modal-footer"><button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="closeGuide()">Got it</button></div>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay app-dialog" id="mHabit"><div class="modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="habitModalTitle">

Math.abs(t)<=1e-5}function lerp(t,e,i){return t*(1-i)+e*i}function lerpPoint(t,e,i){return[lerp(t[0],e[0],i),lerp(t[1],e[1],i)]}function quadRoots(t,e,i){if(0===t)return[];var r=e*e-4*t*i;if(r<0)return[];var s=-e/(2*t);if(0===r)return[s];var a=Math.sqrt(r)/(2*t);return[s-a,s+a]}function polynomialCoefficients(t,e,i,r){return[3*e-t-3*i+r,3*t-6*e+3*i,-3*t+3*e,t]}function singlePoint(t){return new PolynomialBezier(t,t,t,t,!1)}function PolynomialBezier(t,e,i,r,s){s&&pointEqual(t,e)&&(e=lerpPoint(t,r,1/3)),s&&pointEqual(i,r)&&(i=lerpPoint(t,r,2/3));var floatEqual(t[0],e[0])&&floatEqual(t[1],e[1])}function ZigZagModifier(){}function setPoint(t,e,i,r,s,a,n){var o=i-Math.PI/2,h=i+Math.PI/2,l=e[0]+Math.cos(i)*r*s,p=e[1]-Math.sin(i)*r*s;t.setTripleAt(l,p,l+Math.cos(o)*a,p-Math.sin(o)*a,l+Math.cos(h)*n,p-Math.sin(h)*n,t.length())}function getPerpendicularVector(t,e){var i=[e[0]-t[0],e[1]-t[1]],r=.5*-Math.PI;return[Math.cos(r)*i[0]-Math.sin(r)*i[1],Math.sin(r)*i[0]+Math.cos(r)*i[1]]}function getProjectingAngle(t,e){var function flattenPresetEmojiBlocks(blocks){
  if(!blocks||typeof blocks!=='object')return[];
  const seen=new Set();
  const out=[];
  const take=arr=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr))return;arr.forEach(ch=>{const c=typeof ch==='string'?([...ch][0]||''):'';if(!c||seen.has(c))return;seen.add(c);out.push(c);});};
  HABIT_PRESET_CATEGORY_ORDER.forEach(cat=>take(blocks[cat]));
  Object.keys(blocks).filter(k=>!HABIT_PRESET_CATEGORY_ORDER.includes(k)).sort().forEach(cat=>take(blocks[cat]));
  return out;
}

function habitPresetLibraryActive(){return useKidsLanguage()?HABITPRESETS_KID:HABITPRESETS;}
function findHabitPresetByKey(key){if(!key||key==='custom')return habitPresetLibraryActive().find(p=>p.key==='custom')||HABITPRESETS[0];let p=habitPresetLibraryActive().find(x=>x.key===key);if(p)return p;p=HABITPRESETS.find(x=>x.key===key);if(p)return p;return HABITPRESETS_KID.find(x=>x.key===key)||HABITPRESETS[0];}
function habitPresetKeyInActiveLibrary(key){if(!key||key==='custom')return true;return habitPresetLibraryActive().some(p=>p.key===key);}
function findPresetKeyForSavedHabit(h){if(!h)return'custom';const all=HABITPRESETS.concat(HABITPRESETS_KID).filter(x=>x.key!=='custom');const exact=all.find(p=>p.title===h.title&&p.metric===h.metric&&p.tier===h.tier&&Math.abs(Number(p.threshold)-Number(h.threshold))<1e-6&&Number(p.pot)===Number(h.pot));if(exact)return exact.key;const loose=all.find(p=>p.title===h.title&&p.metric===h.metric);return loose?loose.key:'custom';}
const HABIT_PRESET_REMINDER_DEFAULTS={posture:{c:5,t:['09:00','11:00','13:30','16:00','18:30']},eyerest:{c:4,t:['10:00','12:30','15:00','17:30']},water:{c:4,t:['09:00','12:00','15:00','18:00']},eating:{c:1,t:['19:00']},nosnack:{c:1,t:['20:30']},meal_replace:{c:2,t:['11:30','17:00']},breakfast:{c:1,t:['08:15']},meds:{c:2,t:['08:30','21:00']},screenoff:{c:1,t:['21:30']},winddown:{c:1,t:['21:00']},sleep:{c:1,t:['22:30']},wakeup:{c:1,t:['06:30']},journal:{c:1,t:['20:00']},meditation:{c:1,t:['08:00']},workout:{c:1,t:['07:00']},hiit:{c:1,t:['07:00']},mobility:{c:1,t:['08:00']},budget:{c:1,t:['20:00']},savings:{c:1,t:['10:00']},gratitude:{c:1,t:['21:00']},reading:{c:1,t:['20:30']},tasks:{c:2,t:['09:00','15:00']},declutter:{c:1,t:['17:00']},meal_prep:{c:1,t:['11:00']},outdoor:{c:1,t:['12:30']},alcohol:{c:1,t:['18:00']},running:{c:1,t:['07:00']},cycling:{c:1,t:['07:00']},walk:{c:2,t:['12:30','17:00']},yoga:{c:1,t:['07:30']},call:{c:1,t:['19:00']},date:{c:1,t:['18:00']}};

const HABIT_REMINDER_COUNT_MAX=6;
function computeGenericReminderTimes(n){n=Math.max(1,Math.min(HABIT_REMINDER_COUNT_MAX,parseInt(n,10)||0));if(!n)n=1;const out=[],win=13*60;for(let i=1;i<=n;i++){let t=Math.round((8*60+(i/(n+1))*win)/15)*15;t=((t%(24*60))+24*60)%(24*60);const hh=Math.floor(t/60),mm=t%60;out.push(String(hh).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(mm).padStart(2,'0'));}return out;}
function buildHabitReminderTimes(presetKey,count){const n=Math.max(1,Math.min(HABIT_REMINDER_COUNT_MAX,count||1));const def=presetKey&&HABIT_PRESET_REMINDER_DEFAULTS[presetKey];if(def&&def.c===n&&Array.isArray(def.t)&&def.t.length)return def.t.slice(0,n).map(normalizeHmToString);if(def&&Array.isArray(def.t)&&def.t.length&&n<=def.t.length)return def.t.slice(0,n).map(normalizeHmToString);return computeGenericReminderTimes(n);}
function normalizeHmParts(str){const m=/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{1,2})$/.exec(String(str||'').trim());if(!m)return{h:9,mm:0};let h=Math.max(0,Math.min(23,parseInt(m[1],10)||0));let mm=Math.max(0,Math.min(59,parseInt(m[2],10)||0));return{h,mm};}
function formatHmPair(h,mm){return String(h).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(mm).padStart(2,'0');}
function snapHmToQuarterHourParts(h,mm){h=Math.max(0,Math.min(23,parseInt(h,10)||0));mm=Math.max(0,Math.min(59,parseInt(mm,10)||0));let t=h*60+mm;t=Math.round(t/15)*15;t=((t%(24*60))+24*60)%(24*60);return{h:Math.floor(t/60),mm:t%60};}
function reminderTimesSortKey(s){const p=normalizeHmParts(s);const q=snapHmToQuarterHourParts(p.h,p.mm);return q.h*60+q.mm;}
function normalizeHmToString(t){const p=normalizeHmParts(t);const s=snapHmToQuarterHourParts(p.h,p.mm);return formatHmPair(s.h,s.mm);}
function sortReminderTimesStringsChronological(arr){return arr.slice().sort(function(a,b){return reminderTimesSortKey(a)-reminderTimesSortKey(b);});}
function habitReminderHourSelectHTML(selHr){const sh=String(selHr||'09').padStart(2,'0').slice(0,2);return '<button type="button" class="habit-reminder-picker-btn fselect habit-reminder-sheet-select habit-reminder-hh" data-value="'+sh+'" aria-haspopup="dialog" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Hour (24h)" onclick="openHabitReminderWheelPicker(this)">'+sh+'</button>';}
function habitReminderMinuteSelectHTML(selMm){const qs=['00','15','30','45'];const nm=Math.max(0,Math.min(59,parseInt(String(selMm!=null?selMm:'00'),10)||0));let best=qs[0],bd=99;qs.forEach(function(v){const d=Math.abs(nm-parseInt(v,10));if(d<bd){bd=d;best=v;}});return '<button type="button" class="habit-reminder-picker-btn fselect habit-reminder-sheet-select habit-reminder-mm" data-value="'+best+'" aria-haspopup="dialog" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Minute (15-minute steps)" onclick="openHabitReminderWheelPicker(this)">'+best+'</button>';}
function renderHabitReminderTimeRows(times){const root=document.getElementById('hReminderTimeRows');if(!root)return;const sorted=sortReminderTimesStringsChronological(times);let html='';sorted.forEach(function(hm,idx){const p=normalizeHmParts(hm);const s=snapHmToQuarterHourParts(p.h,p.mm);const hh=String(s.h).padStart(2,'0');const mms=String(s.mm).padStart(2,'0');html+='<div class="habit-reminder-time-row"><span class="habit-reminder-time-idx">'+(idx+1)+'</span>'+habitReminderHourSelectHTML(hh)+'<span class="habit-reminder-sep">:</span>'+habitReminderMinuteSelectHTML(mms)+'</div>';});root.innerHTML=html;syncHabitReminderTimeRowsVisibility();}
function habitReminderPickerValue(el,fallback){if(!el)return fallback||'';return String(el.dataset&&el.dataset.value!=null?el.dataset.value:(el.textContent||'')).trim()||fallback||'';}
function collectHabitReminderTimesFromEditorOrdered(){const root=document.getElementById('hReminderTimeRows');if(!root)return[];const rows=root.querySelectorAll('.habit-reminder-time-row');const out=[];rows.forEach(function(r){const hh=habitReminderPickerValue(r.querySelector('.habit-reminder-hh'),'09');const mm=habitReminderPickerValue(r.querySelector('.habit-reminder-mm'),'00');out.push(String(hh).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(mm).padStart(2,'0'));});return out;}
function setHabitReminderCountDisplay(n){const cnt=document.getElementById('hReminderCount');if(!cnt)return;const v=String(Math.max(1,Math.min(HABIT_REMINDER_COUNT_MAX,parseInt(n,10)||1)));cnt.dataset.value=v;cnt.textContent=v;}
function getHabitReminderCountFromSelect(){return Math.max(1,Math.min(HABIT_REMINDER_COUNT_MAX,parseInt(habitReminderPickerValue(document.getElementById('hReminderCount'),'1'),10)||1));}
function onHabitReminderCountChange(){if(!hbRemOn())return;const pk=document.getElementById('hPreset')?.value||'custom';const n=getHabitReminderCountFromSelect();let cur=collectHabitReminderTimesFromEditorOrdered();let next;if(cur.length>n)next=sortReminderTimesStringsChronological(cur).slice(0,n);else if(cur.length<n){const full=buildHabitReminderTimes(pk,n);next=sortReminderTimesStringsChronological(cur.slice());for(let j=next.length;j<n;j++)next.push(full[j]||'12:00');next=sortReminderTimesStringsChronological(next);}else next=sortReminderTimesStringsChronological(cur);renderHabitReminderTimeRows(next);}
function habitReminderRowsResortAndRedraw(){if(!hbRemOn())return;const sorted=sortReminderTimesStringsChronological(collectHabitReminderTimesFromEditorOrdered());renderHabitReminderTimeRows(sorted);}
function bindHabitReminderTimeRowsDelegation(){const root=document.getElementById('hReminderTimeRows');if(!root||root.dataset.delBound)return;root.dataset.delBound='1';bindHabitReminderWheelOutsideClose();}
var _habitReminderWheelCtx=null;var _habitReminderWheelScrollTimer=null;var HABIT_REMINDER_WHEEL_ITEM_H=36;
function habitReminderWheelOptionsFor(trigger){if(!trigger)return{title:'',options:[]};if(trigger.classList.contains('habit-reminder-hh')){const out=[];for(let h=0;h<24;h++)out.push(String(h).padStart(2,'0'));return{title:'',options:out};}if(trigger.classList.contains('habit-reminder-mm'))return{title:'',options:['00','15','30','45']};if(trigger.id==='hReminderCount'||trigger.classList.contains('habit-reminder-count')){const out=[];for(let i=1;i<=HABIT_REMINDER_COUNT_MAX;i++)out.push(String(i));return{title:'',options:out};}return{title:'',options:[]};}
function positionHabitReminderWheelWrap(wrap,btn){if(!wrap||!btn)return;const panel=wrap.querySelector('.habit-reminder-wheel-panel');if(!panel)return;const rect=btn.getBoundingClientRect();const pw=panel.offsetWidth||Math.max(rect.width,46);const ph=panel.offsetHeight||220;let left=rect.left;let top=rect.bottom+6;if(left+pw>window.innerWidth-8)left=Math.max(8,window.innerWidth-pw-8);if(top+ph>window.innerHeight-8)top=Math.max(8,rect.top-ph-6);wrap.style.left=Math.round(left)+'px';wrap.style.top=Math.round(top)+'px';}
function habitReminderWheelUpdateActive(col){if(!col)return;const itemH=HABIT_REMINDER_WHEEL_ITEM_H;const items=col.querySelectorAll('.habit-reminder-wheel-item');if(!items.length)return;const idx=Math.max(0,Math.min(items.length-1,Math.round(col.scrollTop/itemH)));items.forEach(function(it,i){const on=i===idx;it.classList.toggle('is-active',on);it.setAttribute('aria-selected',on?'true':'false');});if(_habitReminderWheelCtx&&items[idx])_habitReminderWheelCtx.pendingValue=items[idx].dataset.value;}
function habitReminderWheelScrollToValue(col,value,smooth){if(!col)return;const items=col.querySelectorAll('.habit-reminder-wheel-item');let idx=0;items.forEach(function(it,i){if(it.dataset.value===value)idx=i;});const itemH=HABIT_REMINDER_WHEEL_ITEM_H;col.scrollTo({top:idx*itemH,behavior:smooth?'smooth':'auto'});requestAnimationFrame(function(){habitReminderWheelUpdateActive(col);});}
function habitReminderWheelCenteredValue(col){if(!col)return null;const itemH=HABIT_REMINDER_WHEEL_ITEM_H;const items=col.querySelectorAll('.habit-reminder-wheel-item');if(!items.length)return null;const max=Math.max(0,items.length-1);const idx=Math.max(0,Math.min(max,Math.round(col.scrollTop/itemH)));return items[idx]?items[idx].dataset.value:null;}
function habitReminderWheelSnapToNearestImmediate(col){if(!col)return;const itemH=HABIT_REMINDER_WHEEL_ITEM_H;const items=col.querySelectorAll('.habit-reminder-wheel-item');const max=Math.max(0,items.length-1);const idx=Math.max(0,Math.min(max,Math.round(col.scrollTop/itemH)));col.scrollTo({top:idx*itemH,behavior:'auto'});habitReminderWheelUpdateActive(col);}
function habitReminderWheelSnapToNearest(col){if(!col)return;const itemH=HABIT_REMINDER_WHEEL_ITEM_H;const items=col.querySelectorAll('.habit-reminder-wheel-item');const max=Math.max(0,items.length-1);const idx=Math.max(0,Math.min(max,Math.round(col.scrollTop/itemH)));col.scrollTo({top:idx*itemH,behavior:'smooth'});habitReminderWheelUpdateActive(col);}
function openHabitReminderWheelPicker(btn){if(!btn||btn.disabled)return;if(_habitReminderWheelCtx&&_habitReminderWheelCtx.trigger===btn){closeHabitReminderWheelPicker(true);return;}closeHabitReminderWheelPicker(true);const info=habitReminderWheelOptionsFor(btn);const wrap=document.getElementById('habitReminderWheelWrap');const col=document.getElementById('habitReminderWheelCol');const title=document.getElementById('habitReminderWheelTitle');const toolbar=wrap?wrap.querySelector('.habit-reminder-wheel-toolbar'):null;const panel=wrap?wrap.querySelector('.habit-reminder-wheel-panel'):null;if(!wrap||!col||!info.options.length)return;const cur=habitReminderPickerValue(btn,info.options[0]);_habitReminderWheelCtx={trigger:btn,options:info.options.slice(),pendingValue:cur};if(toolbar)toolbar.hidden=!info.title;if(panel){panel.classList.toggle('habit-reminder-wheel-panel--compact',!info.title);if(info.title){panel.setAttribute('aria-labelledby','habitReminderWheelTitle');panel.removeAttribute('aria-label');}else{panel.removeAttribute('aria-labelledby');panel.setAttribute('aria-label',btn.getAttribute('aria-label')||'Pick a value');}}if(title)title.textContent=info.title||'';col.innerHTML=info.options.map(function(v){return '<div class="habit-reminder-wheel-item" data-value="'+v+'" role="option" aria-selected="false">'+v+'</div>';}).join('');wrap.style.setProperty('--habit-rem-wheel-w',Math.max(Math.round(btn.offsetWidth||0),46)+'px');wrap.style.setProperty('--habit-rem-wheel-item-h',HABIT_REMINDER_WHEEL_ITEM_H+'px');wrap.hidden=false;wrap.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');if(!col.dataset.wheelBound){col.dataset.wheelBound='1';col.addEventListener('scroll',function(){habitReminderWheelUpdateActive(col);clearTimeout(_habitReminderWheelScrollTimer);_habitReminderWheelScrollTimer=setTimeout(function(){habitReminderWheelSnapToNearest(col);},80);},{passive:true});}requestAnimationFrame(function(){positionHabitReminderWheelWrap(wrap,btn);habitReminderWheelScrollToValue(col,cur,false);});}

const CURRENCY_OPTIONS=[{code:'GBP',symbol:'£',label:'GBP (£)'},{code:'USD',symbol:'$',label:'USD ($)'},{code:'EUR',symbol:'€',label:'EUR (€)'},{code:'AUD',symbol:'A$',label:'AUD (A$)'},{code:'CAD',symbol:'C$',label:'CAD (C$)'},{code:'NZD',symbol:'NZ$',label:'NZD (NZ$)'},{code:'CHF',symbol:'CHF',label:'CHF'},{code:'JPY',symbol:'¥',label:'JPY (¥)'},{code:'INR',symbol:'₹',label:'INR (₹)'},{code:'SEK',symbol:'kr',label:'SEK (kr)'}];
function currencySymbol(code){const c=code||(S&&S.user&&S.user.currencyCode)||'GBP';const o=CURRENCY_OPTIONS.find(x=>x.code===c);return o?o.symbol:'£';}
function fmtMoney(n,code){const sym=currencySymbol(code);const v=Number(n);if(!isFinite(v))return sym+'0';const r=Math.round(v*100)/100;return sym+(Math.abs(r-Math.round(r))<1e-9?String(Math.round(r)):String(r));}
function fmtGoalPotAmount(g,n){if(g&&g.goalType==='points')return Math.round(Number(n)||0)+' pts';return fmtMoney(n);}
function friendlyRoundInt(n){const x=Number(n)||0;if(x<=0)return 0;if(x<10)return Math.max(1,Math.round(x));if(x<50){const r=Math.round(x/5)*5;return r||5;}const r=Math.round(x/10)*10;return r||10;}
function computeDefaultPotValues(weeklyBudget){const wb=Math.max(0,Number(weeklyBudget)||0);if(wb<=0)return{core:0,growth:0};const growth=friendlyRoundInt(wb/6);const core=friendlyRoundInt(Math.max(growth*2,wb/3));return{core,growth};}
function defaultHabitPotForGoal(g,tier){if(!g)return tier==='growth'?10:20;if(g.goalType==='points')return tier==='growth'?(Number(g.pointValueGrowth)||0):(Number(g.pointValueCore)||0);const pv=computeDefaultPotValues(g.weeklyBudget||60);return tier==='growth'?pv.growth:pv.core;}

function onSettingsCurrencyChange(){const el=document.getElementById('sCurrency');if(!el||!S||!S.user)return;S.user.currencyCode=el.value||'GBP';syncCurrencyFormLabels();save();renderAll();}
function onGoalTypeChange(){const wasPoints=window._gGoalTypePrev==='points';syncGoalFormForType(false);const now=(document.getElementById('gGoalType')?.value||'money')==='points';window._gGoalTypePrev=document.getElementById('gGoalType')?.value||'money';if(now&&!wasPoints)maybeStartPointsGoalIntro();}
function maybeStartPointsGoalIntro(){if(!S||!S.user)return;if(S.user.pointsGoalIntroSeen)return;if(document.getElementById('goalId')?.value)return;if((document.getElementById('gGoalType')?.value||'money')!=='points')return;if(!document.getElementById('mGoal')?.classList.contains('open'))return;if(typeof milestoneAnyOverlayActive==='function'&&milestoneAnyOverlayActive())return;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const text=kid?'Some goals do not need money. They still work in a similar way though. You need to gather 100 points through your habits to earn these goals.':'Some goals do not require money. They still work in a similar way though. You need to gather 100 points through your habits to earn these goals.';startMilestoneStepper({steps:[{title:kid?'Point goals':'Point-based goals',html:'<p>'+text+'</p>'}],finishLabel:'Got it',onFinish:function(){S.user.pointsGoalIntroSeen=true;save();}});}
function syncGoalFormForType(isEdit,existingGoal){const typeEl=document.getElementById('gGoalType');const typeWrap=document.getElementById('gGoalTypeWrap');const targetWrap=document.getElementById('gTargetWrap');const targetInp=document.getElementById('gTarget');const moneyGroup=document.getElementById('gMoneyGroupWrap');const treatGroup=document.getElementById('gTreatGroupWrap');const wbWrap=document.getElementById('gWeeklyBudgetWrap');const wbInp=document.getElementById('gWeeklyBudget');const wtbWrap=document.getElementById('gWeeklyTreatBudgetWrap');const goalType=isEdit?(existingGoal&&existingGoal.goalType)||'money':((typeEl&&typeEl.value)||'money');if(typeWrap){if(isEdit)typeWrap.setAttribute('hidden','');else typeWrap.removeAttribute('hidden');}const isPoints=goalType==='points';const hideMoney=isPoints;if(moneyGroup){if(hideMoney)moneyGroup.setAttribute('hidden','');else moneyGroup.removeAttribute('hidden');}if(targetWrap){if(hideMoney)targetWrap.setAttribute('hidden','');else targetWrap.removeAttribute('hidden');}if(targetInp){if(hideMoney)targetInp.removeAttribute('required');else targetInp.setAttribute('required','');}if(wbWrap){if(isPoints)wbWrap.setAttribute('hidden','');else wbWrap.removeAttribute('hidden');}if(wbInp){if(isPoints)wbInp.removeAttribute('required');else wbInp.setAttribute('required','');}if(wtbWrap){if(isPoints){/* points: syncGoalTreatBudgetVisibility */}else wtbWrap.removeAttribute('hidden');}if(treatGroup)treatGroup.removeAttribute('hidden');syncCurrencyFormLabels();const wtb=isEdit?(existingGoal&&existingGoal.weeklyTreatBudget)||0:(parseFloat(document.getElementById('gWeeklyTreatBudget')?.value)||0);populateGoalRewardPresets(isPoints?0:wtb);syncGoalTreatBudgetVisibility();}
function openPathsStore(){openM('mPathsStore');}

const HABIT_MS_DAY=24*60*60*1000;
const HABIT_COOLDOWN_SHORT_MS=7*HABIT_MS_DAY;

function markCurrentWhatsNewSeenForUser(u){if(!u)return;u.lastSeenWhatsNewVersion=CURRENT_VERSION;u.whatsNewPromptId=WHATS_NEW_PROMPT_ID;}
function formatBackupDateDdMmYyyy(savedAt){
  const d=new Date(savedAt);
  if(!Number.isFinite(d.getTime()))return'—';
  return String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')+'/'+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'/'+d.getFullYear();
}
const COOKIE_CONSENT_LS='consistencyCookieConsentV1';
const COOKIE_CONSENT_NAME='cst_consent';
const COOKIE_DATA_COUNT='cst_dn';
const COOKIE_DATA_PREFIX='cst_p';
const COOKIE_MAX_CHUNKS=80;
const COOKIE_CHUNK_CHARS=3200;
const COOKIE_MIRROR_MAX_AGE=34560000;
function getCookie(name){const k=name+'=';const parts=(document.cookie||'').split('; ');for(let i=0;i<parts.length;i++){const p=parts[i];if(p.indexOf(k)===0)return decodeURIComponent(p.slice(k.length));}return '';}
function setCookie(name,val,maxAgeSec){let s=name+'='+encodeURIComponent(val)+';path=/;SameSite=Lax';if(maxAgeSec>0)s+=';max-age='+Math.floor(maxAgeSec);else s+=';max-age=0';if(location.protocol==='https:')s+=';Secure';document.cookie=s;}
function purgeDataCookies(){const prev=parseInt(getCookie(COOKIE_DATA_COUNT),10)||0;for(let i=0;i<=Math.max(prev,COOKIE_MAX_CHUNKS);i++)setCookie(COOKIE_DATA_PREFIX+i,'',0);setCookie(COOKIE_DATA_COUNT,'',0);}
function loadFromCookies(){const n=parseInt(getCookie(COOKIE_DATA_COUNT),10)||0;if(n<1||n>COOKIE_MAX_CHUNKS)return null;let b64='';for(let i=0;i<n;i++){const p=getCookie(COOKIE_DATA_PREFIX+i);if(p==='')return null;b64+=p;}try{const json=decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(b64)));return JSON.parse(json);}catch(e){return null;}}
function persistToCookies(jsonStr){const b64=btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(jsonStr)));const parts=Math.ceil(b64.length/COOKIE_CHUNK_CHARS);if(parts>COOKIE_MAX_CHUNKS){purgeDataCookies();return;}purgeDataCookies();setCookie(COOKIE_DATA_COUNT,String(parts),COOKIE_MIRROR_MAX_AGE);for(let i=0;i<parts;i++)setCookie(COOKIE_DATA_PREFIX+i,b64.slice(i*COOKIE_CHUNK_CHARS,(i+1)*COOKIE_CHUNK_CHARS),COOKIE_MIRROR_MAX_AGE);}
function cookieConsentStatus(){const ls=localStorage.getItem(COOKIE_CONSENT_LS);if(ls==='accepted'||ls==='declined')return ls;if(getCookie(COOKIE_CONSENT_NAME)==='y'){localStorage.setItem(COOKIE_CONSENT_LS,'accepted');return 'accepted';}return null;}
function acceptCookieStorage(){localStorage.setItem(COOKIE_CONSENT_LS,'accepted');setCookie(COOKIE_CONSENT_NAME,'y',COOKIE_MIRROR_MAX_AGE);hideCookieConsentBar();save();}
function declineCookieStorage(){localStorage.setItem(COOKIE_CONSENT_LS,'declined');setCookie(COOKIE_CONSENT_NAME,'',0);purgeDataCookies();hideCookieConsentBar();}
function hideCookieConsentBar(){const el=document.getElementById('cookieConsentBar');if(el){el.classList.remove('show');el.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');}syncUiScrollLock();maybeScheduleWhatsNewVersionModal();maybeScheduleWhatsNewFloat();syncPwaAddToHomeBar();}
function hidePwaAddToHomeBarUi(){const el=document.getElementById('pwaAddToHomeBar');if(el){el.classList.remove('show');el.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');}syncUiScrollLock();}

function isLikelyTouchPhoneBrowser(){const ua=typeof navigator!=='undefined'?(navigator.userAgent||''):'';if(/Android|webOS|iPhone|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(ua))return true;if(/iPad/.test(ua))return true;if((navigator.maxTouchPoints||0)>1&&/Macintosh/.test(ua))return true;return false;}

function backfillTierAtLockOnLockedWeeks(P){if(!P||!P.weeks||!Array.isArray(P.habits))return;Object.keys(P.weeks).forEach(wk=>{const wd=P.weeks[wk];if(!wd||!wd.habitData)return;Object.keys(wd.habitData).forEach(hid=>{const hd=wd.habitData[hid];if(!hd||!hd.locked||(hd.tierAtLock==='core'||hd.tierAtLock==='growth'))return;const h=P.habits.find(x=>x.id===hid);if(!h)return;hd.tierAtLock=h.tier==='growth'?'growth':'core';});});}

function bumpRootSyncEditAt(){if(!ROOT)return;ROOT._sync=ROOT._sync&&typeof ROOT._sync==='object'?ROOT._sync:{};ROOT._sync.editAt=Date.now();if(ROOT._sync.cloudEnabled===undefined)ROOT._sync.cloudEnabled=true;}

function flushSave(opts){opts=opts||{};if(!ROOT||!S)return;annotateProfilesForSave();try{if(S&&S.user){const tz=Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone;if(tz)S.user.reminderTimeZone=tz;}}catch(e){}if(!opts.fromCloudMerge)bumpRootSyncEditAt();const json=JSON.stringify(ROOT);try{localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,json);}catch(e){}if(cookieMirrorEnabled())try{persistToCookies(json);}catch(e){}if(!opts.fromCloudMerge)scheduleCloudPush();}
function save(opts){opts=opts||{};if(opts.immediate||opts.fromCloudMerge){if(_saveTimer){clearTimeout(_saveTimer);_saveTimer=null;_saveOptsPending=null;}flushSave(opts);return;}_saveOptsPending=Object.assign(_saveOptsPending||{},opts);clearTimeout(_saveTimer);_saveTimer=setTimeout(function(){flushSave(_saveOptsPending||{});_saveOptsPending=null;_saveTimer=null;},300);}
function flushPendingSave(){if(_saveTimer){clearTimeout(_saveTimer);_saveTimer=null;const o=_saveOptsPending||{};_saveOptsPending=null;flushSave(o);}}

let _cloudPushTimer=null;let _cloudPushInFlight=false;let _cloudSyncLastError=null;
function cloudSyncIsEnabled(){if(!ROOT)return false;if(!ROOT._sync||ROOT._sync.cloudEnabled===undefined)return true;return ROOT._sync.cloudEnabled!==false;}
/** True when local data is still the default shell (no goals, no logged weeks) — e.g. incognito or fresh profile. Must not overwrite richer cloud row (last-write-wins timestamps wrongly favour local after seed()+save()). */
function rootLooksLikeUnsyncedFreshShell(R){
  if(!R||!R.profiles||typeof R.profiles!=='object')return true;
  const ids=Object.keys(R.profiles);
  if(ids.length!==1)return false;
  const P=R.profiles[ids[0]];
  if(!P||typeof P!=='object')return true;
  const activeGoals=(P.goals||[]).filter(g=>g&&g.status!=='completed').length;
  const weekCount=Object.keys(P.weeks||{}).length;
  return activeGoals===0&&weekCount===0;
}
function syncPayloadRichness(R){
  if(!R||!R.profiles||typeof R.profiles!=='object')return{profiles:0,weekKeys:0,activeGoals:0};
  const profiles=Object.keys(R.profiles).length;
  let weekKeys=0,activeGoals=0;
  Object.values(R.profiles).forEach(P=>{
    if(!P)return;
    weekKeys+=Object.keys(P.weeks||{}).length;
    (P.goals||[]).forEach(g=>{if(g&&g.status!=='completed')activeGoals++;});
  });
  return{profiles,weekKeys,activeGoals};
}
function remotePayloadLikelyMoreValuableThanLocalFreshShell(localRoot,remotePayload){
  const loc=syncPayloadRichness(localRoot);
  const rem=syncPayloadRichness(remotePayload);
  return rem.profiles>loc.profiles||rem.weekKeys>loc.weekKeys||rem.activeGoals>loc.activeGoals;
}
function cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(pl){return!pl||typeof pl!=='object'||Object.keys(pl).length===0||!pl.storageVersion;}
function applyCloudPullMerge(pl,remoteUpdatedAtIso){
  const merged=migrateStorageRoot(pl);
  ROOT=merged;
  if(!ROOT._sync||typeof ROOT._sync!=='object')ROOT._sync={};
  ROOT._sync.lastRemoteUpdatedAt=remoteUpdatedAtIso;
  ROOT._sync.editAt=new Date(remoteUpdatedAtIso).getTime();
  bindActiveProfile();
  migrate();
  save({fromCloudMerge:true});
  themeInit();
  renderAll();
  setupScreen();
  applyPreferredStartTab();
  syncProfileSelect();
  renderHeader();
  syncAccountUI();
}
const SYNC_ISSUE_BANNER_ACK='syncIssueRestoredAck';
async function pruneUserStateHistoryForUser(userId){
  if(!_supa||!userId)return;
  try{
    const cutoff=new Date(Date.now()-7*86400000).toISOString();
    await _supa.from('user_state_history').delete().eq('user_id',userId).eq('slot','auto-revert').lt('saved_at',cutoff);
  }catch(e){console.warn('[sync] auto-revert prune skipped',e);}
}
async function snapshotCloudStateForDestructiveEdit(){
  const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;
  if(!u||!_supa||!cloudSyncIsEnabled())return;
  try{
    const {data:liveRow,error:liveErr}=await _supa.from('user_state').select('payload').eq('user_id',u.id).maybeSingle();
    if(liveErr)throw liveErr;
    const livePayload=liveRow&&liveRow.payload;
    if(!liveRow||cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(livePayload))return;
    const {data:t1Row}=await _supa.from('user_state_history').select('payload').eq('user_id',u.id).eq('slot','T-1').maybeSingle();
    const iso=new Date().toISOString();
    if(t1Row&&t1Row.payload!=null&&!cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(t1Row.payload)){
      const ins2=await _supa.from('user_state_history').upsert({user_id:u.id,slot:'T-2',payload:t1Row.payload,saved_at:iso},{onConflict:'user_id,slot'});
      if(ins2.error)throw ins2.error;
    }
    const ins1=await _supa.from('user_state_history').upsert({user_id:u.id,slot:'T-1',payload:livePayload,saved_at:iso},{onConflict:'user_id,slot'});
    if(ins1.error)throw ins1.error;
    try{sessionStorage.setItem('intentionalReset','true');}catch(e){}
  }catch(e){console.warn('[sync] pre-delete snapshot failed',e);}
}
function showSyncIssueRestoredBanner(){
  try{if(sessionStorage.getItem(SYNC_ISSUE_BANNER_ACK)==='1')return;}catch(e){}
  const tx=document.getElementById('syncIssueBannerText');
  const bar=document.getElementById('syncIssueBanner');
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  if(tx)tx.textContent=kid?'We found a sync problem and brought back your last cloud save. Stuff you added today might need typing in again.':'We detected a sync issue and restored your last backup. Any entries made today may need to be re-entered.';
  if(bar){bar.hidden=false;bar.removeAttribute('hidden');}
  if(typeof syncUiScrollLock==='function')syncUiScrollLock();
}
function dismissSyncIssueRestoredBanner(){
  try{sessionStorage.setItem(SYNC_ISSUE_BANNER_ACK,'1');}catch(e){}
  const bar=document.getElementById('syncIssueBanner');
  if(bar)bar.hidden=true;
  if(typeof syncUiScrollLock==='function')syncUiScrollLock();
}
function bindSyncIssueBanner(){
  const b=document.getElementById('syncIssueBannerOkBtn');
  if(b&&!b.dataset.syncBnBound){b.dataset.syncBnBound='1';b.addEventListener('click',function(){dismissSyncIssueRestoredBanner();});}
}
function bindFoundSavedDataAndStartFreshModals(){
  const r=document.getElementById('foundSavedDataRestoreBtn');
  const s=document.getElementById('foundSavedDataStartFreshBtn');
  const ok=document.getElementById('startFreshConfirmOkBtn');
  const cx=document.getElementById('startFreshConfirmCancelBtn');
  if(r&&!r.dataset.bound){r.dataset.bound='1';r.addEventListener('click',function(){closeM('mFoundSavedData');void executeRestoreCloudBackupFromHistory(null,'','T-1',{});});}
  if(s&&!s.dataset.bound){s.dataset.bound='1';s.addEventListener('click',function(){openM('mStartFreshConfirm');});}
  if(ok&&!ok.dataset.bound){ok.dataset.bound='1';ok.addEventListener('click',function(){try{sessionStorage.setItem('intentionalReset','true');}catch(e){}closeM('mStartFreshConfirm');closeM('mFoundSavedData');setTimeout(function(){void cloudPushNow();},0);});}
  if(cx&&!cx.dataset.bound){cx.dataset.bound='1';cx.addEventListener('click',function(){closeM('mStartFreshConfirm');});}
}
function bindSkipSecondLockWarnModal(){
  const g=document.getElementById('skipSecondLockWarnGotItBtn');
  const k=document.getElementById('skipSecondLockWarnKeepBtn');
  if(g&&!g.dataset.bound){g.dataset.bound='1';g.addEventListener('click',function(){try{localStorage.setItem('skipConfirmWarningSeen','1');}catch(e){}closeM('mSkipSecondLockWarn');const el=document.getElementById('sSkipSecondLockConfirm');if(el&&S&&S.user){uiToggleSet(el,true);S.user.skipSecondLockConfirm=true;save();}});}
  if(k&&!k.dataset.bound){k.dataset.bound='1';k.addEventListener('click',function(){closeM('mSkipSecondLockWarn');const el=document.getElementById('sSkipSecondLockConfirm');if(el)uiToggleSet(el,false);});}
}
function scheduleCloudPush(){if(typeof authCurrentUser!=='function'||!authCurrentUser()||!cloudSyncIsEnabled())return;if(typeof _supa==='undefined'||!_supa)return;clearTimeout(_cloudPushTimer);_cloudPushTimer=setTimeout(()=>{_cloudPushTimer=null;void cloudPushNow();},2000);}
async function cloudPushNow(){
  const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;
  if(!u||!_supa||!cloudSyncIsEnabled()){syncCloudSyncPanelUI();return;}
  if(_cloudPushInFlight)return;
  _cloudPushInFlight=true;
  _cloudSyncLastError=null;
  try{
    annotateProfilesForSave();
    const intentional=sessionStorage.getItem('intentionalReset')==='true';
    if(intentional)sessionStorage.removeItem('intentionalReset');
    if(!intentional){
      const localPayload=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ROOT));
      if(cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(localPayload)){
        const corruptAudit=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ROOT));
        await executeRestoreCloudBackupFromHistory(null,'','T-1',{skipDoneAlert:true});
        const isoIns=new Date().toISOString();
        try{
          const {error:insErr}=await _supa.from('user_state_history').insert({user_id:u.id,payload:corruptAudit,saved_at:isoIns,slot:'auto-revert'});
          if(insErr)console.warn('[sync] auto-revert audit insert',insErr);
          else void pruneUserStateHistoryForUser(u.id);
        }catch(err){console.warn('[sync] auto-revert audit exception',err);}
        showSyncIssueRestoredBanner();
        return;
      }
    }
    const {data:remoteRow,error:fetchErr}=await _supa.from('user_state').select('payload,updated_at').eq('user_id',u.id).maybeSingle();
    if(fetchErr)throw fetchErr;
    const pl=remoteRow&&remoteRow.payload;
    if(!intentional){
      if(!cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(pl)&&rootLooksLikeUnsyncedFreshShell(ROOT)&&remotePayloadLikelyMoreValuableThanLocalFreshShell(ROOT,pl)){
        openM('mFoundSavedData');
        return;
      }
    }
    const iso=new Date().toISOString();
    const payload=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ROOT));
    const {error}=await _supa.from('user_state').upsert({user_id:u.id,payload,updated_at:iso},{onConflict:'user_id'});
    if(error)throw error;
    if(!ROOT._sync||typeof ROOT._sync!=='object')ROOT._sync={};
    ROOT._sync.lastRemoteUpdatedAt=iso;
    ROOT._sync.editAt=new Date(iso).getTime();
    save({fromCloudMerge:true});
  }catch(e){_cloudSyncLastError=e;console.warn('[sync] push failed',e);}
  finally{_cloudPushInFlight=false;if(typeof syncCloudSyncPanelUI==='function')syncCloudSyncPanelUI();if(typeof syncCloudHistoryPanel==='function')void syncCloudHistoryPanel();}
}
async function cloudSyncAfterAuthBootstrap(){
  clearTimeout(_cloudPushTimer);_cloudPushTimer=null;
  _cloudSyncLastError=null;
  const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;
  if(!u||!_supa){syncCloudSyncPanelUI();if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync();return;}
  if(!cloudSyncIsEnabled()){syncCloudSyncPanelUI();if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync();return;}
  try{
    const {data,error}=await _supa.from('user_state').select('payload,updated_at').eq('user_id',u.id).maybeSingle();
    if(error)throw error;
    const pl=data&&data.payload;
    if(!data||cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(pl)){await cloudPushNow();syncCloudSyncPanelUI();syncCloudHistoryPanel();if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync();return;}
    const remoteMs=new Date(data.updated_at).getTime();
    const localEdit=(ROOT._sync&&typeof ROOT._sync.editAt==='number')?ROOT._sync.editAt:0;
    if(localEdit===remoteMs){syncCloudSyncPanelUI();syncCloudHistoryPanel();if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync();return;}
    const freshLocalShell=rootLooksLikeUnsyncedFreshShell(ROOT);
    if(localEdit>remoteMs&&!freshLocalShell){await cloudPushNow();syncCloudSyncPanelUI();syncCloudHistoryPanel();if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync();return;}
    applyCloudPullMerge(pl,data.updated_at);
  }catch(e){
    _cloudSyncLastError=e;
    console.warn('[sync] pull failed',e);
  }
  syncCloudSyncPanelUI();
  syncCloudHistoryPanel();
  if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync();
}
async function syncCloudHistoryPanel(){
  const wrap=document.getElementById('advancedCloudHistoryList');
  const sec=document.getElementById('advancedCloudHistorySection');
  if(!wrap||!sec)return;
  const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;
  if(!u||!_supa){sec.hidden=true;return;}
  sec.hidden=false;
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  const labelA='Revert to yesterday';
  const labelB='Revert to 2 days ago';
  function appendSlot(parent,label,row,disabled,slotKey){
    const rowEl=document.createElement('div');
    rowEl.className='advanced-cloud-backup-row';
    const mainBtn=document.createElement('button');
    mainBtn.type='button';
    mainBtn.className='btn btn-ghost btn-sm';
    mainBtn.style.cssText='text-align:left;justify-content:flex-start';
    mainBtn.textContent=label;
    mainBtn.disabled=disabled;
    if(!disabled&&row){
      const when=formatBackupDateDdMmYyyy(row.saved_at);
      mainBtn.setAttribute('aria-label',kid?label+' — ask a grown-up':label+' — archive from '+when);
      mainBtn.onclick=()=>promptRestoreCloudBackup(row.id,row.saved_at,label,slotKey);
    }
    rowEl.appendChild(mainBtn);
    parent.appendChild(rowEl);
  }
  wrap.replaceChildren();
  const loading=document.createElement('p');
  loading.className='small-note';
  loading.textContent=kid?'Loading…':'Loading…';
  wrap.appendChild(loading);
  let r0=null,r1=null;
  try{
    const q1=await _supa.from('user_state_history').select('id,saved_at,payload,slot').eq('user_id',u.id).eq('slot','T-1').maybeSingle();
    const q2=await _supa.from('user_state_history').select('id,saved_at,payload,slot').eq('user_id',u.id).eq('slot','T-2').maybeSingle();
    if(q1.error)throw q1.error;
    if(q2.error)throw q2.error;
    const d1=q1.data,d2=q2.data;
    if(d1&&!cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(d1.payload))r0=d1;
    if(d2&&!cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(d2.payload))r1=d2;
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('[sync] cloud history list failed',e);
    r0=null;
    r1=null;
  }
  wrap.replaceChildren();
  const listRoot=document.createElement('div');
  listRoot.className='advanced-cloud-backup-list';
  wrap.appendChild(listRoot);
  appendSlot(listRoot,labelA,r0,!r0,'T-1');
  appendSlot(listRoot,labelB,r1,!r1,'T-2');
}
function cancelRestoreCloudBackup(){window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryId=null;window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryStep=0;window._pendingRestoreCloudBackupLabel=null;window._pendingRestoreCloudSavedAt=null;window._pendingRestoreCloudSlot=null;closeM('mConfirmRestoreCloudBackup');}
function promptRestoreCloudBackup(historyId,savedAtIso,backupLabel,slotKey){
  window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryId=historyId;
  window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryStep=1;
  window._pendingRestoreCloudBackupLabel=backupLabel||'Backup';
  window._pendingRestoreCloudSavedAt=savedAtIso||'';
  window._pendingRestoreCloudSlot=(slotKey==='T-1'||slotKey==='T-2')?slotKey:null;
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  const when=formatBackupDateDdMmYyyy(savedAtIso||0);
  const title=document.getElementById('confirmRestoreCloudBackupTitle');
  const tx=document.getElementById('confirmRestoreCloudBackupText');
  const okBtn=document.getElementById('confirmRestoreCloudBackupOkBtn');
  if(title)title.textContent=kid?'About this backup':'Revert to this archive?';
  if(tx){
    if(kid)tx.textContent='If you go ahead, the app goes back to the cloud save from '+when+'. It replaces what you see here and online. Ask a grown-up before continuing.';
    else tx.textContent='If you proceed, you revert to the archived cloud state from '+when+'. Your current data on this device and in the cloud will be replaced.';
  }
  if(okBtn)okBtn.textContent=kid?'Continue':'Continue';
  openM('mConfirmRestoreCloudBackup');
}
function confirmRestoreCloudBackupExecute(){
  const historyId=window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryId;
  const slotPass=window._pendingRestoreCloudSlot;
  if(!historyId&&!slotPass){cancelRestoreCloudBackup();return;}
  const skipSecond=!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.skipSecondLockConfirm);
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  const when=formatBackupDateDdMmYyyy(window._pendingRestoreCloudSavedAt||0);
  const title=document.getElementById('confirmRestoreCloudBackupTitle');
  const tx=document.getElementById('confirmRestoreCloudBackupText');
  const okBtn=document.getElementById('confirmRestoreCloudBackupOkBtn');
  if(window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryStep===1){
    window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryStep=2;
    if(title)title.textContent=kid?'Sure?':'Are you sure?';
    if(tx){if(kid)tx.textContent='Restore the save from '+when+'? Only if something looks wrong.';else tx.textContent='Restore the archived state from '+when+'? Only do this if your data looks wrong or out of date.';}
    if(okBtn)okBtn.textContent=kid?'I am sure':'I am sure';
    return;
  }
  if(window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryStep===2&&!skipSecond){
    window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryStep=3;
    if(title)title.textContent=kid?'Really, really sure?':'Are you sure you are sure?';
    if(tx)tx.textContent=kid?'This overwrites your app here and online. You cannot undo except from another automatic archive or a backup file.':'This overwrites your current app data on this device and in the cloud. You cannot undo except from another automatic archive or a JSON file you exported.';
    if(okBtn)okBtn.textContent=kid?'Yes, do it':'Yes, I’m sure';
    return;
  }
  const backupLabel=window._pendingRestoreCloudBackupLabel;
  const histOut=historyId;
  const slotOut=slotPass;
  window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryId=null;
  window._pendingRestoreCloudHistoryStep=0;
  window._pendingRestoreCloudBackupLabel=null;
  window._pendingRestoreCloudSavedAt=null;
  window._pendingRestoreCloudSlot=null;
  closeM('mConfirmRestoreCloudBackup');
  void executeRestoreCloudBackupFromHistory(histOut,backupLabel,slotOut,{});
}
async function executeRestoreCloudBackupFromHistory(historyId,backupLabel,slotKey,opts){
  opts=opts||{};
  const skipDoneAlert=!!opts.skipDoneAlert;
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;
  if(!u||!_supa)return;
  try{
    let data=null;
    if(slotKey==='T-1'||slotKey==='T-2'){
      const res=await _supa.from('user_state_history').select('payload,saved_at').eq('user_id',u.id).eq('slot',slotKey).maybeSingle();
      if(res.error)throw res.error;
      data=res.data;
    }else{
      if(!historyId){if(!skipDoneAlert)alert(kid?'Could not load that archive.':'Could not load that archive.');return;}
      const res=await _supa.from('user_state_history').select('payload,saved_at').eq('id',historyId).eq('user_id',u.id).maybeSingle();
      if(res.error)throw res.error;
      data=res.data;
    }
    if(!data||cloudSyncPayloadIsEmpty(data.payload)){if(!skipDoneAlert)alert(kid?'Could not load that archive.':'Could not load that archive.');return;}
    applyCloudPullMerge(data.payload,data.saved_at);
    await cloudPushNow();
    if(!skipDoneAlert)alert(kid?'All set!':'Done. This device and the cloud now match the restored archive.');
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('[sync] restore backup failed',e);
    if(!skipDoneAlert)alert(kid?'Something went wrong.':'Restore failed.');
  }
}
function syncCloudSyncPanelUI(){
  const cb=document.getElementById('accountCloudSyncEnabled');
  const st=document.getElementById('accountCloudSyncStatus');
  const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  if(cb){
    const on=!ROOT||!ROOT._sync||ROOT._sync.cloudEnabled!==false;
    cb.classList.toggle('on',on);
    cb.setAttribute('aria-pressed',on?'true':'false');
    cb.disabled=!u;
  }
  if(st){
    if(!u)st.textContent=kid?'Ask a grown-up to sign in if you want cloud sync.':'Sign in to sync across devices.';
    else if(typeof appConnectivityOnline==='function'&&!appConnectivityOnline())st.textContent=kid?'Offline — cloud sync when you are back online.':'Offline — cloud sync resumes when you reconnect.';
    else if(_cloudSyncLastError)st.textContent=(kid?'Upload problem: ':'Sync error: ')+(_cloudSyncLastError.message||String(_cloudSyncLastError));
    else if(_cloudPushInFlight)st.textContent=kid?'Sending to cloud…':'Syncing…';
    else if(ROOT&&ROOT._sync&&ROOT._sync.lastRemoteUpdatedAt)st.textContent=(kid?'Last cloud save: ':'Last cloud save: ')+new Date(ROOT._sync.lastRemoteUpdatedAt).toLocaleString();
    else st.textContent=kid?'Cloud sync on — uploads happen shortly after you change something.':'Cloud sync on — changes upload automatically.';
  }
}
function toggleCloudSyncFromUI(){
  if(!ROOT)return;
  ROOT._sync=ROOT._sync&&typeof ROOT._sync==='object'?ROOT._sync:{};
  const el=document.getElementById('accountCloudSyncEnabled');
  if(!el||el.disabled)return;
  const on=!el.classList.contains('on');
  el.classList.toggle('on',on);
  el.setAttribute('aria-pressed',on?'true':'false');
  ROOT._sync.cloudEnabled=on;
  save();
  if(ROOT._sync.cloudEnabled)void cloudPushNow();
  else syncCloudSyncPanelUI();
}
const UI_PALETTE_OPTIONS=[{id:'neutral',label:'Slate',sub:'Neutral & calm',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1e293b,#334155)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#cbd5e1,#94a3b8)'},{id:'navy',label:'Navy',sub:'Deep blue focus',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0c4a6e,#1e3a5f)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#7dd3fc,#38bdf8)'},{id:'graphite',label:'Graphite',sub:'Black & gray',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#27272a,#3f3f46)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#d4d4d8,#a1a1aa)'},{id:'burgundy',label:'Burgundy',sub:'Warm wine tone',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#4a1520,#7f1d1d)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#fda4af,#fb7185)'},{id:'teal',label:'Teal',sub:'Fresh aqua',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#115e59,#0f766e)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#5eead4,#2dd4bf)'},{id:'purple',label:'Purple',sub:'Soft lilac',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#4c1d95,#6d28d9)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#c4b5fd,#a78bfa)'},{id:'sage',label:'Sage',sub:'Muted green',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1a2e24,#365314)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#bbf7d0,#86efac)'},{id:'rose',label:'Rose',sub:'Dusty mauve',darkBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#4a1942,#831843)',lightBg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#fbcfe8,#f472b6)'}];
function normalizeUiPaletteId(p){const id=String(p||'').trim();return UI_PALETTE_OPTIONS.some(x=>x.id===id)?id:'neutral';}
function applyUiPalette(){if(!S||!S.user)return;document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-palette',normalizeUiPaletteId(S.user.uiPalette));}
let _headerMarkThemeTimer=null;
let _headerMarkThemeApplied=false;
function resetHeaderBrandMarkTheme(){const el=document.getElementById('headerBrandMark');if(el)el.classList.remove('brand-mark--themed');if(_headerMarkThemeTimer){clearTimeout(_headerMarkThemeTimer);_headerMarkThemeTimer=null;}_headerMarkThemeApplied=false;}
function scheduleHeaderBrandMarkTheme(){if(_headerMarkThemeApplied||_headerMarkThemeTimer)return;const el=document.getElementById('headerBrandMark');if(!el)return;if(typeof authSplashOrGateBlocking==='function'&&authSplashOrGateBlocking())return;if(typeof authGateSessionPresent==='function'&&!authGateSessionPresent())return;const apply=()=>{const m=document.getElementById('headerBrandMark');if(!m||_headerMarkThemeApplied)return;if(typeof authSplashOrGateBlocking==='function'&&authSplashOrGateBlocking())return;m.classList.add('brand-mark--themed');_headerMarkThemeApplied=true;};const reduced=typeof window!=='undefined'&&window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;if(reduced){requestAnimationFrame(apply);return;}_headerMarkThemeTimer=setTimeout(()=>{_headerMarkThemeTimer=null;apply();},3000);}
function topbarSunIconHTML(){return '<svg class="topbar-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.93 4.93l1.41 1.41M17.66 17.66l1.41 1.41M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.93 19.07l1.41-1.41M17.66 6.34l1.41-1.41"/></svg>';}
function topbarMoonIconHTML(){return '<svg class="topbar-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3a6 6 0 0 0 9 9 9 9 0 1 1-9-9Z"/></svg>';}
function syncThemeToggleIcon(btn,mode){if(!btn)return;btn.innerHTML=mode==='dark'?topbarMoonIconHTML():topbarSunIconHTML();}
const THEME_COLOR_META={light:'#eef3f8',dark:'#0a1016'};
function syncThemeColorMeta(mode){const c=THEME_COLOR_META[mode==='dark'?'dark':'light'];let m=document.querySelector('meta[name="theme-color"]');if(!m){m=document.createElement('meta');m.setAttribute('name','theme-color');document.head.appendChild(m);}m.setAttribute('content',c);}
function applyThemeMode(mode,btn){const root=document.documentElement;root.setAttribute('data-theme',mode);syncThemeToggleIcon(btn,mode);syncThemeColorMeta(mode);if(S){S.theme=mode;save();}}
function themeSwitchPrefersReducedMotion(){return typeof window!=='undefined'&&window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;}
function runThemeSwitch(mode,btn){const root=document.documentElement;const commit=function(){root.classList.add('theme-switching');applyThemeMode(mode,btn);};const finish=function(){root.classList.remove('theme-switching');};if(!themeSwitchPrefersReducedMotion()&&typeof document.startViewTransition==='function'){const vt=document.startViewTransition(commit);if(vt&&vt.finished)vt.finished.then(finish,finish);else finish();return;}commit();requestAnimationFrame(function(){requestAnimationFrame(finish);});}
function themeInit(){const btn=document.querySelector('[data-theme-toggle]');if(!S||!btn)return;let mode=S.theme||'light';applyThemeMode(mode,btn);applyUiPalette();btn.onclick=function(){mode=mode==='dark'?'light':'dark';runThemeSwitch(mode,btn);};}
function motivTierForGoal(g,pct){if(pct===null)return'amber';const fl=g.floor||80;if(pct<fl)return'red';if(pct>=90)return'green';return'amber';}
function escHTML(s){return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');}
function habitEmojiGlyphs(raw){const s=String(raw||'🎯').trim()||'🎯';try{if(typeof Intl!=='undefined'&&Intl.Segmenter){const seg=new Intl.Segmenter(undefined,{granularity:'grapheme'});return Array.from(seg.segment(s),function(x){return x.segment;});}}catch(e){}return [...s];}
function habitEmojiDisplayHTML(emoji,tag){tag=tag||'div';const raw=String(emoji||'🎯').trim()||'🎯';const glyphs=habitEmojiGlyphs(raw);const multi=glyphs.length>1;const cls='habit-emoji'+(multi?' habit-emoji--multi':'');if(!multi)return '<'+tag+' class="'+cls+'">'+escHTML(raw)+'</'+tag+'>';return '<'+tag+' class="'+cls+'"><span class="habit-emoji-stack">'+glyphs.map(function(g){return '<span class="habit-emoji-glyph">'+escHTML(g)+'</span>';}).join('')+'</span></'+tag+'>';}
/** Whole years from DOB (YYYY-MM-DD); null if missing or invalid. */
function userAgeYearsFromDob(dobStr){
  const s=String(dobStr||'').trim().slice(0,10);
  if(!s||s.length<10)return null;
  const parts=s.split('-');
  if(parts.length<3)return null;
  const y=parseInt(parts[0],10),mo=parseInt(parts[1],10)-1,da=parseInt(parts[2],10);
  if(!Number.isFinite(y)||!Number.isFinite(mo)||!Number.isFinite(da))return null;
  const birth=new Date(y,mo,da);
  if(birth.getFullYear()!==y||birth.getMonth()!==mo||birth.getDate()!==da)return null;
  const today=new Date();
  let age=today.getFullYear()-birth.getFullYear();
  const md=today.getMonth()-birth.getMonth();
  if(md<0||(md===0&&today.getDate()<birth.getDate()))age--;
  return age;
}
/** Kids copy & habit presets for ages 0–8 (from profile DOB). */
function useKidsLanguage(){
  try{
    if(!S||!S.user)return false;
    const age=userAgeYearsFromDob(S.user.dob);
    if(age===null)return false;
    return age>=0&&age<=8;
  }catch(e){return false;}
}
const PREMIUM_MAX_CHILD_PROFILES=5;
function isPremiumAccount(){return!!(ROOT&&ROOT.accountPlanTier==='premium');}
function profileIsChildPid(pid){
  if(!ROOT||!ROOT.profiles||!pid||!ROOT.profiles[pid])return false;
  const meta=ROOT.profileMeta&&ROOT.profileMeta[pid];
  if(meta&&meta.isChildProfile===true)return true;
  if(meta&&meta.isChildProfile===false)return false;
  const P=ROOT.profiles[pid];
  const age=userAgeYearsFromDob(P.user&&P.user.dob);
  return age!==null&&age>=0&&age<=8;
}
function profileCountsByKind(){
  const ids=ROOT&&ROOT.profiles?Object.keys(ROOT.profiles):[];
  let adults=0,children=0;
  ids.forEach(pid=>{if(profileIsChildPid(pid))children++;else adults++;});
  return{adults,children,total:ids.length};
}
function canAddProfileIntent(wantChild){
  if(!ROOT||!ROOT.profiles)return false;
  const{adults,children,total}=profileCountsByKind();
  if(isPremiumAccount()){
    if(!wantChild){if(adults>=1)return false;}
    else{if(children>=PREMIUM_MAX_CHILD_PROFILES)return false;}
    return true;
  }
  if(total>=2)return false;
  if(wantChild){if(children>=1)return false;}
  else{if(adults>=1)return false;}
  return true;
}
function profilesCanAddMore(){return canAddProfileIntent(true)||canAddProfileIntent(false);}
function addProfileBlockedMessage(wantChild){
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  if(isPremiumAccount()){
    if(!wantChild)return kid?'Premium allows one grown-up profile. Add a kid profile instead.':'Premium includes one adult profile. Add a child profile instead.';
    return kid?'Too many kid profiles on this device. Ask a grown-up.':'You have reached the maximum number of child profiles on this device.';
  }
  return kid?'This plan allows one grown-up profile and one kid profile.':'Basic allows one adult profile and one child profile. Upgrade to Premium for more child profiles.';
}
function syncActiveProfileChildMetaFromDob(){
  if(!ROOT||!S||!ROOT.activeProfileId)return;
  const pid=ROOT.activeProfileId;
  const age=userAgeYearsFromDob(S.user.dob);
  if(age===null)return;
  if(!ROOT.profileMeta)ROOT.profileMeta={};
  if(!ROOT.profileMeta[pid])ROOT.profileMeta[pid]={};
  const meta=ROOT.profileMeta[pid];
  if(meta.isChildProfile===false)return;
  meta.isChildProfile=(age>=0&&age<=8);
}
function repairProfileChildMetaFromDob(){
  if(!ROOT||!ROOT.profiles)return;
  Object.keys(ROOT.profiles).forEach(pid=>{
    const P=ROOT.profiles[pid];
    const meta=ROOT.profileMeta&&ROOT.profileMeta[pid];
    if(meta&&meta.isChildProfile===true)return;
    if(meta&&meta.isChildProfile===false)return;
    const age=userAgeYearsFromDob(P.user&&P.user.dob);
    if(age===null)return;
    if(!ROOT.profileMeta)ROOT.profileMeta={};
    if(!ROOT.profileMeta[pid])ROOT.profileMeta[pid]={};
    ROOT.profileMeta[pid].isChildProfile=(age>=0&&age<=8);
  });
}
function ensureAccountPlanTierOnRoot(){
  if(!ROOT)return;
  if(ROOT.accountPlanTier!=='basic'&&ROOT.accountPlanTier!=='premium')ROOT.accountPlanTier='premium';
}
function setAccountPlanTierFromUI(){
  if(!ROOT)return;
  const el=document.getElementById('accountPlanTierSelect');
  if(!el)return;
  ROOT.accountPlanTier=el.value==='premium'?'premium':'basic';
  save();
  syncAccountPlanUI();
  syncProfileSelect();
  if(typeof renderAll==='function')renderAll();
}
function syncAccountPlanUI(){
  const el=document.getElementById('accountPlanTierSelect');
  const hint=document.getElementById('accountPlanHint');
  if(ROOT){
    ensureAccountPlanTierOnRoot();
    if(el)el.value=ROOT.accountPlanTier==='premium'?'premium':'basic';
    if(hint){
      const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
      hint.textContent=isPremiumAccount()
        ?(kid?'Premium: one grown-up profile and up to '+PREMIUM_MAX_CHILD_PROFILES+' kid profiles.':'Premium: one adult profile and up to '+PREMIUM_MAX_CHILD_PROFILES+' child profiles.')
        :(kid?'Basic: one grown-up and one kid profile.':'Basic: one adult profile and one child profile.');
    }
  }
  syncPremiumTabs();
}
function normalizeInsightBody(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\\n/g,'\n');}
function insightForDisplay(ins){if(!ins)return ins;const base=Object.assign({},ins,{body:normalizeInsightBody(ins.body)});try{if(typeof useKidsLanguage!=='function'||!useKidsLanguage())return base;}catch(e){return base;}const p=INSIGHT_KID_COPY[ins.id];if(!p)return base;return Object.assign({},base,p,{body:normalizeInsightBody(p.body||base.body)});}
function isBirthdayToday(dobStr){if(!dobStr||String(dobStr).length<10)return false;const parts=String(dobStr).slice(0,10).split('-');if(parts.length<3)return false;const m=parseInt(parts[1],10),d=parseInt(parts[2],10);if(!m||!d)return false;const t=new Date();return t.getMonth()+1===m&&t.getDate()===d;}
function headerGreetingPlain(){const disp=S.user?.name?.trim();if(disp)return disp.replace(/</g,'');const pid=ROOT?.activeProfileId;let lbl=(pid&&ROOT?.profileMeta?.[pid]?.name||'').trim();const placeholder=!lbl||lbl==='Primary'||lbl==='Profile';if(placeholder){try{if(typeof authCurrentUser==='function'&&authCurrentUser()&&typeof authSuggestedName==='function'){const au=authSuggestedName();if(au)return au.replace(/</g,'');}}catch(_){}return'';}return lbl.replace(/</g,'');}
function appConnectivityOnline(){return typeof navigator==='undefined'||navigator.onLine!==false;}
function headerShowConnectivityPill(){const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;if(u)return true;return!!(headerGreetingPlain()&&S&&S.user);}
function headerGreetingAriaLabel(){const nm=headerGreetingPlain();const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const connOff=!appConnectivityOnline()&&headerShowConnectivityPill();const offBit=connOff?(kid?'. Offline on this device':'. Offline on this device'):'';if(nm&&isBirthdayToday(S.user?.dob))return'Happy birthday, '+nm+offBit;if(nm)return'Hi, '+nm+offBit;return kid?'Ask a grown-up to open Settings → Account under This profile and add your name':'Pick a profile name in Settings';}
function headerGreetingHTML(){const nm=headerGreetingPlain();const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();let inner;if(nm&&isBirthdayToday(S.user?.dob))inner=`🎂 Happy birthday, <strong class="brand-sub-name">${escHTML(nm)}</strong>!`;else if(nm)inner=`Hi, <strong class="brand-sub-name">${escHTML(nm)}</strong>`;else inner=kid?'Ask a grown-up to open <strong class="brand-sub-name">Settings → Account</strong> and add your name under <strong class="brand-sub-name">This profile</strong>':'Pick a profile name in Settings';if(!headerShowConnectivityPill())return inner;const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;const on=appConnectivityOnline();const cls=on?'header-name-pill header-name-pill--online':'header-name-pill header-name-pill--offline';let title;if(u){title=on?(kid?'Connected — cloud sync available':'Connected — cloud sync available'):(kid?'Offline — signed in on this device; cloud sync when you are back online':'Offline — signed in on this device; cloud sync resumes when you are back online');}else{title=on?(kid?'Online — your habits still save on this device':'Online — saves on this device'):(kid?'Offline — still saving here; cloud sync after you sign in online':'Offline — data keeps saving on this device; sign in when you are back online to sync');}return`<span class="${cls}" title="${escAttr(title)}">${inner}</span>`;}
const PROFILE_AVATAR_PICKER_OPTIONS=[{hex:'#e50914',lab:'Red'},{hex:'#ff7a00',lab:'Orange'},{hex:'#e6c200',lab:'Yellow'},{hex:'#1a9f3c',lab:'Green'},{hex:'#0066ff',lab:'Blue'},{hex:'#5eb8e8',lab:'Light blue'},{hex:'#6b2bd6',lab:'Violet'},{hex:'#0d0d0d',lab:'Black'}];
const DEFAULT_AVATAR_BUBBLE_HEX='#0066ff';
function normalizeNewProfileAvatarColor(hex){const h=String(hex||'').trim();return PROFILE_AVATAR_PICKER_OPTIONS.some(o=>o.hex===h)?h:DEFAULT_AVATAR_BUBBLE_HEX;}
function profileInitialPickerColor(pid){if(!ROOT||!pid)return DEFAULT_AVATAR_BUBBLE_HEX;const meta=ROOT.profileMeta[pid]||{};if(meta.avatarColor&&PROFILE_AVATAR_PICKER_OPTIONS.some(o=>o.hex===meta.avatarColor))return meta.avatarColor;return DEFAULT_AVATAR_BUBBLE_HEX;}
function syncProfileAvatarPickerToValue(hex){const want=normalizeNewProfileAvatarColor(hex);const hid=document.getElementById('profileNameAvatarColor');if(hid)hid.value=want;syncAvatarBubbleTriggerBtn(document.getElementById('profileAvatarBubbleBtn'),want);}
function syncAvatarBubbleTriggerBtn(btn,hex){if(!btn)return;const h=normalizeNewProfileAvatarColor(hex);const isBlack=PROFILE_AVATAR_PICKER_OPTIONS.some(o=>o.hex===h&&o.lab==='Black');btn.style.backgroundColor=h;btn.classList.toggle('avatar-bubble-trigger--black',isBlack);btn.setAttribute('data-current-color',h);}
function fillAvatarBubblePickerSwatches(mode){const w=document.getElementById('avatarBubblePickerSwatches');if(!w)return;let cur;if(mode==='settings'&&ROOT)cur=profileInitialPickerColor(ROOT.activeProfileId);else if(mode==='setup'){const hid=document.getElementById('setupProfileAvatarColor');cur=normalizeNewProfileAvatarColor(hid&&hid.value);}else if(mode==='profileModal'){const hid=document.getElementById('profileNameAvatarColor');cur=normalizeNewProfileAvatarColor(hid&&hid.value);}else cur=DEFAULT_AVATAR_BUBBLE_HEX;const handler=mode==='settings'?'settingsAvatarSwatchPick(this)':mode==='setup'?'setupAvatarSwatchPick(this)':'profileModalAvatarSwatchPick(this)';w.innerHTML=PROFILE_AVATAR_PICKER_OPTIONS.map(o=>{const blk=o.lab==='Black'?' profile-avatar-swatch--black':'';const on=o.hex===cur;return`<button type="button" class="profile-avatar-swatch${blk}${on?' profile-avatar-swatch--selected':''}" data-color="${o.hex}" style="background-color:${o.hex}" aria-label="${o.lab}" role="radio" aria-checked="${on?'true':'false'}" onclick="${handler}"></button>`;}).join('');}

function profileTileInitial(name){const s=(name||'').trim();if(!s)return'?';const ch=[...s][0];try{return ch.toLocaleUpperCase('en-GB');}catch(_){return ch;}}
function sortedProfileIds(){if(!ROOT||!ROOT.profiles)return[];return Object.keys(ROOT.profiles).sort((a,b)=>{const na=(ROOT.profileMeta[a]&&ROOT.profileMeta[a].name)||a;const nb=(ROOT.profileMeta[b]&&ROOT.profileMeta[b].name)||b;return na.localeCompare(nb);});}

function renderHeader(){const el=document.getElementById('motivationalHeader');if(!el)return;const multi=ROOT&&ROOT.profiles&&Object.keys(ROOT.profiles).length>1;el.innerHTML=headerGreetingHTML();if(multi){el.classList.add('brand-sub-tappable');el.setAttribute('role','button');el.setAttribute('tabindex','0');el.setAttribute('aria-haspopup','dialog');el.setAttribute('aria-label','Switch profile. function syncSettingsPanelsKidCopy(){
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  const setTxt=(id,s)=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent=s;};
  const setHtml=(id,h)=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.innerHTML=h;};
  setTxt('settingsProfileBlockHeading',kid?'Profiles':'Profile');
