function kidCritterMountElForTab(tabId){return tabId?document.getElementById('kidCritterMount-'+tabId):null;}
function kidCritterLottieDomNode(anim){try{return anim&&(anim.wrapper||anim.container);}catch(e){return null;}}
/** True if node is under root, including when node is inside a ShadowRoot whose host is under root (Lottie container in shadow). */
function kidCritterNodeUnderCritterMount(root,node){
  if(!node||!root)return false;
  let n=node.nodeType===1?node:node.parentElement;
  for(let i=0;i<48&&n;i++){
    if(n===root)return true;
    const rn=n.getRootNode&&n.getRootNode();
    if(rn&&rn.nodeType===11&&rn.host)n=rn.host;
    else n=n.parentNode;
  }
  return false;
}
/** Isolated shadow tree per peek so each SVG Lottie has its own id namespace (fixes duplicate url(#…) when four instances mount). */
function kidCritterPeekLottieContainer(host){
  if(!host)return null;
  try{
    if(!host.shadowRoot){
      const sr=host.attachShadow({mode:'open'});
      const st=document.createElement('style');
      st.textContent='.kid-cat-lottie-inner{width:100%;line-height:0;display:block;box-sizing:border-box}.kid-cat-lottie-inner svg{display:block!important;width:100%!important;height:auto!important;max-width:100%}';
      const inner=document.createElement('div');
      inner.className='kid-cat-lottie-inner';
      sr.appendChild(st);
      sr.appendChild(inner);
    }
    return host.shadowRoot.querySelector('.kid-cat-lottie-inner');
  }catch(e){
    return host;
  }
}
function kidCritterClearMountEl(root){
  if(!root)return;
  const cCat=kidCritterLottieDomNode(window._kidCatLottieAnim);
  if(cCat&&kidCritterNodeUnderCritterMount(root,cCat)){try{window._kidCatLottieAnim.destroy();}catch(e){}window._kidCatLottieAnim=null;}
  const cRoc=kidCritterLottieDomNode(window._kidRocketLottieAnim);
  if(cRoc&&root.contains(cRoc)){try{window._kidRocketLottieAnim.destroy();}catch(e){}window._kidRocketLottieAnim=null;}
  root.innerHTML='';
}
function kidCritterClearAllTabMounts(){
  if(window._kidCatLottieAnim){try{window._kidCatLottieAnim.destroy();}catch(e){}window._kidCatLottieAnim=null;}
  if(window._kidRocketLottieAnim){try{window._kidRocketLottieAnim.destroy();}catch(e){}window._kidRocketLottieAnim=null;}
  document.querySelectorAll('main.main .kid-critter-mount').forEach(el=>{el.innerHTML='';});
}
function clearKidCritterMount(){kidCritterClearAllTabMounts();}
/** Delay before the first critter after kid mode is ready (ms). */
function kidCritterFirstDelayMs(){return 6000;}
/** Random pause after a critter finishes before the next spawn — 20–50s, new roll each time. */
function kidCritterDelayMs(){return 20000+Math.floor(Math.random()*30001);}
function kidCritterParseEmbeddedLottieJson(id){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(!el)return null;const t=el.textContent;if(!t||!t.trim())return null;try{return JSON.parse(t);}catch(err){return null;}}
let _kidCatPeekJsonCache=null;
function kidCritterLoadCatPeekJson(){if(_kidCatPeekJsonCache)return Promise.resolve(_kidCatPeekJsonCache);const j=kidCritterParseEmbeddedLottieJson('kidCatPeekLottieEmbedded');if(j){_kidCatPeekJsonCache=j;return Promise.resolve(j);}return Promise.reject(new Error('cat lottie embedded'));}
function kidCritterCssVarToRgb01(varName){const anchor=document.querySelector('main.main .panel.active .kid-critter-mount')||document.querySelector('main.main .kid-critter-mount')||document.body;const probe=document.createElement('span');probe.setAttribute('style','position:fixed;left:-9999px;top:0;color:var('+varName+');pointer-events:none;opacity:0;white-space:nowrap');anchor.appendChild(probe);const rgb=getComputedStyle(probe).color;probe.remove();const m=String(rgb).match(/rgba?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)/);if(!m)return[0.45,0.48,0.52];return[Math.min(1,parseFloat(m[1])/255),Math.min(1,parseFloat(m[2])/255),Math.min(1,parseFloat(m[3])/255)];}
function kidCritterMixRgb01(a,b,t){return[a[0]*(1-t)+b[0]*t,a[1]*(1-t)+b[1]*t,a[2]*(1-t)+b[2]*t];}
function kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,b,e){return k&&k.length>=3&&Math.abs(k[0]-b[0])<e&&Math.abs(k[1]-b[1])<e&&Math.abs(k[2]-b[2])<e;}
function kidCritterGradStopsClose12(arr,a0,a1,a2,e){if(!arr||arr.length<12)return false;return kidCritterFillRgbClose([arr[1],arr[2],arr[3]],a0,e)&&kidCritterFillRgbClose([arr[5],arr[6],arr[7]],a1,e)&&kidCritterFillRgbClose([arr[9],arr[10],arr[11]],a2,e);}
function kidCritterReplaceGradStops12(arr,r0,r1,r2){arr[1]=r0[0];arr[2]=r0[1];arr[3]=r0[2];arr[5]=r1[0];arr[6]=r1[1];arr[7]=r1[2];arr[9]=r2[0];arr[10]=r2[1];arr[11]=r2[2];}
function themeKidCatLottieData(json){const blue=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--blue');const blueS=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--blue-strong');const amb=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--amber');const txt=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--text');const sur=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--surface');const furMain=kidCritterMixRgb01(kidCritterMixRgb01(blue,amb,0.26),[1,0.93,0.84],0.1);const furNose=kidCritterMixRgb01(kidCritterMixRgb01(blueS,amb,0.42),[0.52,0.28,0.14],0.22);const muzzleW=kidCritterMixRgb01([1,1,1],sur,0.12);const eye=kidCritterMixRgb01(txt,[0.02,0.02,0.04],0.4);const data=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(json));(function visit(o){if(!o||typeof o!=='object')return;if(o.ty==='fl'&&o.c&&o.c.a===0&&Array.isArray(o.c.k)&&o.c.k.length>=3){const k=o.c.k;if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0,0,0],0.02))o.c.k=eye.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.749,0.3922,0.149],0.04))o.c.k=furNose.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[1,1,1],0.02))o.c.k=muzzleW.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.9373,0.5569,0.2706],0.04))o.c.k=furMain.slice(0,3);}Object.keys(o).forEach(key=>visit(o[key]));})(data);return data;}
function themeKidRocketLottieData(json){const blue=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--blue');const blueS=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--blue-strong');const amb=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--amber');const txt=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--text');const sur=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--surface');const mut=kidCritterCssVarToRgb01('--text-muted');const rocketBlueHi=kidCritterMixRgb01(blue,[1,1,1],0.38);const rocketBlueMid=kidCritterMixRgb01(blue,blueS,0.42);const rocketBlueDeep=kidCritterMixRgb01(blueS,txt,0.22);const rocketBodyHi=kidCritterMixRgb01(kidCritterMixRgb01(blue,sur,0.32),[0.94,0.95,1],0.4);const rocketBodyMid=kidCritterMixRgb01(kidCritterMixRgb01(blue,sur,0.5),mut,0.18);const rocketBodyLo=kidCritterMixRgb01(rocketBodyMid,mut,0.28);const rocketMetal=kidCritterMixRgb01(mut,sur,0.48);const rocketMetalHi=kidCritterMixRgb01(rocketMetal,[1,1,1],0.22);const rocketMetalLo=kidCritterMixRgb01(rocketMetal,txt,0.32);const rocketAccent=kidCritterMixRgb01(kidCritterMixRgb01(amb,blueS,0.28),[0.88,0.38,0.42],0.12);const rocketAccentDark=kidCritterMixRgb01(rocketAccent,txt,0.5);const rocketWhite=kidCritterMixRgb01([1,1,1],sur,0.1);const rocketInk=kidCritterMixRgb01(txt,[0.04,0.04,0.07],0.45);const ge=0.08;const data=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(json));(function visit(o){if(!o||typeof o!=='object')return;if(o.ty==='fl'&&o.c&&o.c.a===0&&Array.isArray(o.c.k)&&o.c.k.length>=3){const k=o.c.k;if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0,0,0],0.025))o.c.k=rocketInk.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[1,1,1],0.02))o.c.k=rocketWhite.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.322,0.714,1],ge))o.c.k=rocketBlueHi.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.537,0.831,1],ge))o.c.k=rocketBlueHi.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.565,0.584,0.651],ge))o.c.k=rocketMetal.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.929,0.255,0.310],ge))o.c.k=rocketAccent.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.718,0.137,0.235],ge))o.c.k=rocketAccentDark.slice(0,3);}if(o.ty==='st'&&o.c&&o.c.a===0&&Array.isArray(o.c.k)&&o.c.k.length>=3){const k=o.c.k;if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0,0,0],0.025))o.c.k=rocketInk.slice(0,3);else if(kidCritterFillRgbClose(k,[0.565,0.584,0.651],ge))o.c.k=rocketMetal.slice(0,3);}if(o.ty==='gf'&&o.g&&o.g.k&&o.g.k.a===0&&Array.isArray(o.g.k.k)&&o.g.k.k.length>=12){const arr=o.g.k.k;if(kidCritterGradStopsClose12(arr,[0.537,0.831,1],[0.429,0.773,1],[0.322,0.714,1],ge))kidCritterReplaceGradStops12(arr,rocketBlueDeep,rocketBlueMid,rocketBlueHi);else if(kidCritterGradStopsClose12(arr,[0.882,0.894,0.984],[0.816,0.831,0.922],[0.749,0.769,0.859],ge))kidCritterReplaceGradStops12(arr,rocketBodyHi,rocketBodyMid,rocketBodyLo);else if(kidCritterGradStopsClose12(arr,[0.565,0.584,0.651],[0.657,0.676,0.755],[0.749,0.769,0.859],ge))kidCritterReplaceGradStops12(arr,rocketMetalLo,rocketMetal,rocketMetalHi);}Object.keys(o).forEach(key=>visit(o[key]));})(data);return data;}
let _kidCatPeekLottieIdSeq=0;
function kidCritterStartCatPeekLottie(host,durMs,mountRoot,onMultiDone){
  const root=mountRoot||(host&&host.closest('.kid-critter-mount'));
  const multi=typeof onMultiDone==='function';
  const scheduleUnmount=(ms)=>{_kidCritterTimer=setTimeout(()=>{kidCritterClearMountEl(root);scheduleKidCritter(kidCritterDelayMs());},Math.max(0,ms|0));};
  const doneFallback=()=>multi?onMultiDone():scheduleUnmount(durMs);
  if(!host){doneFallback();return;}
  const L=getKidLottieLib();if(!L){doneFallback();return;}
  const lottieContainer=kidCritterPeekLottieContainer(host);
  if(!lottieContainer){doneFallback();return;}
  kidCritterLoadCatPeekJson().then(raw=>{
    let data;
    try{data=themeKidCatLottieData(raw);}catch(e){data=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(raw));}
    if(!multi){try{if(window._kidCatLottieAnim){window._kidCatLottieAnim.destroy();window._kidCatLottieAnim=null;}}catch(e){}}
    const idPrefix='kcp'+String(++_kidCatPeekLottieIdSeq)+'_';
    const scene=host.closest('.kid-critter-scene');
    const peekEdge=(scene&&scene.dataset&&scene.dataset.kidPeekEdge)||'';
    const isRight=peekEdge==='r';
    const anim=L.loadAnimation({container:lottieContainer,renderer:'svg',loop:false,autoplay:false,animationData:data,rendererSettings:{idPrefix,preserveAspectRatio:'xMidYMid meet'}});
    if(!multi)window._kidCatLottieAnim=anim;
    const entrySpeed=0.5+Math.random()*0.5;
    const exitSpeed=1+Math.random();
    try{if(typeof anim.setSpeed==='function')anim.setSpeed(entrySpeed);}catch(e){}
    if(isRight){try{anim.setDirection(-1);}catch(e){}}
    try{anim.play();}catch(e){}
    function catViewportNudge(){if(scene)requestAnimationFrame(function(){
      kidCritterNudgeSceneFullyIntoViewport(scene);requestAnimationFrame(function(){kidCritterNudgeSceneFullyIntoViewport(scene);});
    });}
    try{anim.addEventListener('DOMLoaded',catViewportNudge);}catch(e){}
    try{anim.addEventListener('data_ready',catViewportNudge);}catch(e){}
    setTimeout(catViewportNudge,60);
    setTimeout(catViewportNudge,280);
    const passMs=kidCritterCatPlaybackMs(data);
    const estPassMs=Math.ceil(passMs/entrySpeed+passMs/exitSpeed+320);
    const safetyMs=Math.max(durMs,estPassMs)+2800;
    let phase=0,finished=false,safetyTimer=null;
    function finish(){
      if(finished)return;
      finished=true;
      if(safetyTimer){clearTimeout(safetyTimer);safetyTimer=null;}
      try{anim.removeEventListener('complete',onComp);}catch(e){}
      try{anim.destroy();}catch(e){}
      if(multi)onMultiDone();
      else{try{if(window._kidCatLottieAnim===anim)window._kidCatLottieAnim=null;}catch(e){}scheduleUnmount(0);}
    }
    function onComp(){
      if(finished)return;
      if(phase===0){
        phase=1;
        const exitDir=isRight?1:-1;
        try{if(typeof anim.setSpeed==='function')anim.setSpeed(exitSpeed);}catch(e){}
        try{anim.setDirection(exitDir);}catch(e){}
        anim.play();
        return;
      }
      finish();
    }
    try{anim.addEventListener('complete',onComp);}catch(e){finish();return;}
    safetyTimer=setTimeout(finish,safetyMs);
  }).catch(()=>{doneFallback();});
}
let _kidRocketJsonCache=null;
function kidCritterLoadRocketJson(){if(_kidRocketJsonCache)return Promise.resolve(_kidRocketJsonCache);const j=kidCritterParseEmbeddedLottieJson('kidRocketLottieEmbedded');if(j){_kidRocketJsonCache=j;return Promise.resolve(j);}return Promise.reject(new Error('rocket lottie embedded'));}
function kidCritterRocketPlaybackMs(data){const ip=typeof data.ip==='number'?data.ip:0;const op=typeof data.op==='number'?data.op:60;const fr=typeof data.fr==='number'&&data.fr>0?data.fr:25;return Math.ceil((op-ip)/fr*1000)+280;}
function kidCritterCatPlaybackMs(data){const ip=typeof data.ip==='number'?data.ip:0;const op=typeof data.op==='number'?data.op:60;const fr=typeof data.fr==='number'&&data.fr>0?data.fr:25;return Math.ceil((op-ip)/fr*1000)+200;}
/** Min scale vs 700px comp so a rocket can still show when the visible panel slice is short (min axis ~scale*700 px). */
const KID_ROCKET_MIN_FIT_SCALE=0.06;
function kidCritterRandomRocketScale(){return Math.min(0.6,Math.max(0.2,0.2+Math.random()*0.4));}
/** Cat peek: pad from visible rect when clamping along-edge position (parallel to screen rim). Rotation pivot (edge d midpoint): .kid-critter-mount --kid-cat-pivot-d-{bottom,top,left,right} in CSS. */
const KID_CAT_PEEK_EDGE_PAD=8;
/** Left/right scene shift along x on `transform: translate(x, -50%)`. Use **% of the scene box width** (side scenes are `width:100%` in the mount, so this tracks viewport width). Examples: `0%`, `-5%`, `3%`, or `calc(-4% + 2px)`. */
const KID_CAT_L_PEEK_DEPTH_X='-18%';
const KID_CAT_R_PEEK_DEPTH_X='18%';
/** Extra horizontal rim nudge for side Lottie (added inside translateX next to comp-height shift). `0px` = default. Use fixed `px` for absolute shifts; use `vw`/`calc(...)` so nudges scale with viewport (e.g. `calc(4px + 0.25vw)`). */
const KID_CAT_SIDE_NUDGE_L='0px';
const KID_CAT_SIDE_NUDGE_R='0px';
/** Side peek rotation (after translateX). Edit here instead of the long CSS transform line. Examples: left `-90deg` or `90deg`; right `90deg` or `270deg`. */
const KID_CAT_SIDE_ROTATE_L='90deg';
const KID_CAT_SIDE_ROTATE_R='-90deg';
/** Left/right peeks only: fixed scale (no random size). Top/bottom keep variable scale. Clamped to viewport in `kidCritterSidePeekScale`. Tune one number. */
const KID_CAT_SIDE_FIXED_SCALE=0.26;
/** Bottom of app chrome (tabs strip), for anchoring top-edge peeks to the header area — not the browser chrome. */
function kidCritterAppChromeBottomPx(){const tabs=document.querySelector('.app .tabs');if(tabs)try{return tabs.getBoundingClientRect().top;}catch(e){}const cs=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);const th=parseFloat(cs.getPropertyValue('--tabs-strip-height'))||72;const vh=window.innerHeight||document.documentElement.clientHeight||0;return Math.max(0,vh-th);}
/** Mount-local rectangle (px) where the mount intersects the visible viewport. Uses parent .panel when mount is :empty (display:none → 0×0 rect) so scheduling still runs before innerHTML. */
function kidCritterMountVisibleLocalRect(mount){const vw=window.innerWidth||document.documentElement.clientWidth||0;const vh=window.innerHeight||document.documentElement.clientHeight||0;let r=mount.getBoundingClientRect();if(r.width<8||r.height<8){const p=mount.closest&&mount.closest('section.panel');if(p)r=p.getBoundingClientRect();}const mw=r.width,mh=r.height;const x0=Math.max(0,-r.left),x1=Math.min(mw,vw-r.left),y0=Math.max(0,-r.top),y1=Math.min(mh,vh-r.top);let w=x1-x0,h=y1-y0;if(w<=4||h<=4)return{x0:0,x1:mw,y0:0,y1:mh,w:mw,h:mh,mw,mh,ok:mw>4&&mh>4};return{x0,x1,y0,y1,w,h,mw,mh,ok:w>4&&h>4};}
/** Largest scale such that comp width base×scale fits the visible mount slice (same rule as four-cat spawn). */
function kidCritterPeekMaxSquareScale(v,base){
  const edgePad=KID_CAT_PEEK_EDGE_PAD;
  const minCat=0.06;
  const maxCatScale=Math.min(0.5,(v.w-2*edgePad)/base,(v.h-2*edgePad)/base);
  let maxFour=minCat;
  for(let s=maxCatScale;s>minCat;s-=0.025){
    const artW=base*s;
    if(v.h-2*edgePad>=artW&&v.w-2*edgePad>=artW){
      maxFour=s;
      break;
    }
  }
  return maxFour;
}
/** Fixed side-peek scale, clamped so the art still fits on narrow viewports. */
function kidCritterSidePeekScale(v,base){
  const minCat=0.06;
  const maxFit=kidCritterPeekMaxSquareScale(v,base);
  return Math.max(minCat,Math.min(KID_CAT_SIDE_FIXED_SCALE,maxFit));
}
/** Cat comp aspect (height/width) — matches CSS 873.86/1217.14. */
const KID_CAT_COMP_H_PER_W=873.86/1217.14;
/** Half of graphic extent along the edge used for random placement (mount px), so the full bbox stays in the visible slice. */
function kidCritterPeekHalfParallelPx(e,artW){
  const artH=artW*KID_CAT_COMP_H_PER_W;
  if(e==='t'||e==='b')return artW*0.5;
  return 0.5*Math.max(artW,artH);
}
/** Max rocket scale (1 = 700px) that fits entirely in the viewport, capped at 60% of comp. */
function kidCritterRocketMaxFitScale(mount,paddingPx){
  const pad=typeof paddingPx==='number'?paddingPx:10;
  const vw=window.innerWidth||document.documentElement.clientWidth||0;
  const vh=window.innerHeight||document.documentElement.clientHeight||0;
  const iw=Math.max(0,vw-pad*2),ih=Math.max(0,vh-pad*2);
  return Math.min(0.6,iw/700,ih/700);
}
/** Rocket center as % of viewport so the 700×scale px box stays fully on-screen (mount is fixed fullscreen). */
function kidCritterRocketPositionPct(mount,scale,paddingPx){
  const pad=typeof paddingPx==='number'?paddingPx:10;
  const vw=window.innerWidth||document.documentElement.clientWidth||1;
  const vh=window.innerHeight||document.documentElement.clientHeight||1;
  const pw=700*scale,ph=700*scale;
  const halfW=pw/2,halfH=ph/2;
  let cxMin=pad+halfW,cxMax=vw-pad-halfW,cyMin=pad+halfH,cyMax=vh-pad-halfH;
  if(cxMax<=cxMin)cxMin=cxMax=vw/2;
  if(cyMax<=cyMin)cyMin=cyMax=vh/2;
  const cx=cxMin+Math.random()*(cxMax-cxMin);
  const cy=cyMin+Math.random()*(cyMax-cyMin);
  return{left:(100*cx/vw).toFixed(3)+'%',top:(100*cy/vh).toFixed(3)+'%'};
}
/** Shift a critter scene with margin until its bbox fits in the viewport. Skips nudge on intentional peek bleed edges (same idea as left:-20px / right:-20px). */
function kidCritterNudgeSceneFullyIntoViewport(scene){
  if(!scene||!scene.getBoundingClientRect)return;
  if(scene.dataset&&scene.dataset.kidPeekEdge)return;
  const pad=6;
  const vw=window.innerWidth||document.documentElement.clientWidth||0;
  const vh=window.innerHeight||document.documentElement.clientHeight||0;
  const edge=scene.dataset.kidPeekEdge||'';
  let mx=parseFloat(scene.dataset.kidNx||'0')||0;
  let my=parseFloat(scene.dataset.kidNy||'0')||0;
  for(let iter=0;iter<10;iter++){
    const r=scene.getBoundingClientRect();
    let dx=0,dy=0;
    if(r.left<pad&&edge!=='l')dx=pad-r.left;
    if(r.right>vw-pad&&edge!=='r')dx+=(vw-pad)-r.right;
    if(r.top<pad&&edge!=='t')dy=pad-r.top;
    if(r.bottom>vh-pad&&edge!=='b')dy+=(vh-pad)-r.bottom;
    if(!dx&&!dy)break;
    mx+=dx;my+=dy;
    scene.dataset.kidNx=String(mx);
    scene.dataset.kidNy=String(my);
    scene.style.marginLeft=mx+'px';
    scene.style.marginTop=my+'px';
  }
}
function kidCritterStartRocketLottie(host,mountRoot){
  const root=mountRoot||(host&&host.closest('.kid-critter-mount'));
  const bump=()=>{_kidCritterTimer=setTimeout(()=>{kidCritterClearMountEl(root);scheduleKidCritter(kidCritterDelayMs());},0);};
  const fail=()=>bump();
  if(!host){fail();return;}
  const L=getKidLottieLib();if(!L){fail();return;}
  kidCritterLoadRocketJson().then(raw=>{
    let data;
    try{data=themeKidRocketLottieData(raw);}catch(e){data=raw;}
    const durMs=kidCritterRocketPlaybackMs(data);
    const done=()=>{_kidCritterTimer=setTimeout(()=>{kidCritterClearMountEl(root);scheduleKidCritter(kidCritterDelayMs());},durMs);};
    try{if(window._kidRocketLottieAnim){window._kidRocketLottieAnim.destroy();window._kidRocketLottieAnim=null;}}catch(e){}
    const scene=host.closest('.kid-critter-scene');
    function rocketViewportNudge(){if(scene)requestAnimationFrame(()=>{kidCritterNudgeSceneFullyIntoViewport(scene);requestAnimationFrame(()=>kidCritterNudgeSceneFullyIntoViewport(scene));});}
    try{
      window._kidRocketLottieAnim=L.loadAnimation({container:host,renderer:'svg',loop:false,autoplay:true,animationData:data});
      try{window._kidRocketLottieAnim.addEventListener('DOMLoaded',rocketViewportNudge);}catch(e){}
      setTimeout(rocketViewportNudge,60);
      setTimeout(rocketViewportNudge,200);
      done();
    }catch(e){fail();}
  }).catch(fail);
}
/** Kid Log tab: play rocket when a habit row first qualifies (green) this week — not from the random critter rotation. */
function kidCritterMaybePlayRocketOnHabitQualified(wk,h,wasQualifiedBefore){
  if(!h||!wk||wasQualifiedBefore)return;
  if(!useKidsLanguage()||!kidCritterMotionAllowed()||!kidCritterAppReady())return;
  if(wk!==weekKey(0))return;
  if(!qualifies(h,wk))return;
  if(!document.getElementById('tab-tracker')?.classList.contains('active'))return;
  const L=getKidLottieLib();if(!L)return;
  const mount=kidCritterMountElForTab('tracker');if(!mount)return;
  const vis=kidCritterMountVisibleLocalRect(mount);if(!vis.ok)return;
  const maxFit=kidCritterRocketMaxFitScale(mount);if(maxFit<KID_ROCKET_MIN_FIT_SCALE)return;
  try{if(window._kidRocketLottieAnim){window._kidRocketLottieAnim.destroy();}}catch(e){}window._kidRocketLottieAnim=null;
  clearKidCritterTimer();
  const scale=Math.min(kidCritterRandomRocketScale(),maxFit);const pos=kidCritterRocketPositionPct(mount,scale);
  kidCritterClearMountEl(mount);
  mount.innerHTML=`<div class="kid-critter-scene kid-rocket-scene" style="left:${pos.left};top:${pos.top};--kid-rocket-scale:${scale.toFixed(4)}"><div class="kid-rocket-lottie-host" aria-hidden="true"></div></div>`;
  kidCritterStartRocketLottie(mount.querySelector('.kid-rocket-lottie-host'),mount);
}
function scheduleKidCritter(ms){clearKidCritterTimer();if(!useKidsLanguage()||!kidCritterMotionAllowed()||!kidCritterAppReady())return;_kidCritterTimer=setTimeout(playKidCritterScene,ms);}
function kidCritterCatPeekSceneHtml(v,e,catScale,base){
  const edgePad=KID_CAT_PEEK_EDGE_PAD;
  const catScaleCss=catScale.toFixed(4);
  const artW=base*catScale;
  const halfAlong=kidCritterPeekHalfParallelPx(e,artW);
  const mw=Math.max(1,v.mw||1),mh=Math.max(1,v.mh||1);
  let ws='',wcls='kid-cat-muzzle-peek-wrap--l';
  if(e==='l'){
    let tyMin=v.y0+edgePad+halfAlong,tyMax=v.y1-edgePad-halfAlong;
    if(tyMax<tyMin)tyMin=tyMax=(v.y0+v.y1)*.5;
    const ty=tyMin+Math.random()*(tyMax-tyMin);
    const topPct=(100*ty/mh).toFixed(2);
    ws=`left:0;right:auto;top:${topPct}%;transform:translate(${KID_CAT_L_PEEK_DEPTH_X},-50%)`;
    wcls='kid-cat-muzzle-peek-wrap--l';
  }else if(e==='r'){
    let tyMin=v.y0+edgePad+halfAlong,tyMax=v.y1-edgePad-halfAlong;
    if(tyMax<tyMin)tyMin=tyMax=(v.y0+v.y1)*.5;
    const ty=tyMin+Math.random()*(tyMax-tyMin);
    const topPct=(100*ty/mh).toFixed(2);
    ws=`left:auto;right:0;top:${topPct}%;transform:translate(${KID_CAT_R_PEEK_DEPTH_X},-50%)`;
    wcls='kid-cat-muzzle-peek-wrap--r';
  }else if(e==='t'){
    let txMin=v.x0+edgePad+halfAlong,txMax=v.x1-edgePad-halfAlong;
    if(txMax<txMin)txMin=txMax=(v.x0+v.x1)*.5;
    const tx=txMin+Math.random()*(txMax-txMin);
    const leftPct=(100*tx/mw).toFixed(2);
    ws=`top:0;left:${leftPct}%;transform:translateX(-50%)`;
    wcls='kid-cat-muzzle-peek-wrap--t';
  }else{
    let txMin=v.x0+edgePad+halfAlong,txMax=v.x1-edgePad-halfAlong;
    if(txMax<txMin)txMin=txMax=(v.x0+v.x1)*.5;
    const tx=txMin+Math.random()*(txMax-txMin);
    const leftPct=(100*tx/mw).toFixed(2);
    ws=`bottom:0;left:${leftPct}%;transform:translateX(-50%)`;
    wcls='kid-cat-muzzle-peek-wrap--b';
  }
  let wrapStyle=`--kid-cat-art-scale:${catScaleCss}`;
  if(e==='l')wrapStyle+=`;--kid-cat-side-nudge-l:${KID_CAT_SIDE_NUDGE_L};--kid-cat-side-rotate-l:${KID_CAT_SIDE_ROTATE_L}`;
  else if(e==='r')wrapStyle+=`;--kid-cat-side-nudge-r:${KID_CAT_SIDE_NUDGE_R};--kid-cat-side-rotate-r:${KID_CAT_SIDE_ROTATE_R}`;
  return`<div class="kid-critter-scene" style="${ws}" data-kid-peek-edge="${e}"><div class="kid-cat-muzzle-peek-wrap ${wcls}" style="${wrapStyle}"><div class="kid-cat-muzzle-svg kid-cat-muzzle-svg--lottie"><div class="kid-cat-lottie-host" aria-hidden="true"></div></div></div></div>`;
}
function kidCritterMountCatPeek(mount,v,e,catScale,base,dur){
  kidCritterClearMountEl(mount);
  const sc=e==='l'||e==='r'?kidCritterSidePeekScale(v,base):catScale;
  mount.innerHTML='<div class="kid-critter-slot-future" data-kid-critter-slot="reserved" aria-hidden="true"></div>'+kidCritterCatPeekSceneHtml(v,e,sc,base);
  const host=mount.querySelector('.kid-cat-lottie-host');
  kidCritterStartCatPeekLottie(host,dur,mount);
}
function playKidCritterScene(){
  clearKidCritterTimer();
  ensureLottieGlobal();
  if(!useKidsLanguage()||!kidCritterMotionAllowed()||!kidCritterAppReady())return;
  if(!getKidLottieLib()){scheduleKidCritter(1800);return;}
  const tabId=kidCritterActiveTabId();
  const mount=kidCritterMountElForTab(tabId);
  if(!mount){scheduleKidCritter(600);return;}
  const vis=kidCritterMountVisibleLocalRect(mount);
  if(!vis.ok){scheduleKidCritter(1200);return;}
  const dur=9800;
  const vw=window.innerWidth||document.documentElement.clientWidth||1;
  const edgePad=KID_CAT_PEEK_EDGE_PAD;
  const base=Math.min(1217,vw*0.94);
  const maxCatScale=Math.min(0.5,(vis.w-2*edgePad)/base,(vis.h-2*edgePad)/base);
  const minCatScale=0.2;
  const artWtb0=base*minCatScale;
  const artHtb0=artWtb0*KID_CAT_COMP_H_PER_W;
  const sideSc0=kidCritterSidePeekScale(vis,base);
  const artWside0=base*sideSc0;
  const artHside0=artWside0*KID_CAT_COMP_H_PER_W;
  const sideNeed0=Math.max(artWside0,artHside0);
  let poolProbe=[];
  if(maxCatScale>=minCatScale){
    if(vis.h-2*edgePad>=sideNeed0&&vis.w-2*edgePad>=sideNeed0)poolProbe.push('l','r');
    if(vis.w-2*edgePad>=artWtb0&&vis.h-2*edgePad>=artHtb0)poolProbe.push('t','b');
  }
  if(!poolProbe.length){scheduleKidCritter(1200);return;}
  if(maxCatScale<0.2){scheduleKidCritter(1200);return;}
  const catScale=0.2+Math.random()*(maxCatScale-0.2);
  const artWtb=base*catScale;
  const artHtb=artWtb*KID_CAT_COMP_H_PER_W;
  const sideSc=kidCritterSidePeekScale(vis,base);
  const artWside=base*sideSc;
  const artHside=artWside*KID_CAT_COMP_H_PER_W;
  const sideNeed=Math.max(artWside,artHside);
  const pool=[];
  if(vis.h-2*edgePad>=sideNeed&&vis.w-2*edgePad>=sideNeed)pool.push('l','r');
  if(vis.w-2*edgePad>=artWtb&&vis.h-2*edgePad>=artHtb)pool.push('t','b');
  if(!pool.length){scheduleKidCritter(1200);return;}
  const e=pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];
  window._kidLastCritterType='cat';
  kidCritterMountCatPeek(mount,vis,e,catScale,base,dur);
}
function syncKidCritterLoop(){clearKidCritterTimer();kidCritterClearAllTabMounts();window._kidLastCritterType=null;if(!useKidsLanguage()||!kidCritterMotionAllowed()||!kidCritterAppReady())return;scheduleKidCritter(kidCritterFirstDelayMs());}
function activeGoals(){return S.goals.filter(g=>(g.status||'active')==='active');}
function hasAnyActiveHabits(){return Array.isArray(S.habits)&&S.habits.some(h=>h.active&&!h.archived);}
function goalIsActive(g){return!!g&&(g.status||'active')==='active';}
function goalById(id){return S.goals.find(g=>g.id===id);}
function habitById(id){return S.habits.find(h=>h.id===id);}
let _uiScrollLockY=0;
function setUiScrollLock(on){const root=document.documentElement,b=document.body;if(!root||!b)return;if(on){if(root.classList.contains('ui-scroll-locked'))return;_uiScrollLockY=window.scrollY||window.pageYOffset||0;root.classList.add('ui-scroll-locked');b.classList.add('ui-scroll-locked');b.style.top='-'+_uiScrollLockY+'px';}else{if(!root.classList.contains('ui-scroll-locked'))return;root.classList.remove('ui-scroll-locked');b.classList.remove('ui-scroll-locked');b.style.top='';window.scrollTo(0,_uiScrollLockY||0);_uiScrollLockY=0;}}function appScrollIntoView(el,opts){if(!el)return;const locked=document.documentElement.classList.contains('ui-scroll-locked');const base=opts||{block:'center',behavior:'smooth'};if(locked){document.documentElement.classList.remove('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.classList.remove('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.style.top='';window.scrollTo(0,_uiScrollLockY||0);const instant=Object.assign({},base,{behavior:'auto'});el.scrollIntoView(instant);requestAnimationFrame(()=>{_uiScrollLockY=window.scrollY||window.pageYOffset||0;document.documentElement.classList.add('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.classList.add('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.style.top='-'+_uiScrollLockY+'px';});}else{el.scrollIntoView(base);}}

function syncOnboardingKidCopy(){
  try{
    const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
    const W=kid?ONBOARDING_WIZARD_COPY.kid:ONBOARDING_WIZARD_COPY.adult;
    const I=kid?ONBOARDING_INTRO_COPY.kid:ONBOARDING_INTRO_COPY.adult;
    const bs=document.getElementById('setupWizardBrandSub');if(bs)bs.textContent=W.brandSub;
    const t0=document.getElementById('wizStep0Title');if(t0)t0.textContent=W.step0.title;
    const s0=document.getElementById('wizStep0Sub');if(s0)s0.textContent=W.step0.sub;
    const t1=document.getElementById('wizStep1Title');if(t1)t1.textContent=W.step1.title;
    const s1=document.getElementById('wizStep1Sub');if(s1)s1.textContent=W.step1.sub;
    const ln=document.getElementById('lblSetupName');if(ln)ln.textContent=W.step1.lblName;
    const ld=document.getElementById('lblSetupDob');if(ld)ld.textContent=W.step1.lblDob;
    const ls=document.getElementById('lblSetupDate');if(ls)ls.textContent=W.step1.lblStart;
    const t2=document.getElementById('wizStep2Title');if(t2)t2.textContent=W.step2.title;
    const n2=document.getElementById('wizStep2Note');if(n2){n2.textContent=W.step2.note||'';n2.style.display=W.step2.note?'':'none';}
    const ibt=document.getElementById('introBrandTitle');if(ibt)ibt.textContent=I.brandTitle;
    const ibs=document.getElementById('introBrandSub');if(ibs)ibs.textContent=I.brandSub;
    I.steps.forEach((st,idx)=>{
      const h=document.getElementById('introStep'+idx+'Title');
      const b=document.getElementById('introStep'+idx+'Body');
      if(h)h.textContent=st.title;
      if(b)b.innerHTML=st.html;
    });
  }catch(e){}
  if(document.getElementById('mHabit')?.classList.contains('open'))syncHabitReminderKidsVisibility();
}

function showWizardStep(n){ensureWizardProgressDots();_onboardWizardStep=Math.max(0,Math.min(ONBOARD_WIZARD_STEP_COUNT-1,n));document.querySelectorAll('#setupWizardRoot .onboarding-wizard-pane').forEach(p=>{const i=parseInt(p.getAttribute('data-wizard-step'),10);const on=i===_onboardWizardStep;p.classList.toggle('is-active',on);p.hidden=!on;p.setAttribute('aria-hidden',on?'false':'true');});document.querySelectorAll('#setupWizardProgress .onboarding-progress-dot').forEach((d,i)=>{d.classList.toggle('is-active',i===_onboardWizardStep);d.classList.toggle('is-done',i<_onboardWizardStep);});const pr=document.getElementById('setupWizardProgress');if(pr)pr.setAttribute('aria-label','Setup step '+(_onboardWizardStep+1)+' of '+ONBOARD_WIZARD_STEP_COUNT);const back=document.getElementById('setupWizardBack'),next=document.getElementById('setupWizardNext');if(back){back.style.visibility=_onboardWizardStep===0?'hidden':'visible';back.disabled=false;}if(next)next.textContent=_onboardWizardStep===ONBOARD_WIZARD_STEP_COUNT-1?'Continue':'Next';if(_onboardWizardStep===1){if(typeof syncSetupNameRowVisibility==='function')syncSetupNameRowVisibility();mountSetupAvatarSwatches();}if(_onboardWizardStep===ONBOARD_WIZARD_STEP_COUNT-1)mountSetupPaletteGrid();try{sessionStorage.setItem(onboardingSessionKeyWizard(),String(_onboardWizardStep));}catch(e){}requestAnimationFrame(()=>{const pane=document.querySelector('#setupWizardRoot .onboarding-wizard-pane.is-active');if(!pane)return;const cand=[...pane.querySelectorAll('input,.btn-primary')].filter(el=>{if(el.type==='hidden')return false;const h=el.closest('[hidden]');return!h;});const fe=cand.find(el=>el.getAttribute('aria-hidden')!=='true');if(fe&&typeof fe.focus==='function')fe.focus();});}

function guidedTourDimClipPathForHole(){return'polygon(0 0,100% 0,100% 100%,0 100%)';}
function windowScrollY(){const w=window.pageYOffset;if(typeof w==='number'&&!isNaN(w))return w;const d=document.documentElement;if(d){const t=d.scrollTop;if(typeof t==='number'&&!isNaN(t))return t;}const b=document.body;if(b){const t=b.scrollTop;if(typeof t==='number'&&!isNaN(t))return t;}return 0;}
function windowScrollToY(y){const max=Math.max(0,Math.max((document.documentElement&&document.documentElement.scrollHeight)||0,(document.body&&document.body.scrollHeight)||0)-window.innerHeight);const t=Math.max(0,Math.min(Number(y)||0,max));try{window.scrollTo({top:t,left:0,behavior:'auto'});}catch(e){window.scrollTo(0,t);}if(document.documentElement)document.documentElement.scrollTop=t;if(document.body)document.body.scrollTop=t;}
function guidedTourScrollToStartBelowChrome(el){if(!el)return;const apply=()=>{const locked=document.documentElement.classList.contains('ui-scroll-locked');if(locked){document.documentElement.classList.remove('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.classList.remove('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.style.top='';window.scrollTo(0,_uiScrollLockY||0);}const root=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);let topbar=parseFloat(root.getPropertyValue('--topbar-sticky-offset'))||78;if(!Number.isFinite(topbar))topbar=78;const pad=12;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();let y=windowScrollY()+r.top-topbar-pad;if(!Number.isFinite(y))y=0;y=Math.max(0,y);windowScrollToY(y);if(locked){requestAnimationFrame(()=>{_uiScrollLockY=windowScrollY();document.documentElement.classList.add('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.classList.add('ui-scroll-locked');document.body.style.top='-'+_uiScrollLockY+'px';});}};requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(apply));}
function guidedTourScrollToTarget(el,step){if(!el)return;try{if(step&&step.scrollBlock==='start'){guidedTourScrollToStartBelowChrome(el);}else{appScrollIntoView(el,{block:(step&&step.scrollBlock)||'center',behavior:'smooth',inline:'nearest'});}}catch(e){}}

function renderGuidedTourStep(){const step=getGuidedTourSteps()[_guidedTourStepIdx];if(!step){finishGuidedTour();return;}if(guidedTourActive())S.offset=0;if(typeof step.prep==='function')step.prep();if(step.refreshDashboard)renderDashboard();requestAnimationFrame(()=>{clearGuidedTourTargetHighlight();if(guidedTourActive())S.offset=0;const anchor=document.querySelector(step.sel);const spotEl=step.spotSel?document.querySelector(step.spotSel):null;const el=spotEl||anchor;const scrollTarget=spotEl||anchor;const tEl=document.getElementById('guidedTourTitle'),bEl=document.getElementById('guidedTourBody'),nEl=document.getElementById('guidedTourNextBtn'),bkEl=document.getElementById('guidedTourBackBtn');if(tEl)tEl.textContent=step.title;if(bEl)bEl.textContent=step.body;if(nEl)nEl.textContent=_guidedTourStepIdx>=getGuidedTourSteps().length-1?'Done':'Next';if(bkEl)bkEl.style.visibility=_guidedTourStepIdx===0?'hidden':'visible';if(!anchor){const dm=document.getElementById('guidedTourDim');if(dm)dm.style.clipPath='polygon(0 0,100% 0,100% 100%,0 100%)';_guidedTourStepIdx++;renderGuidedTourStep();return;}el.classList.add('guided-tour-highlight');_guidedTourHighlightEl=el;try{const cs=getComputedStyle(scrollTarget);const pos=cs.position||'';const stickyLike=(pos==='fixed'||pos==='sticky');const noScroll=!!step.noAutoScroll||stickyLike;if(!noScroll)guidedTourScrollToTarget(scrollTarget,step);}catch(e){}setTimeout(()=>positionGuidedTourSpot(),280);if(step.spotTight)setTimeout(()=>positionGuidedTourSpot(),480);if(step.scrollBlock==='start'){const rq=()=>{const st=getGuidedTourSteps()[_guidedTourStepIdx];if(!st)return;const a=document.querySelector(st.sel);const sp=st.spotSel?document.querySelector(st.spotSel):null;const e=sp||a;if(e)guidedTourScrollToTarget(e,st);};setTimeout(rq,260);setTimeout(rq,560);setTimeout(rq,900);}positionGuidedTourSpot();});}
function onGuidedTourBack(){if(_guidedTourStepIdx<=0)return;_guidedTourStepIdx--;renderGuidedTourStep();}
function onGuidedTourPrimary(){const steps=getGuidedTourSteps();const cur=steps[_guidedTourStepIdx];if(cur&&cur.requireGoals&&activeGoals().length===0){const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();alert(kid?'Add a goal first — open Manage and tap + Goal.':'Add a goal first — open Manage and tap + Goal.');return;}if(_guidedTourStepIdx>=steps.length-1)finishGuidedTour();else{_guidedTourStepIdx++;renderGuidedTourStep();}}
function positionGuidedTourSpot(){const step=getGuidedTourSteps()[_guidedTourStepIdx];const spot=document.getElementById('guidedTourSpot');const dim=document.getElementById('guidedTourDim');if(!step||!spot)return;const anchor=document.querySelector(step.sel);const spotEl=step.spotSel?document.querySelector(step.spotSel):null;const el=spotEl||anchor;if(!el){spot.style.width='0';spot.style.height='0';spot.style.opacity='0';spot.classList.remove('guided-tour-spot--tight');if(dim)dim.style.clipPath='polygon(0 0,100% 0,100% 100%,0 100%)';return;}const tight=!!(step.spotTight&&spotEl);const pad=tight?2:3;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const t=Math.round(r.top-pad);const l=Math.round(r.left-pad);const w=Math.max(1,Math.round(r.width+pad*2));const h=Math.max(1,Math.round(r.height+pad*2));spot.style.opacity='1';spot.style.top=t+'px';spot.style.left=l+'px';spot.style.width=w+'px';spot.style.height=h+'px';if(tight){spot.classList.add('guided-tour-spot--tight');spot.style.borderRadius='';}else{spot.classList.remove('guided-tour-spot--tight');let br='var(--r-lg)';try{const cs=getComputedStyle(el);const bx=cs.borderRadius;if(bx&&bx!=='0px'&&bx!=='')br=bx;}catch(e){}spot.style.borderRadius=br;}if(dim)dim.style.clipPath=guidedTourDimClipPathForHole();}
function finishGuidedTour(){clearGuidedTourTargetHighlight();const m=document.getElementById('guidedTourMount');if(m)m.innerHTML='';if(_guidedTourResizeBound){window.removeEventListener('resize',_guidedTourResizeBound);_guidedTourResizeBound=null;}if(_guidedTourSavedOffset!==null){S.offset=_guidedTourSavedOffset;_guidedTourSavedOffset=null;}initDashInsightCarousel();S.user.guideSeen=true;save();const fs=_guidedTourFromSettings;_guidedTourFromSettings=false;syncUiScrollLock();if(document.getElementById('tab-tracker')?.classList.contains('active'))renderTracker();if(fs&&_settingsReopenTab){const t=_settingsReopenTab;_settingsReopenTab=null;openM('mSettings');setSettingsTab(t);}maybeScheduleWhatsNewVersionModal();maybeScheduleWhatsNewFloat();}

function pickHabitTier(v){const sel=document.getElementById('hTier');if(!sel)return;const tier=v==='growth'?'growth':'core';if(tier==='growth'){const groBtn=document.getElementById('hTierToggleGrowth');if(groBtn&&(groBtn.disabled||groBtn.hidden))return;}if(tier==='core'){const coreBtn=document.getElementById('hTierToggleCore');if(coreBtn&&coreBtn.disabled)return;}if(sel.value===tier){syncHabitTierPickerUi();return;}sel.value=tier;onHabitTierChange();}
function syncHabitTierPickerUi(){const sel=document.getElementById('hTier');if(!sel)return;const v=sel.value||'core';const coreBtn=document.getElementById('hTierToggleCore');const groBtn=document.getElementById('hTierToggleGrowth');if(coreBtn){coreBtn.classList.toggle('is-active',v==='core');coreBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed',v==='core'?'true':'false');}if(groBtn){groBtn.classList.toggle('is-active',v==='growth');groBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed',v==='growth'?'true':'false');}}
const HABIT_TIER_TUTORIAL_COPY={adult:{title:'Habit Tiers: Core vs Growth',body:'<strong>Core</strong> — Every core habit must qualify in a week for that week to count as on track.<br><br><strong>Growth</strong> — Both core and growth habits add money to your pots at the end of the week when they qualify.<br><br><strong>Recovery mode</strong> — When your consistency % drops below the 80% floor, only core habits add to your pot until you recover (more on this later).'},kid:{title:'Pick your Tier: core or growth',body:'Core habits are the big “must-do” ones for a goal. After a week closes, every core habit for that goal needs to qualify so that week counts on your score circle and for your weekly treat.\n\nGrowth habits are extra helpful habits. When they qualify, they add jar money — but missing them never blocks the week from counting.\n\nRecovery means your rolling score dropped below the 80% floor. Then only core habits add jar money until your score climbs back — growth habits wait.\n\nAsk a grown-up to open Tips in Settings if you want the longer friendly guide.'}};

function showPotResetSupportFloat(entry){const el=document.getElementById('potResetFloat');if(!el||!entry)return;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const em=document.getElementById('prfEmoji');const tt=document.getElementById('prfTitle');const bd=document.getElementById('prfBody');const nm=String(entry.name||'Goal').replace(/</g,'');if(em)em.textContent=kid?'💙':'💙';if(tt)tt.textContent=kid?'Your jar had a setback':'Pot progress reset';if(bd)bd.textContent=kid?`Your score dipped again for “${nm}”. function flushPotResetSupportQueue(){if(!_potResetSupportQueue.length)return;if(adultWhatsNewVersionNotePending())return;if(typeof milestoneAnyOverlayActive==='function'&&milestoneAnyOverlayActive())return;const gcf=document.getElementById('goalCompleteFloat');if(gcf&&gcf.classList.contains('show'))return;const prf=document.getElementById('potResetFloat');if(prf&&prf.classList.contains('show'))return;if(document.querySelector('.overlay.open'))return;const next=_potResetSupportQueue.shift();if(next)showPotResetSupportFloat(next);}
function showGoalCompleteCelebration(goalSnap){
  const el=document.getElementById('goalCompleteFloat');
  if(!el)return;
  const emojiEl=document.getElementById('gcfEmoji');
  const titleEl=document.getElementById('gcfTitle');
  const bodyEl=document.getElementById('gcfBody');
  const em=(goalSnap&&String(goalSnap.emoji||'').trim())?String(goalSnap.emoji).trim().slice(0,8):'🎉';
  if(emojiEl)emojiEl.textContent=em;
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  const nm=goalSnap&&(goalSnap.name!=null)?String(goalSnap.name):'Goal';
  _goalCompleteFollowUp=null;
  _goalCompleteFloatKind=null;
  _goalCompletePotGoalId=null;
  _goalCompletePotConfirmed=false;
  _potCompleteGoalSnap=null;
  const act=document.getElementById('gcfActions');
  if(act){act.innerHTML='';act.hidden=true;}
  if(goalSnap&&goalSnap.kind==='pot'){
    const tgt=Number(goalSnap.target)||0;
    const pot=Number(goalSnap.pot)||0;
    const gid=goalSnap.goalId?String(goalSnap.goalId):'';
    _goalCompleteFloatKind='pot';
    _goalCompletePotGoalId=gid;
    _potCompleteGoalSnap={kind:'pot',goalId:gid,name:nm,emoji:goalSnap.emoji,target:tgt,pot:pot};
    if(titleEl)titleEl.textContent=kid?'You filled the jar!':'Savings target reached!';
    const gPot=goalSnap.goalId?goalById(String(goalSnap.goalId)):null;const potTxt=fmtGoalPotAmount(gPot,pot);const tgtTxt=fmtGoalPotAmount(gPot,tgt);if(bodyEl)bodyEl.textContent=kid?`Amazing — “${escDash(nm)}” hit ${potTxt} (goal ${tgtTxt}). What should we do with the habits on this goal?`:`“${escDash(nm)}” reached ${potTxt} toward your ${tgtTxt} target. Decide what happens to those habits — then Manage shows this goal under Past goals until you revisit it there.`;
    if(act){act.innerHTML=`<button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="potCompleteChooseBank()">${kid?'Park habits':'Send habits to Saved habits'}</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="potCompleteShowMovePicker()">${kid?'Move to another goal':'Move habits to another goal'}</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="potCompleteDecideLater()">${kid?'I will decide later':'I’ll decide later'}</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" style="margin-top:var(--s1)" onclick="openGoalsTabAfterPotCheck()">${kid?'Open Manage':'Open Manage'}</button>`;act.hidden=false;}
  }else{
    _goalCompleteFollowUp=(goalSnap&&goalSnap.kind==='completed')?goalSnap:null;
    if(titleEl)titleEl.textContent=kid?'You filled this jar!':'You filled this jar';
    if(bodyEl)bodyEl.textContent=kid?`${nm} is done — habits rest in Saved habits until you recycle them.`:`${nm} is complete. Habits land in Saved habits; jar math and locked weeks stay honest.`;
  }
  el.hidden=false;
  requestAnimationFrame(()=>el.classList.add('show'));
}
function potCompleteDecideLater(){hideGoalCompleteCelebration();}
function potCompleteChooseBank(){const gid=_goalCompletePotGoalId;if(!gid)return;const g=goalById(gid);if(!g)return;const list=S.habits.filter(h=>h.goalId===gid&&h.active);const meta={originGoalId:gid,bankedFromGoalName:g.name};bankHabitsListSequential(list,meta,function(){applyGoalMarkedCompletedFromPot(g);_goalCompletePotConfirmed=true;if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync('edit');save();hideGoalCompleteCelebration();renderAll();});}

function potCompleteApplyMove(){const gid=_goalCompletePotGoalId;if(!gid)return;const sel=document.getElementById('potCompleteMoveSel');const toGid=sel?String(sel.value||''):'';if(!toGid)return;const src=goalById(gid);if(!src)return;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const habits=S.habits.filter(h=>h.goalId===gid&&h.active);for(let i=0;i<habits.length;i++){if(habitFrozenForRetether(habits[i])){alert(kid?'One of these habits is still on cooldown — try again later.':'A habit on this goal is still on structure cooldown.');return;}}if(!confirm(kid?'Move every habit to the other goal?':'Move every habit on this goal to the selected goal?'))return;if(!confirm(kid?'Really move? Cool-downs start for those habits.':'Second confirm: structure cooldowns apply to each moved habit.'))return;const now=Date.now();habits.forEach(function(h){h.goalId=toGid;h.lastHabitGoalChangeAt=now;bumpHabitStructureCooldownFromNow(h,habitCooldownLongMsForProfile());});applyGoalMarkedCompletedFromPot(src);_goalCompletePotConfirmed=true;if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync('edit');save();hideGoalCompleteCelebration();renderAll();}
function applyGoalMarkedCompletedFromPot(g){if(!g)return;g.status='completed';g.goalCompletedTrackedWeeks=snapshotGoalCompletedWeeksCount(g);g.goalCompletedAt=Date.now();g.potTargetCelebrationShown=true;g.potTargetCelebrationSnoozeUntil=0;}
function openPotCompletionFromDashboard(gid){const g=goalById(gid);if(!g||g.status!=='active')return;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const t=Number(g.target)||0;if(t<=0){alert(kid?'This goal needs a savings target first.':'Add a savings target to this goal in the editor first.');return;}const pot=computeGoalPotTotalForGoal(g);if(pot<t){alert(kid?'Not quite there yet — the jar has to reach the target first.':'The pot has not reached the target yet.');return;}showGoalCompleteCelebration({kind:'pot',goalId:g.id,name:g.name,emoji:g.emoji,target:t,pot:pot});}

function bindOldGoalsSwipeHandlers(root){if(!root||root.dataset.oldGoalSwipeBound)return;root.dataset.oldGoalSwipeBound='1';const SW=72;let capRow=null,ptrId=null,inner=null,startX=0,drag=false;root.addEventListener('pointerdown',function(e){const row=e.target.closest('[data-old-goal-swipe]');if(!row)return;if(e.target.closest('button,a'))return;capRow=row;inner=row.querySelector('.old-goal-swipe__inner');if(!inner)return;startX=e.clientX;drag=true;ptrId=e.pointerId;try{row.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){}});root.addEventListener('pointermove',function(e){if(!drag||e.pointerId!==ptrId||!inner)return;const dx=e.clientX-startX;if(dx>0)inner.style.transform='translateX('+Math.min(dx,SW)+'px)';else inner.style.transform='translateX(0)';},{passive:true});root.addEventListener('pointerup',function(e){if(!drag||e.pointerId!==ptrId)return;drag=false;if(inner){const dx=e.clientX-startX;if(dx>36)inner.style.transform='translateX('+SW+'px)';else inner.style.transform='translateX(0)';}try{if(capRow&&ptrId!=null)capRow.releasePointerCapture(ptrId);}catch(_){}ptrId=null;inner=null;capRow=null;});root.addEventListener('pointercancel',function(){if(!drag)return;drag=false;if(inner)inner.style.transform='translateX(0)';ptrId=null;inner=null;capRow=null;});}
function scheduleNextGoalAfterCompleteFlow(fu){
  const ids=Array.isArray(fu.bankedHabitIds)?fu.bankedHabitIds.filter(Boolean):[];
  const nm=String(fu.name||'').trim()||'Goal';
  setTimeout(()=>{
    if(typeof milestoneAnyOverlayActive==='function'&&milestoneAnyOverlayActive()){maybeScheduleWhatsNewVersionModal();maybeScheduleLegendaryReFloat();maybeScheduleWhatsNewFloat();return;}
    const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
    const adultSteps3=[
      {title:'Archive recap',html:`<p>You confirmed the archive-all sweep — habits from this goal are in <strong>Saved habits</strong> until you revive them.</p><p>Goal completions always confirm twice so the flow never catches you off guard.</p>`},
      {title:'What’s next?',html:`<p><strong>${escDash(nm)}</strong> is complete. Locked ISO weeks and consistency history stay untouched.</p><p>Add another goal anytime — Saved habits reunite instantly after you save.</p>`},
      {title:'Create your next goal',html:`<p>Open the goal editor, save your new goal, and the habits you archived will reattach automatically (locked weeks still honour their saved tiers).</p>`}
    ];
    startMilestoneStepper({
      steps:ids.length?(
        kid?[
          {title:'You finished a goal!',html:`<p>You completed <strong>${escDash(nm)}</strong>. Your week history stays exactly as you left it.</p><p>Let’s aim at something new next.</p>`},
          {title:'New goal',html:`<p>Tap below to add your next goal. When you save it, we reconnect your Saved habits to that goal automatically.</p>`}
        ]:adultSteps3
      ):(
        kid?[
          {title:'You finished a goal!',html:`<p>You completed <strong>${escDash(nm)}</strong>.</p><p>Add your next goal when you are ready.</p>`}
        ]:[
          {title:'What’s next?',html:`<p><strong>${escDash(nm)}</strong> is complete.</p><p>Create your next goal to keep momentum.</p>`}
        ]
      ),
      finishLabel:kid?'Add goal':'Open goal editor',
      onFinish:function(){
        _pendingBankedHabitIdsForNewGoal=ids.slice();
        openGoalModal();
        maybeScheduleWhatsNewVersionModal();
        maybeScheduleLegendaryReFloat();
        maybeScheduleWhatsNewFloat();
      }
    });
  },480);
}

function legendaryReFloatActive(){const el=document.getElementById('legendaryReFloat');return !!(el&&!el.hidden&&el.classList.contains('show'));}
function hideLegendaryReFloatUi(){const el=document.getElementById('legendaryReFloat');if(el){el.classList.remove('show');setTimeout(()=>{if(el)el.hidden=true;},420);}_legendaryFloatHabitId=null;}
function dismissLegendaryReFloat(snooze){if(snooze&&_legendaryFloatHabitId){const h=habitById(_legendaryFloatHabitId);if(h)h.masteryReactivationSnoozeUntil=new Date(Date.now()+LEGENDARY_SNOOZE_MS).toISOString();save();}hideLegendaryReFloatUi();maybeScheduleLegendaryReFloat();}
function acceptLegendaryReactivationFromFloat(){const id=_legendaryFloatHabitId;hideLegendaryReFloatUi();if(!id)return;const h=habitById(id);if(!h)return;h.active=true;h.archived=false;h.tier='growth';h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked=true;if(!h.goalId)h.goalId='';delete h.masteryReactivationSnoozeUntil;h.habitLegendarySinceWeek=weekKey(0);delete h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs;h.habitStructureCooldownUntil=Date.now()+habitCooldownLongMsForProfile();save();renderAll();maybeScheduleLegendaryReFloat();}
function legendaryReFloatShouldDefer(){if(!S||!S.user||!S.user.setupDone)return true;if(typeof isPremiumAccount==='function'&&!isPremiumAccount())return true;if(legendaryReFloatActive())return true;if(adultWhatsNewVersionNotePending())return true;if(typeof milestoneAnyOverlayActive==='function'&&milestoneAnyOverlayActive())return true;if(typeof milestoneCoachActive==='function'&&milestoneCoachActive())return true;if(document.getElementById('cookieConsentBar')?.classList.contains('show'))return true;if(document.querySelector('.overlay.open'))return true;const gcf=document.getElementById('goalCompleteFloat');if(gcf&&gcf.classList.contains('show'))return true;const prf=document.getElementById('potResetFloat');if(prf&&prf.classList.contains('show'))return true;const wn=document.getElementById('whatsNewFloat');if(wn&&wn.classList.contains('show'))return true;return false;}
function tryShowLegendaryReFloat(){if(legendaryReFloatShouldDefer())return false;const c=findLegendaryPromptCandidate();if(!c)return false;const h=c.h;const next=c.nextTier;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const tierName=habitMasteryLevelName(next)||('Level '+next);const el=document.getElementById('legendaryReFloat');if(!el)return false;_legendaryFloatHabitId=h.id;const kicker=document.getElementById('lrfKicker');const tit=document.getElementById('lrfTitle');const body=document.getElementById('lrfBody');if(kicker)kicker.textContent=kid?'Big milestone':'Legendary maintenance';if(tit)tit.textContent=kid?`Time for ${h.title}?`:`${h.title} — ready for ${tierName}`;if(body)body.textContent=kid?`It has been a long rest since you mastered this habit. Tap to bring it back in Growth tier and earn “${tierName}” — a prize for keeping it for life.`:`It has been long enough since your last mastery milestone. Reactivate in Growth tier (Core stays locked), hit your day targets again over the calendar windows, and earn ${tierName} — maintenance, not starting over.`;el.hidden=false;requestAnimationFrame(()=>el.classList.add('show'));return true;}
function maybeScheduleLegendaryReFloat(){if(!S||!S.user||!S.user.setupDone)return;if(_legendaryReTimer){clearTimeout(_legendaryReTimer);_legendaryReTimer=null;}let tries=0;const step=function(){_legendaryReTimer=null;if(tryShowLegendaryReFloat())return;tries++;if(tries>=24)return;_legendaryReTimer=setTimeout(step,1000);};_legendaryReTimer=setTimeout(step,1100);}
function closeMilestoneStepper(){clearMilestoneStepperHighlight();if(_milestoneStepperResizeBound){window.removeEventListener('resize',_milestoneStepperResizeBound);window.removeEventListener('scroll',_milestoneStepperResizeBound,true);_milestoneStepperResizeBound=null;}const m=document.getElementById('milestoneStepperMount');if(m)m.innerHTML='';syncUiScrollLock();maybeScheduleWhatsNewVersionModal();maybeScheduleWhatsNewFloat();}
function closeMilestoneCoach(){const m=document.getElementById('milestoneCoachMount');if(m)m.innerHTML='';syncUiScrollLock();maybeScheduleWhatsNewVersionModal();maybeScheduleWhatsNewFloat();}
function renderMilestoneStepper(opts){const mount=document.getElementById('milestoneStepperMount');if(!mount)return;const idx=Math.max(0,Math.min((opts.steps||[]).length-1,opts.index||0));const st=opts.steps[idx];if(!st){if(typeof opts.onFinish==='function')opts.onFinish();closeMilestoneStepper();return;}const total=opts.steps.length;const last=idx>=total-1;const titleId='milestoneStepperTitle';const dotsHTML=total>1?Array.from({length:total},(_,i)=>'<span class="onboarding-progress-dot'+(i===idx?' is-active':(i<idx?' is-done':''))+'" aria-hidden="true"></span>').join(''):'';mount.innerHTML='<div id="milestoneStepperLayer" class="guided-tour-layer is-on" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="'+titleId+'"><div class="guided-tour-dim" id="milestoneStepperDim" style="opacity:1"></div><div class="guided-tour-spot" id="milestoneStepperSpot" style="opacity:0"></div><div class="guided-tour-card"><div class="onboarding-progress" aria-hidden="true" style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:var(--s2)">'+dotsHTML+'</div><h3 id="'+titleId+'"></h3><div id="milestoneStepperBody" class="milestone-pane-scroll"></div><div class="guided-tour-actions"><button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost" id="milestoneStepperBackBtn">Back</button><div class="guided-tour-actions-end"><button type="button" class="guided-tour-skip" id="milestoneStepperSkipBtn">Skip</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" id="milestoneStepperNextBtn"></button></div></div></div></div>';document.getElementById('milestoneStepperTitle').textContent=st.title||'';document.getElementById('milestoneStepperBody').innerHTML=st.html||'';document.getElementById('milestoneStepperBackBtn').style.visibility=idx===0?'hidden':'visible';document.getElementById('milestoneStepperNextBtn').textContent=last?(opts.finishLabel||'Got it'):'Next';document.getElementById('milestoneStepperSkipBtn').textContent=opts.skipLabel||'Skip';const finish=function(){if(typeof opts.onFinish==='function'){try{opts.onFinish();}catch(e){}}closeMilestoneStepper();};document.getElementById('milestoneStepperSkipBtn').onclick=finish;document.getElementById('milestoneStepperDim').onclick=function(){if(opts.dismissOnDim===false)return;finish();};document.getElementById('milestoneStepperBackBtn').onclick=function(){renderMilestoneStepper(Object.assign({},opts,{index:Math.max(0,idx-1)}));};document.getElementById('milestoneStepperNextBtn').onclick=function(){if(last){finish();}else{renderMilestoneStepper(Object.assign({},opts,{index:idx+1}));}};syncUiScrollLock();requestAnimationFrame(()=>{const b=document.getElementById('milestoneStepperNextBtn');if(b)try{b.focus();}catch(e){}});clearMilestoneStepperHighlight();if(_milestoneStepperResizeBound){window.removeEventListener('resize',_milestoneStepperResizeBound);window.removeEventListener('scroll',_milestoneStepperResizeBound,true);_milestoneStepperResizeBound=null;}if(st.targetSel){requestAnimationFrame(()=>{const el=document.querySelector(st.targetSel);if(el){try{el.scrollIntoView({block:'center',behavior:'smooth'});}catch(e){}el.classList.add('guided-tour-highlight');_milestoneStepperHighlightEl=el;positionMilestoneStepperSpot(st.targetSel);setTimeout(()=>positionMilestoneStepperSpot(st.targetSel),360);}});_milestoneStepperResizeBound=function(){positionMilestoneStepperSpot(st.targetSel);};window.addEventListener('resize',_milestoneStepperResizeBound);window.addEventListener('scroll',_milestoneStepperResizeBound,true);}}
function startMilestoneStepper(opts){if(!opts||!opts.steps||!opts.steps.length)return;if(milestoneStepperActive())closeMilestoneStepper();renderMilestoneStepper(Object.assign({index:0},opts));}
function startMilestoneCoach(opts){const mount=document.getElementById('milestoneCoachMount');if(!mount)return;if(milestoneCoachActive())closeMilestoneCoach();const titleId='milestoneCoachTitle';const finish=function(reason){if(typeof opts.onFinish==='function'){try{opts.onFinish(reason||'done');}catch(e){}}closeMilestoneCoach();};mount.innerHTML='<div id="milestoneCoachLayer" class="milestone-coach-host" role="dialog" aria-modal="false" aria-labelledby="'+titleId+'"><h3 id="'+titleId+'"></h3><p id="milestoneCoachBody"></p><div class="milestone-coach-actions"><button type="button" class="guided-tour-skip" id="milestoneCoachDismissBtn">'+(opts.dismissLabel||'Skip')+'</button>'+(opts.primaryLabel?'<button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" id="milestoneCoachPrimaryBtn">'+opts.primaryLabel+'</button>':'')+'</div></div>';document.getElementById('milestoneCoachTitle').textContent=opts.title||'';document.getElementById('milestoneCoachBody').innerHTML=opts.html||'';document.getElementById('milestoneCoachDismissBtn').onclick=function(){finish('dismiss');};const pb=document.getElementById('milestoneCoachPrimaryBtn');if(pb)pb.onclick=function(){if(typeof opts.onPrimary==='function'){try{opts.onPrimary();}catch(e){}}finish('primary');};syncUiScrollLock();}
function pulseElementForMilestone(el){if(!el)return;el.classList.add('milestone-flash-pulse');setTimeout(()=>{try{el.classList.remove('milestone-flash-pulse');}catch(e){}},1600);}

/* ---- Deferred consistency-disc / 80% rule teaching ---- */
function consistencyTeachConditionsMet(){if(!S||!S.user||!S.user.setupDone)return false;if(S.user.consistencyDiscRuleTaughtSeen)return false;const goals=activeGoals();if(!goals.length)return false;let closed=0;goals.forEach(g=>{const st=goalStats(g);if(st&&typeof st.weeksAllTime==='number')closed=Math.max(closed,st.weeksAllTime);else if(st&&typeof st.weeks==='number')closed=Math.max(closed,st.weeks);});return closed>=2;}
function maybeStartConsistencyRuleDeferred(){if(!consistencyTeachConditionsMet())return;if(milestoneAnyOverlayActive())return;startConsistencyDiscTourFromSettings();S.user.consistencyDiscRuleTaughtSeen=true;save();}
/* ---- Replay entries from Help ---- */

let _guideGridAdultHTML='';const GUIDE_GRID_KID_HTML=`<div class="guide-block"><strong>Consistency</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">This app helps you build habits with tiny rewards and a savings jar toward something you want. It should feel friendly, not scary. Ask a grown-up if anything is confusing.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Goals</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">A goal is something big you are saving for. Each goal has its own habits, score circle, and jar total. The <strong>% on the circle</strong> is your rolling score — good closed weeks out of <strong>all</strong> counted weeks you log. It does not include the week you are still filling in. <strong>This week</strong> shows in the Log and on the dashboard snapshot.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Habits</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Habits belong to one goal and need enough check-ins each week. <strong>Core</strong> habits decide if the week “counts” for your score. <strong>Growth</strong> habits add jar money when they qualify — except in recovery (below your floor), when only core adds money until your score recovers. If you start a habit mid-week, the app scales the target fairly.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Weeks & logging</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Weeks run <strong>Monday–Sunday</strong>. Each week’s tracker <strong>locks at midnight Sunday</strong> (local time). If a grown-up allows notifications on the device, Sunday nudges help you finish logging before then.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Tiers (core & growth)</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px"><strong>Normal weeks:</strong> Core habits are the must-dos — when a week finishes, every core habit for that goal needs to qualify so the week counts on your score and for your weekly treat. Growth habits add jar money when you do them, but they never block the week.<br><br><strong>Recovery</strong> (when your rolling score is below the <strong>80% floor</strong>): only core habits add jar money; growth adds £0 until your score climbs back.<br><br><strong>First time you add a habit,</strong> a little spotlight sits on <strong>Tier</strong> and explains core vs growth in words meant for kids.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Rewards and pot</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">When habits qualify, a set amount (like £30) goes into a savings pot toward your goal — a promise to fund it for real. While you are below your floor (recovery), only core habits add to the jar; growth waits until your score recovers. A grown-up helps with the money part.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Habit bank</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">When a goal is done, its habits rest here until you attach them to a new goal.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>What if the score drops below the floor?</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Each goal has a floor (often 80%). If your rolling score goes below it, you enter <strong>recovery</strong>: you still log habits; only core habits add jar money, and growth adds £0 until your score is back at the floor. A <strong>strict drop</strong> in the score can reset the jar — ties are not drops. Ask a grown-up to read Tips for the full rules.</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Profiles & settings</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Under <strong>Settings → Account</strong>, the <strong>Profile</strong> section at the top: tap a bubble to switch people, <strong>+</strong> to add, <strong>Rename</strong> for name and colour, or <strong>Delete this profile…</strong> when there is more than one. <strong>This profile</strong> below that has your name, bubble colour, birthday, and animations. Then <strong>Sign-in &amp; sync</strong> is for grown-ups to sign in and optional <strong>cloud sync</strong>. <strong>Settings → Appearance</strong> is only <strong>Pick your theme</strong>. <strong>Advanced</strong> has <strong>Revert to yesterday</strong> and <strong>Revert to 2 days ago</strong> after syncing — ask a grown-up before restoring. There is also a <strong>manual</strong> backup file; <strong>import</strong> only adds new profile copies. The last tab, <strong>About</strong>, is a short blurb. Tapping your name in the header opens avatars only (same as Profile, without add/rename/delete).</div></div><div class="guide-block"><strong>Cool facts</strong><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:8px">Fun facts about habits and brains pop up when you earn them — for example when you add a habit, when you finish the first-time <strong>Tier</strong> guide (you unlock “Core and growth habits”), or when you hit milestones. A short line can show under <strong>Your Goals</strong>. The counter opens your collection. Tap <strong>OK</strong> to close; another may wait in line. Longer explanations live in <strong>Settings → Help → Tips</strong>.</div></div>`;

let _profileSwitchAudioCtx=null;
function playProfileSwitchSound(){try{const AC=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext;if(!AC)return;if(!_profileSwitchAudioCtx)_profileSwitchAudioCtx=new AC();const ctx=_profileSwitchAudioCtx;if(ctx.state==='suspended')void ctx.resume();const t=ctx.currentTime;const osc=ctx.createOscillator();const g=ctx.createGain();osc.type='sine';osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(440,t);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,t);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.09,t+0.012);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0008,t+0.072);osc.connect(g);g.connect(ctx.destination);osc.start(t);osc.stop(t+0.08);}catch(_){}}

function toggleGoalEmojiPicker(ev){if(ev)ev.stopPropagation();closeEmojiPicker();const w=document.getElementById('goalEmojiPickerPopover'),btn=document.getElementById('gEmojiTrigger');if(!w||!btn)return;if(!w.dataset.built){w.innerHTML=buildGoalEmojiPopoverInner();w.dataset.built='1';w.addEventListener('click',e=>e.stopPropagation());w.addEventListener('click',e=>{const opt=e.target.closest('.emoji-option[data-emoji]');if(!opt)return;try{pickGoalEmoji(decodeURIComponent(opt.getAttribute('data-emoji')));}catch(_){}});}else if(!w.querySelector('.emoji-grid--goal')){w.innerHTML=buildGoalEmojiPopoverInner();}if(!w.hidden){closeGoalEmojiPicker();return;}syncGoalEmojiSelection();w.hidden=false;w.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');requestAnimationFrame(()=>{const r=btn.getBoundingClientRect(),pw=w.offsetWidth||400,ph=w.offsetHeight||280;let left=r.right+8,top=r.top;if(left+pw>window.innerWidth-8)left=Math.max(8,r.left-pw-8);if(top+ph>window.innerHeight-8)top=Math.max(8,window.innerHeight-ph-8);w.style.left=left+'px';w.style.top=top+'px';});}
function bindEmojiPickerOutsideClose(){if(window._emojiOutsideBound)return;window._emojiOutsideBound=1;document.addEventListener('mousedown',e=>{const w=document.getElementById('emojiPickerPopover');if(w&&!w.hidden){if(!w.contains(e.target)&&!(e.target.closest&&e.target.closest('#hEmojiTrigger')))closeEmojiPicker();}const gw=document.getElementById('goalEmojiPickerPopover');if(gw&&!gw.hidden){if(!gw.contains(e.target)&&!(e.target.closest&&e.target.closest('#gEmojiTrigger')))closeGoalEmojiPicker();}});}
function buildHabitPresetPickerHTML(filterQuery){const lib=habitPresetLibraryActive().filter(p=>p.key!=='custom'&&habitPresetMatchesFilter(p,filterQuery));const byCat=new Map();lib.forEach(p=>{const c=p.category||'other';if(!byCat.has(c))byCat.set(c,[]);byCat.get(c).push(p);});const gmUnlocked=growthMechanicsUnlockedForUi();const tierBadge=p=>{if(gmUnlocked)return '';const t=String((p&&p.tier)||'core');return t==='growth'?' <span class="habit-preset-tier-badge" aria-hidden="true">Core first</span>':'';};let html='';const catOpen=true;const addCat=cat=>{const items=byCat.get(cat);if(!items||!items.length)return;const lab=HABIT_PRESET_CATEGORY_LABELS[cat]||HABIT_PRESET_CATEGORY_LABELS.other;html+=`<details class="habit-preset-cat"${catOpen?' open':''} title="Tap to fold or unfold"><summary class="habit-preset-cat-summary"><span>${escHTML(lab)}</span><span class="habit-preset-cat-toggle" aria-hidden="true">▼</span></summary><div class="habit-preset-cat-body">`;[...items].sort((a,b)=>String(a.label).localeCompare(String(b.label))).forEach(p=>{html+=`<button type="button" class="habit-preset-option" data-preset-key="${escAttr(p.key)}" role="option" aria-selected="false"><span class="habit-preset-emoji" aria-hidden="true">${escHTML(p.emoji||'🎯')}</span><span class="habit-preset-label">${escHTML(p.label)}${tierBadge(p)}</span></button>`;});html+='</div></details>';};HABIT_PRESET_CATEGORY_ORDER.forEach(addCat);[...byCat.keys()].filter(k=>!HABIT_PRESET_CATEGORY_ORDER.includes(k)).sort().forEach(addCat);const kid=useKidsLanguage();const cantTxt=kid?'Can\u2019t find yours here?':'Can\u2019t find your habit?';const customLabel=kid?'My own habit':'Create custom habit';const customHint=kid?'Fill in everything yourself':'Opens all fields incl. Weekly savings';html+=`<div class="habit-preset-custom-slot"><p class="habit-preset-secondary-hint">${escHTML(cantTxt)}</p><button type="button" class="habit-preset-option habit-preset-option--custom" data-preset-key="custom" role="option" aria-selected="false"><span class="habit-preset-emoji" aria-hidden="true">🎯</span><span class="habit-preset-option-text"><span class="habit-preset-label">${escHTML(customLabel)}</span><span class="habit-preset-hint">${escHTML(customHint)}</span></span></button></div>`;return html;}
function refreshHabitPresetPickerFilter(){const pp=document.getElementById('hPresetPicker');if(!pp)return;delete pp.dataset.bound;pp.innerHTML=buildHabitPresetPickerHTML(getHabitPresetFilterQuery());bindHabitPresetPicker();syncHabitPresetPickerSelection();}
function bindHabitPresetSearchField(){const inp=document.getElementById('hPresetSearch');if(!inp||inp.dataset.filterBound)return;inp.dataset.filterBound='1';inp.addEventListener('input',function(){refreshHabitPresetPickerFilter();});}
function syncHabitPresetPickerSelection(){const key=document.getElementById('hPreset')?.value||'custom';document.querySelectorAll('#hPresetPicker .habit-preset-option[data-preset-key]').forEach(el=>{const sel=el.getAttribute('data-preset-key')===key;el.setAttribute('aria-selected',sel?'true':'false');el.classList.toggle('habit-preset-option--active',sel);});syncHabitPresetToggleLabel();}
function bindHabitPresetPicker(){const picker=document.getElementById('hPresetPicker');if(!picker||picker.dataset.bound)return;picker.dataset.bound='1';picker.addEventListener('click',e=>{const btn=e.target.closest('.habit-preset-option[data-preset-key]');if(!btn||!picker.contains(btn))return;e.preventDefault();const k=btn.getAttribute('data-preset-key');if(!k)return;if(k==='custom'&&!growthMechanicsUnlockedForUi()&&S&&S.user&&!S.user.customHabitInterstitialSeen){const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const proceed=function(){S.user.customHabitInterstitialSeen=true;save();onHabitPresetPicked('custom');syncGrowthTierEditorGating();};startMilestoneCoach({title:kid?'Your habit, your fields':'Before you customise',html:kid?'<p>Until your first qualifying week finishes for <strong>every active goal</strong>, new habits start as <strong>Core</strong>. That keeps the start fair — Growth opens right after.</p>':'<p>Early on, habits stay <strong>Core tier</strong> even when you jot your own titles. Growth unlocks after your first closed week where <strong>all active goals</strong> hit their weekly targets.</p>',primaryLabel:kid?'Let\u2019s go':'Continue',dismissLabel:kid?'Not now':'Later',onFinish:function(reason){if(reason==='primary')return;S.user.customHabitInterstitialSeen=true;save();},onPrimary:proceed});return;}onHabitPresetPicked(k);});}
function buildHabitCategorySelectOptions(){return HABIT_USER_CATEGORY_OPTIONS.map(o=>`<option value="${escAttr(o.v)}">${escHTML(o.l)}</option>`).join('');}
function syncHabitCustomCategoryField(){const fg=document.getElementById('hCustomCategoryFg');const sel=document.getElementById('hHabitCategory');if(!fg||!sel)return;if(sel.value==='__custom__'){fg.removeAttribute('hidden');}else{fg.setAttribute('hidden','');}}
function syncHabitCategoryVisibility(){const wrap=document.getElementById('hHabitCategoryWrap');const preset=document.getElementById('hPreset')?.value;if(!wrap)return;if(preset==='custom'){wrap.removeAttribute('hidden');syncHabitCustomCategoryField();}else{wrap.setAttribute('hidden','');document.getElementById('hCustomCategoryFg')?.setAttribute('hidden','');}}
function hydrateHabitCategoryFromHabit(h){const sel=document.getElementById('hHabitCategory');const customInp=document.getElementById('hCustomCategory');if(!sel)return;const known=habitCategoryKnownSlugs();const raw=String(h&&h.category||'').trim();const norm=normalizeHabitCategorySlug(raw);const slug=norm&&known.has(norm)?norm:'';if(slug){sel.value=slug;if(customInp)customInp.value='';}else if(raw){sel.value='__custom__';if(customInp)customInp.value=raw;}else{sel.value='self_care';if(customInp)customInp.value='';}syncHabitCustomCategoryField();}
function populateUI(){
  const hCat=document.getElementById('hHabitCategory');if(hCat)hCat.innerHTML=buildHabitCategorySelectOptions();
  const pp=document.getElementById('hPresetPicker');if(pp){delete pp.dataset.bound;pp.innerHTML=buildHabitPresetPickerHTML(getHabitPresetFilterQuery());bindHabitPresetPicker();}
  const gr=document.getElementById('gRewardPreset');if(gr)populateGoalRewardPresets();
  mountSettingsCurrencySelect();syncCurrencyFormLabels();
  bindEmojiPickerOutsideClose();
  bindAvatarBubblePickerOutsideClose();
  bindHabitPresetPickerOutsideClose();
  bindHabitMetricPickerOutsideClose();
}
function pickEmoji(e){if(e==null)return;document.getElementById('hEmoji').value=String(e);syncEmojiTriggerDisplay();syncEmojiSelection();closeEmojiPicker();refreshHabitEditorSummary();}

function syncEmojiSelection(){const current=document.getElementById('hEmoji').value.trim();const enc=encodeURIComponent(current);document.querySelectorAll('#emojiPickerPopover .emoji-option').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.getAttribute('data-emoji')===enc));}
function syncGoalEmojiSelection(){const current=(document.getElementById('gEmoji')?.value||'').trim();const enc=encodeURIComponent(current);document.querySelectorAll('#goalEmojiPickerPopover .emoji-option').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.getAttribute('data-emoji')===enc));}
function ensureGoalOptions(id,blank=false){const el=document.getElementById(id);el.innerHTML=(blank?'<option value="">Select goal</option>':'')+activeGoals().map(g=>`<option value="${g.id}">${g.name}</option>`).join('');}
