function applyHabitPreset(){const key=document.getElementById('hPreset').value;if(!key)return;const preset=findHabitPresetByKey(key);const editingId=document.getElementById('habitId').value;if(!(key==='custom'&&editingId)){document.getElementById('hTitle').value=preset.title||'';document.getElementById('hEmoji').value=preset.emoji||'🎯';document.getElementById('hTier').value=preset.tier||'core';document.getElementById('hMetric').value=preset.metric||'days';document.getElementById('hThreshold').value=preset.threshold||5;document.getElementById('hPot').value=preset.pot||30;document.getElementById('hCustomUnit').value='';if(!editingId&&!growthMechanicsUnlockedForUi()&&String((preset&&preset.tier)||'')==='growth')document.getElementById('hTier').value='core';syncEmojiTriggerDisplay();syncEmojiSelection();onMetricChange();if(key==='custom'&&!editingId){const sel=document.getElementById('hHabitCategory');if(sel){sel.value='self_care';const cc=document.getElementById('hCustomCategory');if(cc)cc.value='';syncHabitCustomCategoryField();}}}else if(key==='custom'&&editingId){const h=habitById(editingId);if(h)hydrateHabitCategoryFromHabit(h);}syncHabitCategoryVisibility();refreshHabitEditorSummary();syncHabitPresetPickerSelection();applyHabitReminderDefaultsFromPreset(key==='custom'?(document.getElementById('hPresetOrigin')?.value||'custom'):key);syncGrowthMechanicsUnlockFromData();syncGrowthTierEditorGating();syncLegendaryHabitEditorTierLock();syncHabitPotFromGoal();syncHabitEditorCustomizeVisibility();}
function habitEditorPreviewFromFields(){const title=(document.getElementById('hTitle')?.value||'').trim()||'Untitled habit';const emoji=(document.getElementById('hEmoji')?.value||'').trim()||'🎯';const tier=document.getElementById('hTier')?.value||'core';const metric=document.getElementById('hMetric')?.value||'days';const thr=parseFloat(document.getElementById('hThreshold')?.value)||0;const custom=(document.getElementById('hCustomUnit')?.value||'').trim();const gid=document.getElementById('hGoal')?.value;const g=gid?goalById(gid):null;const h={title,emoji,tier,metric,threshold:thr,customUnit:custom,goalId:gid};const sub=(g?.name||'—')+' · '+metricLabel(h);return '<div class="manage-habit-card__grid"><div class="manage-habit-card__emoji-col">'+habitEmojiDisplayHTML(emoji)+'<span class="pill habit-log-tier-pill '+(tier==='core'?'pill-core':'pill-growth')+'">'+escHTML(String(tier||'').toUpperCase())+'</span></div><div class="manage-habit-card__main"><div class="manage-habit-card__top"><span class="goal-title">'+escDash(title)+'</span></div><div class="goal-sub">'+escDash(sub)+'</div></div></div>';}
function refreshHabitEditorSummary(){const root=document.getElementById('habitEditorSummary');if(!root)return;root.innerHTML=habitEditorPreviewFromFields();syncHabitPresetToggleLabel();}
function openGoalModal(id='',opts){opts=opts||{};if(!id&&!opts.skipGoalLimitGate){const n=activeGoals().length;if(n>=MAX_ACTIVE_GOALS){alert(typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage()?'You already have 3 active goals — finish or archive one before adding another.':'You already have 3 active goals. Archive or complete one before adding another.');return;}if(n===2){window._pendingOpenGoalAfterLimit=true;openM('mConfirmAddThirdGoal');return;}}closeGoalEmojiPicker();closeEmojiPicker();if(id)_pendingBankedHabitIdsForNewGoal=null;document.getElementById('goalId').value='';document.getElementById('goalModalTitle').textContent=id?'Edit goal':'Add goal';setGoalRewardDraft('');const gEmojiInp=document.getElementById('gEmoji');const gTypeEl=document.getElementById('gGoalType');const gWbEl=document.getElementById('gWeeklyBudget');const gWtbEl=document.getElementById('gWeeklyTreatBudget');if(id){const g=goalById(id);if(!g)return;document.getElementById('goalId').value=g.id;document.getElementById('gName').value=g.name;document.getElementById('gTarget').value=(g.goalType||'money')==='points'?'':(g.target||0);setGoalRewardDraft(g.reward||'');document.getElementById('gStartDate').value=g.startDate||S.user.startDate;if(gEmojiInp)gEmojiInp.value=(String(g.emoji||'🎯').trim().slice(0,8))||'🎯';if(gWbEl)gWbEl.value=g.weeklyBudget||'';if(gWtbEl)gWtbEl.value=g.weeklyTreatBudget!=null?g.weeklyTreatBudget:'';syncGoalFormForType(true,g);}else{document.getElementById('gName').value='';document.getElementById('gTarget').value='';document.getElementById('gStartDate').value=S.user.startDate||isoDate(new Date());if(gTypeEl)gTypeEl.value='money';if(gWbEl)gWbEl.value='';if(gWtbEl)gWtbEl.value='';if(gEmojiInp)gEmojiInp.value='🎯';syncGoalFormForType(false,null);const rp=document.getElementById('gRewardPreset');if(rp&&rp.options.length){rp.value=(REWARD_BANDS.free&&REWARD_BANDS.free[0])||rp.options[0].value;handleRewardPreset();}}syncGoalEmojiTriggerDisplay();syncGoalEmojiSelection();const delBtn=document.getElementById('goalDeleteBtn');if(delBtn)delBtn.style.display=id?'inline-flex':'none';window._gGoalTypePrev=id?((goalById(id)?.goalType)||'money'):'money';openM('mGoal');if(!id&&activeGoals().length===0)bindGoalFieldTipsForAdd();}
function habitBankTitleNorm(t){return String(t||'').trim().toLowerCase();}
function habitIsBankSlot(h){return !!(h&&(!h.active||h.archived));}
function findBankTitleConflict(incomingId,title){const k=habitBankTitleNorm(title);if(!k)return null;return S.habits.find(h=>h.id!==incomingId&&habitIsBankSlot(h)&&habitBankTitleNorm(h.title)===k)||null;}
function applyBankSlotForHabit(h,meta){const ts=Date.now();stampLegendaryAbortOnBank(h,ts);h.active=false;h.archived=true;h.archivedAt=ts;if(meta&&meta.originGoalId!=null)h.originGoalId=meta.originGoalId;if(meta&&meta.bankedFromGoalName)h.bankedFromGoalName=meta.bankedFromGoalName;}
function bankDupCompareCardHTML(h,label,fromLabel,bankWhen){const whenLine=bankWhen&&bankWhen!=='—'?`<div class="small-note">Banked: ${escDash(bankWhen)}</div>`:'';return`<div class="bank-dup-compare-card"><div class="bank-dup-badge">${escDash(label)}</div><div class="bank-dup-compare-head">${habitEmojiDisplayHTML(h.emoji,"span")}<div><div class="goal-title">${escDash(h.title)}</div><div class="goal-sub">${escDash(h.tier)} · ${escDash(metricLabel(h))}</div></div></div><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:var(--s2)">${escDash(fromLabel)}</div>${whenLine}</div>`;}
function openBankDuplicateHabitModal(incoming,existing,cb){window._bankDupCallback=cb;const gIn=goalById(incoming.goalId);const fromNew=gIn?`Current goal: ${gIn.name}`:'—';const origin=goalById(existing.originGoalId);const fromOld=`Originally from ${existing.bankedFromGoalName||origin?.name||'a previous goal'}`;const whenOld=existing.archivedAt?new Date(existing.archivedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'}):'—';const nb=document.getElementById('bankDupNewBody'),ob=document.getElementById('bankDupOldBody');if(nb)nb.innerHTML=bankDupCompareCardHTML(incoming,'Moving to bank',fromNew,'—');if(ob)ob.innerHTML=bankDupCompareCardHTML(existing,'Already in bank',fromOld,whenOld);const fin=function(ch){closeM('mBankDupHabit');const fn=window._bankDupCallback;window._bankDupCallback=null;if(fn)fn(ch);};const kn=document.getElementById('bankDupKeepNew'),ko=document.getElementById('bankDupKeepOld');if(kn)kn.onclick=function(){fin('incoming');};if(ko)ko.onclick=function(){fin('existing');};openM('mBankDupHabit');}
function resolveBankDuplicateThenArchive(h,meta,done){const conflict=findBankTitleConflict(h.id,h.title);if(!conflict){applyBankSlotForHabit(h,meta);done();return;}openBankDuplicateHabitModal(h,conflict,function(keep){if(keep==='incoming'){mergeWeekHabitDataInto(S.weeks,h.id,conflict.id);const cs=masteryLedgerSnapshotFromHabit(conflict);S.habits=S.habits.filter(x=>x.id!==conflict.id);if(cs)pushMasteryLedgerSnapshot(cs);applyBankSlotForHabit(h,meta);}else{mergeWeekHabitDataInto(S.weeks,conflict.id,h.id);const hs=masteryLedgerSnapshotFromHabit(h);S.habits=S.habits.filter(x=>x.id!==h.id);if(hs)pushMasteryLedgerSnapshot(hs);}done();});}
function bankHabitsListSequential(list,meta,done){let i=0;const next=function(){if(i>=list.length){if(done)done();return;}const hid=list[i++].id;const hh=habitById(hid);if(!hh){next();return;}resolveBankDuplicateThenArchive(hh,meta,next);};next();}
function cancelGoalCompleteArchiveFlow(){const ctx=window._goalCompleteArchiveCtx;if(ctx&&ctx.goalId){const g=goalById(ctx.goalId);if(g&&ctx.revertStatus)g.status=ctx.revertStatus;}window._goalCompleteArchiveStep=0;window._goalCompleteArchiveCtx=null;const ok=document.getElementById('confirmGoalCompleteArchiveOkBtn');if(ok)ok.textContent='Continue';closeM('mConfirmGoalCompleteArchive');save();renderAll();}
function advanceGoalCompleteArchiveConfirm(){const ctx=window._goalCompleteArchiveCtx;if(!ctx)return;let step=window._goalCompleteArchiveStep||1;if(step===1&&!S.user.skipSecondLockConfirm){window._goalCompleteArchiveStep=2;document.getElementById('confirmGoalCompleteArchiveTitle').textContent='Archive every habit on this goal?';document.getElementById('confirmGoalCompleteArchiveText').textContent='This is the extra check: finishing this goal archives every habit into Saved habits. Locked weeks stay put; open Manage → Saved habits to bring them back later.';document.getElementById('confirmGoalCompleteArchiveOkBtn').textContent='Yes, archive all';return;}const cel=ctx.cel;const list=ctx.list;const meta=ctx.meta;window._goalCompleteArchiveStep=0;window._goalCompleteArchiveCtx=null;closeM('mConfirmGoalCompleteArchive');bankHabitsListSequential(list,meta,function(){const gDone=goalById(ctx.goalId);if(gDone){gDone.goalCompletedTrackedWeeks=snapshotGoalCompletedWeeksCount(gDone);gDone.goalCompletedAt=Date.now();}save();closeM('mGoal');renderAll();showGoalCompleteCelebration(cel);});}
function saveGoal(){const name=document.getElementById('gName').value.trim();if(!name)return alert('Add a goal name.');const id=document.getElementById('goalId').value||uid('goal');const existing=goalById(id);const prevStatus=existing?existing.status:null;const prevPotTarget=existing?Number(existing.target)||0:0;const potTowardPriorTarget=existing&&prevPotTarget>0?computeGoalPotTotalForGoal(existing):0;const _wasFirstGoal=!existing&&(S.goals||[]).filter(g=>g.status==='active').length===0;const emojiRaw=document.getElementById('gEmoji')?String(document.getElementById('gEmoji').value||'').trim().slice(0,8):'';const emoji=emojiRaw||'🎯';const goalType=existing?(existing.goalType||'money'):(document.getElementById('gGoalType')?.value||'money');const kidSG=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();let _tgtRaw=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gTarget').value)||0;let pointsPayload={};if(goalType==='points'&&!existing){const pv=computeDefaultPotValues(60);_tgtRaw=100;const treatLbl=selectedGoalRewardLabel();let wtbVal=0;if(rewardTreatNeedsMoney(treatLbl)){wtbVal=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gWeeklyTreatBudget')?.value);if(!Number.isFinite(wtbVal)||wtbVal<=0)return alert(kidSG?'Pick a weekly treat budget (more than '+fmtMoney(0)+') for this treat.':'Enter a weekly treat budget greater than '+fmtMoney(0)+' for treats that cost money.');}pointsPayload={goalType:'points',target:100,weeklyTreatBudget:wtbVal,pointValueCore:pv.core,pointValueGrowth:pv.growth};}else{if(!existing&&_tgtRaw<=0)return alert(kidSG?'Pick a goal cost (more than '+fmtMoney(0)+') for this goal.':'New goals need a goal cost greater than '+fmtMoney(0)+'.');pointsPayload={goalType:'money'};if(!existing){const wb=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gWeeklyBudget')?.value);const wtb=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gWeeklyTreatBudget')?.value);if(!Number.isFinite(wb)||wb<=0)return alert(kidSG?'Pick a weekly budget (more than '+fmtMoney(0)+').':'Enter a weekly budget greater than '+fmtMoney(0)+'.');if(!Number.isFinite(wtb)||wtb<0)return alert(kidSG?'Pick a weekly treat budget (0 or more).':'Enter a weekly treat budget — 0 is allowed if you want none for now.');pointsPayload.weeklyBudget=wb;pointsPayload.weeklyTreatBudget=wtb;}}const goal={id,name,target:existing?Number(existing.target)||0:_tgtRaw,floor:80,reward:getGoalRewardDraft()||(REWARD_BANDS.free&&REWARD_BANDS.free[0])||'Badminton',startDate:document.getElementById('gStartDate').value||S.user.startDate,status:existing?(existing.status||'active'):'active',emoji,...pointsPayload};if(existing){goal.goalType=existing.goalType||'money';goal.target=Number(existing.target)||0;if(existing.goalType==='points'){goal.weeklyBudget=existing.weeklyBudget;const treatLbl=selectedGoalRewardLabel();let wtbVal=Number(existing.weeklyTreatBudget)||0;if(rewardTreatNeedsMoney(treatLbl)){wtbVal=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gWeeklyTreatBudget')?.value);if(!Number.isFinite(wtbVal)||wtbVal<=0)return alert(kidSG?'Pick a weekly treat budget (more than '+fmtMoney(0)+') for this treat.':'Enter a weekly treat budget greater than '+fmtMoney(0)+' for treats that cost money.');}else wtbVal=0;goal.weeklyTreatBudget=wtbVal;goal.pointValueCore=existing.pointValueCore;goal.pointValueGrowth=existing.pointValueGrowth;}else if(!existing.goalType||existing.goalType==='money'){goal.target=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gTarget').value)||Number(existing.target)||0;const wb=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gWeeklyBudget')?.value);const wtb=parseFloat(document.getElementById('gWeeklyTreatBudget')?.value);if(!Number.isFinite(wb)||wb<=0)return alert(kidSG?'Pick a weekly budget (more than '+fmtMoney(0)+').':'Enter a weekly budget greater than '+fmtMoney(0)+'.');if(!Number.isFinite(wtb)||wtb<0)return alert(kidSG?'Pick a weekly treat budget (0 or more).':'Enter a weekly treat budget — 0 is allowed if you want none for now.');goal.weeklyBudget=wb;goal.weeklyTreatBudget=wtb;}}if(existing){Object.assign(existing,goal);delete existing.grace;if((existing.status||'active')==='active'&&prevPotTarget>0&&_tgtRaw>prevPotTarget&&potTowardPriorTarget>=prevPotTarget){existing.recoveryActive=false;existing.recoveryLastPct=null;existing.ignorePotExcludeForRollingPct=true;}}else{goal.recoveryActive=false;goal.recoveryLastPct=null;goal.potExcludedUpToWeekKey='';goal.ignorePotExcludeForRollingPct=false;goal.recoveryBoostEnabled=true;goal.potTargetCelebrationShown=false;goal.potTargetCelebrationSnoozeUntil=0;S.goals.push(goal);}if(!existing&&_pendingBankedHabitIdsForNewGoal&&_pendingBankedHabitIdsForNewGoal.length){const toMove=_pendingBankedHabitIdsForNewGoal.slice();_pendingBankedHabitIdsForNewGoal=null;const gid=id;toMove.forEach(hid=>{const hh=habitById(hid);if(!hh||!hh.archived)return;hh.goalId=gid;hh.active=true;hh.archived=false;delete hh.archivedAt;delete hh.bankedFromGoalName;hh.habitStructureCooldownUntil=Date.now()+habitCooldownLongMsForProfile();});}if(goal.status==='completed'&&prevStatus!=='completed'){const function deleteGoal(){const id=document.getElementById('goalId').value;if(!id)return;const g=goalById(id);if(!g)return;const tethered=S.habits.filter(h=>h.goalId===id).length;const msg=tethered?`Delete “${g.name}”? ${tethered} habit(s) will move to Saved habits. async function confirmDeleteGoalStep(){const id=window._pendingDeleteGoalId;if(!id){closeM('mConfirmDeleteGoal');return;}if(window._pendingDeleteGoalStep===1&&!S.user.skipSecondLockConfirm){window._pendingDeleteGoalStep=2;document.getElementById('confirmDeleteGoalTitle').textContent='Are you sure you are sure?';document.getElementById('confirmDeleteGoalText').textContent='This will permanently delete the goal and move its habits to Saved habits.';document.getElementById('confirmDeleteGoalOkBtn').textContent="Yes, I\u2019m sure";return;}closeM('mConfirmDeleteGoal');try{await snapshotCloudStateForDestructiveEdit();}catch(e){console.warn('[sync] pre-delete snapshot',e);}const g=goalById(id);const finishDel=function(){Object.values(S.weeks).forEach(w=>{if(w.coinFlips&&w.coinFlips[id]!==undefined)delete w.coinFlips[id];});if(S.insights&&S.insights.tierByGoal)delete S.insights.tierByGoal[id];if(S.insights&&Array.isArray(S.insights.milestonesFired))S.insights.milestonesFired=S.insights.milestonesFired.filter(t=>!String(t).startsWith(id+':'));S.goals=S.goals.filter(x=>x.id!==id);save();closeM('mGoal');renderAll();window._pendingDeleteGoalId=null;window._pendingDeleteGoalStep=1;};if(g)bankHabitsTetheredToGoal(id,g.name,finishDel);else finishDel();}
function syncLegendaryHabitEditorTierLock(){
  const hId=document.getElementById('habitId')?.value;
  const h=hId?habitById(hId):null;
  const sel=document.getElementById('hTier');
  if(!sel)return;
  const coreOpt=sel.querySelector('option[value="core"]');
  const coreBtn=document.getElementById('hTierToggleCore');
  if(h&&h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked){
    sel.value='growth';
    if(coreOpt){coreOpt.disabled=true;coreOpt.title='Legendary maintenance habits stay in Growth — they do not block goal weeks.';}
    if(coreBtn){coreBtn.disabled=true;coreBtn.title='Legendary maintenance habits stay in Growth — they do not block goal weeks.';}
  }else{
    if(coreOpt){coreOpt.disabled=false;coreOpt.title='';}
    if(coreBtn){coreBtn.disabled=false;coreBtn.title='';}
  }
  syncHabitTierPickerUi();
}

function animateBankCardRemoval(card,done){const finish=typeof done==='function'?done:function(){};if(!card||!card.parentNode){finish();return;}if(typeof matchMedia==='function'&&matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches){finish();return;}const parent=card.parentNode;parent.style.overflowX='clip';card.style.willChange='transform,opacity';requestAnimationFrame(()=>{requestAnimationFrame(()=>{card.style.transition='transform 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), opacity 0.38s';card.style.transform='translateX(calc(100vw + 40px))';card.style.opacity='0';});});setTimeout(()=>{const h0=Math.max(1,card.offsetHeight);card.style.transition='max-height 0.34s ease, margin-top 0.34s ease, margin-bottom 0.34s ease, padding 0.34s ease, border-width 0.34s ease, opacity 0.2s';card.style.maxHeight=h0+'px';card.style.overflow='hidden';requestAnimationFrame(()=>{requestAnimationFrame(()=>{card.style.maxHeight='0';card.style.marginTop='0';card.style.marginBottom='0';card.style.paddingTop='0';card.style.paddingBottom='0';card.style.borderWidth='0';card.style.opacity='0';});});setTimeout(()=>{try{parent.style.overflowX='';card.style.willChange='';}catch(e){}finish();},380);},420);}

Try refreshing the page.');return;}if(!h.createdViaClone){alert('Only habits you created with “Clone habit” can be deleted here. This cannot be undone.'))return;const snap=masteryLedgerSnapshotFromHabit(h);S.habits=S.habits.filter(x=>x.id!==id);Object.values(S.weeks).forEach(w=>{if(w.habitData)delete w.habitData[id];});if(snap)pushMasteryLedgerSnapshot(snap);save();renderAll();}
function onReactivateMetricChange(){const m=document.getElementById('reactivateMetric').value;const lbl={days:'Days to qualify',sessions:'Sessions to qualify',km:'Km to qualify',minutes:'Minutes to qualify',pages:'Pages to qualify',custom:'Units to qualify'};document.getElementById('reactivateThrLbl').textContent=lbl[m]||'Threshold';document.getElementById('reactivateCustomUnitFg').style.display=m==='custom'?'flex':'none';}
function openReactivate(id){if(!activeGoals().length){openGoalModal();return;}ensureGoalOptions('reactivateGoal');const h=habitById(id);if(!h)return;document.getElementById('reactivateHabitId').value=h.id;document.getElementById('reactivateTitle').value=h.title;document.getElementById('reactivateEmoji').value=h.emoji||'🎯';document.getElementById('reactivatePot').value=h.pot||0;document.getElementById('reactivateTier').value=h.tier||'core';document.getElementById('reactivateMetric').value=h.metric||'days';document.getElementById('reactivateThreshold').value=h.threshold||5;document.getElementById('reactivateCustomUnit').value=h.customUnit||'';const lastGoal=goalById(h.goalId);const defaultId=goalIsActive(lastGoal)?lastGoal.id:(activeGoals()[0]?.id||'');document.getElementById('reactivateGoal').value=defaultId;onReactivateMetricChange();openM('mReassign');}
function reactivateHabit(){const h=habitById(document.getElementById('reactivateHabitId').value);if(!h)return;const goalId=document.getElementById('reactivateGoal').value;const title=document.getElementById('reactivateTitle').value.trim()||h.title;const emoji=document.getElementById('reactivateEmoji').value.trim()||h.emoji;const pot=parseFloat(document.getElementById('reactivatePot').value)||0;let tier=document.getElementById('reactivateTier').value||'core';if(tier!=='core'){const sameGoalHabits=S.habits.filter(x=>x.active&&!x.archived&&x.goalId===goalId&&x.id!==h.id);const coresRemaining=sameGoalHabits.filter(x=>x.tier==='core');if(coresRemaining.length===0){openHabitEditorNotice('Need a Core habit','At least one habit per goal must be core. Add a core habit for this goal first.');tier='core';}}const metric=document.getElementById('reactivateMetric').value||'days';const _rThrRaw=parseFloat(document.getElementById('reactivateThreshold').value||1);const threshold=(S.user.units==='imperial'&&metric==='km')?_rThrRaw/0.621371:_rThrRaw;const customUnit=document.getElementById('reactivateCustomUnit').value.trim();const prevRG=String(h.goalId||'');const nextRG=String(goalId||'');const cand=Object.assign({},h,{goalId,title,emoji,pot,tier,metric,threshold,customUnit,archived:false,active:true,addedDate:isoDate(new Date()),lastHabitGoalChangeAt:(prevRG!==nextRG&&(prevRG||nextRG))?Date.now():Number(h.lastHabitGoalChangeAt)||0});delete cand.bankedFromGoalName;cand.habitStructureCooldownUntil=Date.now()+habitCooldownLongMsForProfile();if(typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&!useKidsLanguage()&&cand.tier==='core'&&cand.active&&!cand.archived&&adultCoreSlotsExceeded(cand)){syncCoreHabitSurgeModalCopy();window._pendingReactivatePayload=cand;openM('mCoreHabitSurge');return;}Object.assign(h,cand);delete h.bankedFromGoalName;save();closeM('mReassign');renderAll();}
function weekStartFromDate(dateStr){const d=new Date(dateStr+'T00:00:00');const day=d.getDay()||7;d.setDate(d.getDate()-day+1);d.setHours(0,0,0,0);return d;}
function weekDates(off=0){const base=weekStartFromDate(isoDate(new Date()));base.setDate(base.getDate()+off*7);return Array.from({length:7},(_,i)=>{const d=new Date(base);d.setDate(base.getDate()+i);return d;});}
function fmtRange(off){const ds=weekDates(off);const o={day:'numeric',month:'short'};return `${ds[0].toLocaleDateString('en-GB',o)} – ${ds[6].toLocaleDateString('en-GB',o)}`;}
function weekKey(off=0){const monday=weekDates(off)[0];const temp=new Date(Date.UTC(monday.getFullYear(),monday.getMonth(),monday.getDate()));temp.setUTCDate(temp.getUTCDate()+3-(temp.getUTCDay()||7));const year=temp.getUTCFullYear();const firstThursday=new Date(Date.UTC(year,0,4));const week=1+Math.round(((temp-firstThursday)/86400000-3+((firstThursday.getUTCDay()+6)%7))/7);return `${year}-W${String(week).padStart(2,'0')}`;}
function dateToWeekKey(d){const temp=new Date(Date.UTC(d.getFullYear(),d.getMonth(),d.getDate()));temp.setUTCDate(temp.getUTCDate()+3-(temp.getUTCDay()||7));const year=temp.getUTCFullYear();const firstThursday=new Date(Date.UTC(year,0,4));const week=1+Math.round(((temp-firstThursday)/86400000-3+((firstThursday.getUTCDay()+6)%7))/7);return `${year}-W${String(week).padStart(2,'0')}`;}
/** Chronological compare for `YYYY-Www` keys (do not use string compare: W10 sorts before W9 lexically). */
function compareIsoWeekKeys(a,b){if(!a||!b)return(!a&&!b)?0:a?1:-1;const pa=String(a).split('-W');const pb=String(b).split('-W');if(pa.length<2||pb.length<2)return String(a).localeCompare(String(b));const ya=parseInt(pa[0],10),wa=parseInt(pa[1],10);const yb=parseInt(pb[0],10),wb=parseInt(pb[1],10);if(ya!==yb)return ya<yb?-1:1;if(wa!==wb)return wa<wb?-1:1;return 0;}
function weekKeyAtOrBeforePotCutoff(wk,cutoff){if(!wk||!cutoff)return false;return compareIsoWeekKeys(wk,cutoff)<=0;}
function getWD(wk){if(!S.weeks[wk])S.weeks[wk]={habitData:{},coinFlips:{}};if(!S.weeks[wk].habitData)S.weeks[wk].habitData={};if(!S.weeks[wk].coinFlips)S.weeks[wk].coinFlips={};return S.weeks[wk];}
function weekGoalConsistentPct(goalId){const g=goalById(goalId);return g?goalStats(g).pct:null;}
function isoWeekSundayEndMs(off=0){const ds=weekDates(off);const sun=new Date(ds[6]);sun.setHours(23,59,59,999);return sun.getTime();}
/** Week editing ends at **Monday 00:00 local** right after that row’s Sunday (`weekDates(off)[6]`); same instant as the end of “Sunday night”. See `isIsoWeekEndedForOffset`. */
function isoWeekEditLockMs(off=0){const ds=weekDates(off);const sun=ds[6];const mon=new Date(sun.getFullYear(),sun.getMonth(),sun.getDate()+1);mon.setHours(0,0,0,0);return mon.getTime();}
/** Reserved: previously a Monday catch-up window; week lock is now Sunday midnight (local). Kept false so call sites stay explicit. */
function isWeekMondayCatchupWindow(off){return false;}
let _clockSkewMs=0;
function appNowMs(){return Date.now()+_clockSkewMs;}
async function refreshAppClockSkew(){
  try{
    const ctrl=new AbortController();
    const to=setTimeout(()=>ctrl.abort(),5000);
    const r=await fetch('https://worldtimeapi.org/api/ip',{cache:'no-store',signal:ctrl.signal});
    clearTimeout(to);
    if(!r.ok)return;
    const j=await r.json();
    if(typeof j.unixtime==='number')_clockSkewMs=j.unixtime*1000-Date.now();
  }catch(e){}
}
function isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off){return appNowMs()>=isoWeekEditLockMs(off);}
function trackingStartMidnight(){return new Date((S.user.startDate||isoDate(new Date()))+'T00:00:00');}
function weekEntirelyBeforeTrackingStart(off){return isoDate(weekDates(off)[6])<(S.user.startDate||isoDate(new Date()));}
function offsetForWeekKey(wk){for(let o=0;o>=-400;o--){if(weekKey(o)===wk)return o;}return null;}
/** When addedDate was defaulted to profile start, infer a better first-activity date from week logs so mid-week habit scaling applies. */
function inferHabitAddedDatesFromWeekLogs(P){if(!P||!P.habits||!P.weeks)return;const start=String(P.user&&P.user.startDate||'').slice(0,10)||isoDate(new Date());P.habits.forEach(h=>{if(!h||!h.id)return;const cur=String(h.addedDate||'').slice(0,10);if(cur&&cur!==start)return;let best=null;Object.keys(P.weeks).forEach(wk=>{const hd=P.weeks[wk]&&P.weeks[wk].habitData&&P.weeks[wk].habitData[h.id];if(!hd)return;const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);if(off===null)return;const dates=weekDates(off);let anyDay=false;for(let i=0;i<7;i++){const tick=hd.days&&hd.days[i];const dv=Number(hd.dayValues&&hd.dayValues[i])||0;if(!tick&&dv<=0)continue;anyDay=true;const di=isoDate(new Date(dates[i]));if(!best||di<best)best=di;}if(!anyDay&&(Number(hd.value)||0)>0){const di=isoDate(new Date(dates[0]));if(!best||di<best)best=di;}});if(best&&best>start)h.addedDate=best;});}
function trackingLogLocked(){return !!(S&&S.user&&(S.user.trackingPaused||S.user.trackingStopped));}
function canEditTrackerDay(off,dayIndex){if(trackingLogLocked())return false;if(isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off))return false;const dates=weekDates(off);const dt=new Date(dates[dayIndex]);dt.setHours(0,0,0,0);const ts=trackingStartMidnight();if(dt<ts)return false;const today=new Date();today.setHours(0,0,0,0);if(off===0&&dt>today)return false;return true;}
function canEditTrackerWeek(off){if(trackingLogLocked())return false;if(isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off))return false;if(weekEntirelyBeforeTrackingStart(off))return false;return true;}
function canEditHabitDay(h,off,dayIndex){if(!h||!canEditTrackerDay(off,dayIndex))return false;const ad=String(h&&h.addedDate||'').slice(0,10);if(!ad)return true;const dt=new Date(weekDates(off)[dayIndex]);dt.setHours(0,0,0,0);return isoDate(dt)>=ad;}
/** Web Push schedule: allow today + future days in range (unlike Log, which blocks future days). */
function canScheduleHabitReminderOnDay(h,off,dayIndex){
  if(!h||!h.active||h.archived)return false;
  if(trackingLogLocked())return false;
  if(isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off))return false;
  const dt=new Date(weekDates(off)[dayIndex]);dt.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  if(dt<trackingStartMidnight())return false;
  const todayStart=new Date();todayStart.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  if(dt<todayStart)return false;
  const ad=String(h&&h.addedDate||'').slice(0,10);
  if(ad&&isoDate(dt)<ad)return false;
  return true;
}
function canEditHabitWeekMetric(h,off){if(!h||!canEditTrackerWeek(off))return false;const m=h.metric;if(m!=='minutes'&&m!=='pages'&&m!=='custom')return true;const wk=weekKey(off);const idxs=eligibleDayIndicesForHabitStartWeek(h,wk);if(!idxs.length||idxs.length>=7)return true;if(off<0)return true;const dates=weekDates(off);const firstEl=isoDate(new Date(dates[idxs[0]]));const today=isoDate(new Date());return today>=firstEl;}
function rewardZoneForPct(pct,floor){if(pct===null)return'none';if(pct>=floor)return'ok';return'below_floor';}
function recoveryStatusHTML(g,wk,off){if(!g||goalRecoveryDeferredFirstWeek(g))return'';if(!g.recoveryActive)return'';const floor=g.floor||80;const boost=!!g.recoveryBoostEnabled;const gname=escDash(g.name||'this goal');const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const coreLine=boost?'<li>Core habits give <strong>1.3×</strong> their normal value</li>':'<li>Only core habits add to the pot</li>';if(kid)return`<div class="recovery-status-line" style="color:var(--amber)"><strong>On recovery</strong><ul class="recovery-status-list"><li>Score is below <strong>${floor}%</strong></li><li>Growth habits give nothing</li>${coreLine}<li>Another drop resets the jar for <strong>${gname}</strong></li></ul></div>`;return`<div class="recovery-status-line" style="color:var(--amber)"><strong>On recovery</strong><ul class="recovery-status-list"><li>% is below <strong>${floor}%</strong></li><li>Growth habits give nothing</li>${coreLine}<li>Any further % drop resets your pot for <strong>${gname}</strong></li></ul></div>`;}
function registerInsightUnlocked(id){if(!id)return;if(!S.insights.unlocked)S.insights.unlocked=[];if(!S.insights.unlocked.includes(id))S.insights.unlocked.push(id);}

function absolutizeInsightSourceUrl(u){if(u==null||typeof u!=='string')return'';let t=u.trim().replace(/^['"]|['"]$/g,'');if(!t||t==='#')return'';if(/^javascript:/i.test(t))return'';if(/^https?:\/\//i.test(t))return t;if(/^\/\//.test(t))return'https:'+t;const digits=/^(\d{5,12})\/?$/;if(digits.test(t))return'https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/'+t.replace(/\/?$/,'')+'/';return'https://'+t.replace(/^\/+/,'');}

function ensureHD(wk,id){const wd=getWD(wk);if(!wd.habitData[id])wd.habitData[id]={days:Array(7).fill(false),value:0,dayValues:Array(7).fill(0)};if(!wd.habitData[id].dayValues)wd.habitData[id].dayValues=Array(7).fill(0);return wd.habitData[id];}
function isHabitDataLocked(wk,hid){const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);if(off!==null&&isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off))return true;const w=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk];if(!w||!w.habitData||!w.habitData[hid])return false;return w.habitData[hid].locked===true;}
function weekCountsTowardDisc(goal,wk){if(!goal||!wk)return false;const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);if(off===null)return false;if(weekEntirelyBeforeTrackingStart(off))return false;const habits=habitsForGoalInWeek(goal.id,wk);const cores=habits.filter(h=>habitEffectiveTier(h,wk)==='core'&&habitAppliesToConsistencyWeek(h,wk));if(!cores.length)return false;return isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off);}
function weekGoalConsistentForDisc(goalId,wk){const wd=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk];if(wd&&wd.goalEarlyDisc&&wd.goalEarlyDisc[goalId]!==undefined)return!!wd.goalEarlyDisc[goalId];return weekGoalConsistent(goalId,wk);}
function updateGoalEarlyDiscSnapshot(wk,gid){const g=goalById(gid);if(!g||!weekCountsTowardDisc(g,wk))return;const wd=getWD(wk);wd.goalEarlyDisc=wd.goalEarlyDisc||{};wd.goalEarlyDisc[gid]=weekGoalConsistent(gid,wk);}
function applyHabitAutoLocksForProfile(P){if(!P||!P.weeks)return false;let touched=false;const activeG=new Set((P.goals||[]).filter(g=>g.status==='active').map(g=>g.id));const habitIds=(P.habits||[]).filter(h=>h.active&&!h.archived&&activeG.has(h.goalId)).map(h=>h.id);Object.keys(P.weeks).forEach(wk=>{const o=offsetForWeekKey(wk);if(o===null||!isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(o))return;const wd=P.weeks[wk];if(!wd.habitData)wd.habitData={};habitIds.forEach(id=>{const h=P.habits&&P.habits.find(x=>x.id===id);if(!wd.habitData[id])wd.habitData[id]={days:Array(7).fill(false),value:0,dayValues:Array(7).fill(0)};if(!wd.habitData[id].dayValues)wd.habitData[id].dayValues=Array(7).fill(0);const snap=h?(h.tier==='growth'?'growth':'core'):'core';if(!wd.habitData[id].locked){wd.habitData[id].locked=true;wd.habitData[id].tierAtLock=snap;if(h)wd.habitData[id].goalIdAtLock=h.goalId||'';touched=true;}else if(wd.habitData[id].tierAtLock!=='core'&&wd.habitData[id].tierAtLock!=='growth'){wd.habitData[id].tierAtLock=snap;touched=true;}});if(wd.goalEarlyDisc){delete wd.goalEarlyDisc;touched=true;}});return touched;}
function habitLockActionsHTML(wk,hid){if(isHabitDataLocked(wk,hid))return'<span class="habit-week-locked-pill" title="This habit is locked for this week — no more edits">Locked</span>';return'';}
/** Total logged on dayValues (per-day modal) or legacy single `value` — used for sessions and km. */
function sessionWeekTotal(hd){const dv=hd.dayValues||[];const s=dv.reduce((a,b)=>a+Number(b||0),0);if(s>0)return s;return Number(hd.value)||0;}
let _logMetricCtx=null;
function openLogMetricDayModal(wk,hId,idx){const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);const h=habitById(hId);if(off===null||!h||!canEditHabitDay(h,off,idx)||isHabitDataLocked(wk,hId))return;if(!h||(h.metric!=='km'&&h.metric!=='sessions'))return;_logMetricCtx={wk,hId,idx};const hd=ensureHD(wk,hId);const days=['Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday','Sunday'];const inp=document.getElementById('logMetricDayInput');if(h.metric==='sessions'){document.getElementById('logMetricDayTitle').textContent=`Log sessions — ${days[idx]}`;document.getElementById('logMetricDaySubtitle').textContent='How many sessions on this day? Enter 0 to clear.';document.getElementById('logMetricDayLbl').textContent='Sessions';const prev=Math.max(0,Math.round(Number(hd.dayValues[idx])||0));inp.value=prev>0?String(prev):'';inp.step='1';inp.setAttribute('inputmode','numeric');inp.setAttribute('min','0');openM('mLogMetricDay');setTimeout(()=>{inp.focus();if(inp.select)inp.select();},80);return;}const isImp=S.user.units==='imperial';const unit=isImp?'miles':'km';const prevRaw=hd.dayValues[idx]||0;const prevDisp=isImp?(prevRaw*0.621371).toFixed(1):String(prevRaw);document.getElementById('logMetricDayTitle').textContent=`Log ${unit} — ${days[idx]}`;document.getElementById('logMetricDaySubtitle').textContent=`How many ${unit} for this day? Enter 0 to clear.`;document.getElementById('logMetricDayLbl').textContent=unit==='miles'?'Miles':'Kilometres';inp.value=parseFloat(prevDisp)>0?prevDisp:'';inp.step='0.1';inp.setAttribute('inputmode','decimal');openM('mLogMetricDay');setTimeout(()=>{inp.focus();if(inp.select)inp.select();},80);}
function submitLogMetricDayModal(){if(!_logMetricCtx)return;const {wk,hId,idx}=_logMetricCtx;if(isHabitDataLocked(wk,hId)){closeM('mLogMetricDay');return;}const h=habitById(hId);if(!h){closeM('mLogMetricDay');return;}const hd=ensureHD(wk,hId);const wasQ=qualifies(h,wk);const rawInp=parseFloat(document.getElementById('logMetricDayInput').value)||0;if(h.metric==='sessions'){const storeVal=Math.max(0,Math.round(rawInp));hd.dayValues[idx]=storeVal;hd.days[idx]=storeVal>0;hd.value=hd.dayValues.reduce((a,b)=>a+Number(b||0),0);}else{const isImp=S.user.units==='imperial';const storeVal=isImp?rawInp/0.621371:rawInp;hd.dayValues[idx]=storeVal;hd.days[idx]=storeVal>0;hd.value=hd.dayValues.reduce((a,b)=>a+Number(b||0),0);}if(qualifies(h,wk))setTimeout(soundQualify,60);kidCritterMaybePlayRocketOnHabitQualified(wk,h,wasQ);save();closeM('mLogMetricDay');renderAfterLogChange();}
function habitListSort(a,b){return(a.listOrder??0)-(b.listOrder??0)||String(a.id).localeCompare(String(b.id));}
function goalHabits(goalId,{includeArchived=false}={}){return S.habits.filter(h=>h.goalId===goalId&&(includeArchived?true:(h.active&&!h.archived))).sort(habitListSort);}
function habitGoalIdForWeek(h,wk){const wd=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk];const hd=wd&&wd.habitData&&wd.habitData[h.id];if(hd&&hd.locked&&hd.goalIdAtLock)return hd.goalIdAtLock;return h.goalId;}
function habitsForGoalInWeek(goalId,wk){const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);const ended=off!==null&&isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off);if(!ended)return goalHabits(goalId);const wd=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk];if(!wd||!wd.habitData)return[];const out=[];for(const h of S.habits){if(!wd.habitData[h.id])continue;if(habitGoalIdForWeek(h,wk)!==goalId)continue;out.push(h);}return out.sort(habitListSort);}
function goalFirstTrackingWeekKey(g){if(!g)return'';return dateToWeekKey(weekStartFromDate(g.startDate||(S&&S.user&&S.user.startDate)||isoDate(new Date())));}
function goalRecoveryDeferredFirstWeek(g){if(!g)return false;return weekKey(0)===goalFirstTrackingWeekKey(g);}
function weekEndedForWeekKey(wk){const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);return off!==null&&isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off);}
/**
 * Single deterministic source of truth for recovery + pot reset.
 * Replays a goal's CLOSED tracked weeks once, oldest->newest, from a clean slate
 * (does NOT read g.potExcludedUpToWeekKey, so it can't go circular). Uses EXACT
 * (unrounded) chapter % for the strict-drop comparison so genuine extra misses
 * are never lost to rounding ties. A true failure (strict % decrease while in
 * recovery, ties ignored) resets the pot from that week and starts a fresh, NON-
 * recovery chapter. Exception: two consecutive 0% weeks in recovery also reset
 * (0% tied with 0% is still stagnation). Idempotent: same input -> same output, run 1x or Nx.
 * Returns {recoveryActive, potExcludedUpToWeekKey, recoveryByWeek:{wk:bool}, weeks}.
 */
function computeRecoveryTimeline(g){
  const empty={recoveryActive:false,potExcludedUpToWeekKey:'',recoveryByWeek:{},weeks:[]};
  if(!g)return empty;
  const keys=trackedWeeksForGoal(g);
  const floorFrac=(Number(g.floor)||80)/100;
  const ignoreEx=!!g.ignorePotExcludeForRollingPct;
  const recoveryByWeek={};
  let chapterStart=0,recovery=false,prevPct=null,cutoff='';
  for(let i=0;i<keys.length;i++){
    const k=keys[i];
    const winStart=ignoreEx?0:chapterStart;
    const winLen=i-winStart+1;
    if(winLen<2){recoveryByWeek[k]=false;continue;}
    let ok=0;for(let j=winStart;j<=i;j++){if(weekGoalConsistentForDisc(g.id,keys[j]))ok++;}
    const pct=ok/winLen;
    if(pct>=floorFrac){recovery=false;prevPct=null;recoveryByWeek[k]=false;continue;}
    if(!recovery){recovery=true;prevPct=pct;recoveryByWeek[k]=true;continue;}
    if(prevPct!==null&&(pct<prevPct||(pct===0&&prevPct===0))){cutoff=k;chapterStart=i+1;recovery=false;prevPct=null;recoveryByWeek[k]=true;}
    else{prevPct=pct;recoveryByWeek[k]=true;}
  }
  return{recoveryActive:recovery,potExcludedUpToWeekKey:cutoff,recoveryByWeek,weeks:keys};
}
let _renderPassCache=null;
function beginRenderPass(){_renderPassCache={recoveryTimeline:new Map(),goalStats:new Map()};}
function endRenderPass(){_renderPassCache=null;}
function getRecoveryTimeline(g){if(!g)return computeRecoveryTimeline(g);if(_renderPassCache){const id=g.id;if(_renderPassCache.recoveryTimeline.has(id))return _renderPassCache.recoveryTimeline.get(id);const tl=computeRecoveryTimeline(g);_renderPassCache.recoveryTimeline.set(id,tl);return tl;}return computeRecoveryTimeline(g);}
/** Per-week recovery flag (closed weeks use the timeline; the open week uses the goal's live flag). */
function goalRecoveryActiveForWeek(g,wk,tl){if(!g)return false;if(weekEndedForWeekKey(wk)){if(!tl)tl=computeRecoveryTimeline(g);return!!tl.recoveryByWeek[wk];}return!!g.recoveryActive;}
function adultHabitMasteryTierNum(h){return Math.max(0,parseInt(h&&h.masteryTier,10)||0);}
/** Adult Core slots: base 2 consuming slots + 1 per Core habit at Mastery ≥2 (those habits do not consume a slot). */
function adultCoreSlotBudgetProspective(data){
  let bonus=0;
  S.habits.forEach(h=>{
    const eff=h.id===data.id?data:h;
    if(!eff.active||eff.archived)return;
    if((eff.tier||'core')!=='core')return;
    if(adultHabitMasteryTierNum(eff)>=2)bonus++;
  });
  return 2+bonus;
}
function adultCoreConsumingCountProspective(data){
  let n=0;
  if(data.tier==='core'&&adultHabitMasteryTierNum(data)<2)n++;
  S.habits.forEach(h=>{
    if(h.id===data.id)return;
    if(!h.active||h.archived)return;
    if(h.tier!=='core')return;
    if(adultHabitMasteryTierNum(h)<2)n++;
  });
  return n;
}
function adultCoreSlotsExceeded(data){return adultCoreConsumingCountProspective(data)>adultCoreSlotBudgetProspective(data);}
function habitStructureCooldownRemainingMs(h){if(!h)return 0;const until=Number(h.habitStructureCooldownUntil)||0;if(!until)return 0;const left=until-Date.now();return left>0?left:0;}
function habitFrozenForStructure(h){return habitStructureCooldownRemainingMs(h)>0;}
function habitCooldownLongMsForProfile(){const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();return kid?HABIT_COOLDOWN_SHORT_MS:HABIT_COOLDOWN_LONG_MS;}
/** Extend habit structure cooldown from max(now, existing until) by msFromNow. */
function bumpHabitStructureCooldownFromNow(h,msFromNow){if(!h||msFromNow<=0)return;const curUntil=Number(h.habitStructureCooldownUntil)||0;const base=Math.max(Date.now(),curUntil);h.habitStructureCooldownUntil=base+msFromNow;}
function habitGoalRetetherCooldownRemainingMs(h){return habitStructureCooldownRemainingMs(h);}
function habitFrozenForRetether(h){return habitFrozenForStructure(h);}
function formatRetetherUnlockDate(msLeft){if(msLeft<=0)return '';const d=new Date(Date.now()+msLeft);return d.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'});}
function habitStructureCooldownDaysLeft(h){const ms=habitStructureCooldownRemainingMs(h);if(ms<=0)return 0;return Math.ceil(ms/HABIT_MS_DAY);}
function openGoalsTabCooldownPrompt(hid){const h=habitById(hid);if(!h)return;const ms=habitStructureCooldownRemainingMs(h);if(ms<=0){renderGoalsTab(false);return;}const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const days=habitStructureCooldownDaysLeft(h);const daysWord=days===1?'1 day':days+' days';const body=kid?(daysWord+' left until this habit unlocks.'):(daysWord+' left until cooldown finishes.');const title=escDash(h.title);const ok=kid?'Got it':'OK';requestAnimationFrame(function(){openHabitEditorNotice(title,body,ok);});}
function stripLegacyUserStorageFields(u){if(!u||typeof u!=='object')return;delete u.gracePeriodEnabled;delete u.graceOfferStepperSeen;}
function trackerHabitsOrdered(){return S.habits.filter(h=>{if(!h.active||h.archived)return false;if(h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked)return true;return goalIsActive(goalById(h.goalId));}).sort(habitListSort);}
function eligibleDayIndicesForHabitStartWeek(h,wk){const ad=habitAddedDateStr(h);if(!ad||!wk)return[];const sw=dateToWeekKey(weekStartFromDate(ad));if(sw!==wk)return[];const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);if(off===null)return[];const dates=weekDates(off);const idxs=[];for(let i=0;i<7;i++){const dt=new Date(dates[i]);dt.setHours(0,0,0,0);if(isoDate(dt)<ad)continue;idxs.push(i);}return idxs;}
function effectiveWeeklyTargetForWeek(h,wk){const startIdxs=eligibleDayIndicesForHabitStartWeek(h,wk);const thr=Math.max(0,Number(h&&h.threshold)||0);if(startIdxs.length>0&&startIdxs.length<7)return Math.max(1,Math.floor(thr*startIdxs.length/7));return thr;}
function midweekStartRequiredCountForDays(h,eligibleN){if(eligibleN<=0)return 0;const thr=Math.max(0,Number(h&&h.threshold)||0);return Math.max(1,Math.floor(thr*eligibleN/7));}
function aggregateTurnUpCountForIndices(hd,idxs){let c=0;for(const i of idxs){const dv=Number((hd.dayValues&&hd.dayValues[i])||0)||0;if((hd.days&&hd.days[i])||dv>0)c++;}return c;}
/** Sum per-day values (km, sessions, etc.) on the given day indices — used when the habit starts mid–ISO week. */
function sumDayValuesForIndices(hd,idxs){let s=0;for(const i of idxs){s+=Number((hd.dayValues&&hd.dayValues[i])||0)||0;}return s;}
function qualifiesFromStoredHabitWeek(h,wk,hd){if(!hd)return false;const startIdxs=eligibleDayIndicesForHabitStartWeek(h,wk);const partial=startIdxs.length>0&&startIdxs.length<7;const need=effectiveWeeklyTargetForWeek(h,wk);if(partial){if(h.metric==='days')return aggregateTurnUpCountForIndices(hd,startIdxs)>=need;if(h.metric==='sessions'){let got=sumDayValuesForIndices(hd,startIdxs);if(got<=0)got=sessionWeekTotal(hd);return got>=need;}if(h.metric==='km'){let got=sumDayValuesForIndices(hd,startIdxs);if(got<=0)got=sessionWeekTotal(hd);return got>=need;}if(h.metric==='minutes'||h.metric==='pages'||h.metric==='custom'){let got=sumDayValuesForIndices(hd,startIdxs);if(got<=0)got=Number(hd.value)||0;return got>=need;}}if(h.metric==='days')return(hd.days||[]).filter(Boolean).length>=h.threshold;if(h.metric==='sessions')return sessionWeekTotal(hd)>=h.threshold;if(h.metric==='km')return sessionWeekTotal(hd)>=h.threshold;return(Number(hd.value)||0)>=h.threshold;}
function qualifies(h,wk){return qualifiesFromStoredHabitWeek(h,wk,ensureHD(wk,h.id));}
function habitAddedDateStr(h){return String(h&&h.addedDate||'').slice(0,10);}
/** ISO week key (YYYY-Www) of the Monday week the habit was first added; null if unknown — treat as “always applied” for older profiles. */
function habitFirstWeekKey(h){const ad=habitAddedDateStr(h);if(!ad)return null;try{return dateToWeekKey(weekStartFromDate(ad));}catch(e){return null;}}
/** Core consistency for `wk` only includes habits that already existed in that week — new habits added later do not change past weeks’ scores. */
function habitAppliesToConsistencyWeek(h,wk){if(!wk)return true;const fk=habitFirstWeekKey(h);if(!fk)return true;return fk<=wk;}
/** Log tab: show a habit row only when the habit existed during that ISO week (added on or before that week’s Sunday). Legacy habits without addedDate always show. */
function habitShownOnTrackerWeek(h,off,weekSunOpt){
  const ad=habitAddedDateStr(h);
  if(!ad)return true;
  try{
    let weekSun=weekSunOpt;
    if(!weekSun){
      const dates=weekDates(off);
      weekSun=isoDate(new Date(dates[6]));
    }
    return ad<=weekSun;
  }catch(e){return true;}
}
/**
 * Two parallel mechanics:
 * • Basic: ISO-week goal consistency, recovery, pot — unchanged by Premium.
 * • Premium mastery: rolling 27 / 54 / 81 calendar days. expectedMin = eligibleDays × (weekly threshold from the same habit rule ÷ 7).
 *   Actual = days checked (days metric) or sum of logged units (volume). rate = actual ÷ expectedMin vs 70% / 80% / 90%.
 */
const MASTERY_DAYS_T1=27,MASTERY_DAYS_T2=54,MASTERY_DAYS_T3=81;
const MASTERY_RATE_T1=0.7,MASTERY_RATE_T2=0.8,MASTERY_RATE_T3=0.9;
const MASTERY_LEVEL_NAMES=['','Apprentice','Adept','Master','Legendary','Timeless','Eternal','Immortal'];
const LEGENDARY_SNOOZE_MS=Math.round(182.625*24*3600000);
function legendaryWaitMsForBankedTier(tier){if(tier===3)return Math.round(182.625*24*3600000);if(tier===4)return Math.round(2*365.25*24*3600000);if(tier===5)return Math.round(5*365.25*24*3600000);if(tier===6)return Math.round(10*365.25*24*3600000);return null;}
function msFromAnyDate(s){if(!s)return 0;const t=Date.parse(String(s));return isNaN(t)?0:t;}
function stampLegendaryAbortOnBank(h,ts){if(!h||!h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked||!h.habitLegendarySinceWeek)return;h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked=false;delete h.habitLegendarySinceWeek;const tier=parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0;const w=legendaryWaitMsForBankedTier(tier);if(w&&tier>=3&&tier<7)h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs=(ts||Date.now())+w;}
function mondayIsoForWeekKey(wk){if(!wk)return null;const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);if(off===null)return null;return isoDate(weekDates(off)[0]);}
function habitShownOnTrackerWeekForDate(h,d){
  const ad=habitAddedDateStr(h);
  if(!ad)return true;
  const wk=dateToWeekKey(d);
  const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);
  if(off===null)return true;
  const dates=weekDates(off);
  const weekSun=isoDate(dates[6]);
  return ad<=weekSun;
}
/** Per-day signal for mastery: days = checkbox; sessions/km = that day’s log or qualifying week (legacy lump); other metrics = week qualifies. */
function habitMasteryDayHit(h,wk,dayIndex){
  const hd=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk]&&S.weeks[wk].habitData&&S.weeks[wk].habitData[h.id];
  if(!hd)return false;
  if(h.metric==='days')return!!(hd.days&&hd.days[dayIndex]);
  if(h.metric==='sessions'||h.metric==='km'){
    if(Number((hd.dayValues&&hd.dayValues[dayIndex])||0)>0)return true;
    return qualifiesFromStoredHabitWeek(h,wk,hd);
  }
  return qualifiesFromStoredHabitWeek(h,wk,hd);
}
/** Logged volume only for Premium mastery (no credit for “week qualifies” without logged amounts). Legacy weekly lump spread with value/7 per day. */
function habitMasteryDayVolumeLogged(h,wk,dayIndex,hd){
  if(!hd||h.metric==='days')return 0;
  const dv=Number((hd.dayValues&&hd.dayValues[dayIndex])||0)||0;
  if(dv>0)return dv;
  const wv=Number(hd.value)||0;
  if(wv>0)return wv/7;
  return 0;
}
/** Rolling calendar-day window ending today. Optional `sinceIso`: only days from legendary restart Monday onward. */
function habitMasteryDayWindowStats(h,numDays,sinceIso){
  const thr=Math.max(0,Number(h&&h.threshold)||0);
  const today=new Date();
  today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  const todayStr=isoDate(today);
  const ad=habitAddedDateStr(h);
  const start=String(S.user&&S.user.startDate||'').slice(0,10);
  let eligible=0,actual=0;
  const isDays=h.metric==='days';
  for(let i=0;i<numDays;i++){
    const d=new Date(today);
    d.setDate(d.getDate()-i);
    const ds=isoDate(d);
    if(ds>todayStr)continue;
    if(sinceIso&&ds<sinceIso)continue;
    if(ad&&ds<ad)continue;
    if(start&&ds<start)continue;
    const wk=dateToWeekKey(d);
    if(!habitAppliesToConsistencyWeek(h,wk))continue;
    if(!habitShownOnTrackerWeekForDate(h,d))continue;
    const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);
    if(off===null)continue;
    const dates=weekDates(off);
    let idx=-1;
    for(let j=0;j<7;j++){if(isoDate(dates[j])===ds){idx=j;break;}}
    if(idx<0)continue;
    eligible++;
    if(isDays){
      if(habitMasteryDayHit(h,wk,idx))actual++;
    }else{
      const hd=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk]&&S.weeks[wk].habitData&&S.weeks[wk].habitData[h.id];
      actual+=habitMasteryDayVolumeLogged(h,wk,idx,hd||null);
    }
  }
  const expected=eligible*(thr/7);
  const rate=expected>0?actual/expected:0;
  return{eligible,actual,expected,rate};
}
function computeDeservedMasteryTier(h){
  const s27=habitMasteryDayWindowStats(h,MASTERY_DAYS_T1,null);
  const s54=habitMasteryDayWindowStats(h,MASTERY_DAYS_T2,null);
  const s81=habitMasteryDayWindowStats(h,MASTERY_DAYS_T3,null);
  let tier=0;
  if(s27.eligible>=MASTERY_DAYS_T1&&s27.rate>=MASTERY_RATE_T1-1e-9)tier=1;
  if(s54.eligible>=MASTERY_DAYS_T2&&s54.rate>=MASTERY_RATE_T2-1e-9)tier=2;
  if(s81.eligible>=MASTERY_DAYS_T3&&s81.rate>=MASTERY_RATE_T3-1e-9)tier=3;
  return tier;
}
function computeDeservedMasteryTierSince(h,sinceWk){
  const sinceM=mondayIsoForWeekKey(sinceWk);
  if(!sinceM)return 0;
  const s27=habitMasteryDayWindowStats(h,MASTERY_DAYS_T1,sinceM);
  const s54=habitMasteryDayWindowStats(h,MASTERY_DAYS_T2,sinceM);
  const s81=habitMasteryDayWindowStats(h,MASTERY_DAYS_T3,sinceM);
  let tier=0;
  if(s27.eligible>=MASTERY_DAYS_T1&&s27.rate>=MASTERY_RATE_T1-1e-9)tier=1;
  if(s54.eligible>=MASTERY_DAYS_T2&&s54.rate>=MASTERY_RATE_T2-1e-9)tier=2;
  if(s81.eligible>=MASTERY_DAYS_T3&&s81.rate>=MASTERY_RATE_T3-1e-9)tier=3;
  return tier;
}
function recordMasteryTierProgress(h,newTier){
  const prev=parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0;
  if(newTier<=prev)return false;
  h.masteryTier=newTier;
  const nowIso=new Date().toISOString();
  h.masteryTierUpdatedAt=nowIso;
  h.lastMasteryEarnedAt=nowIso;
  queueInsight('mastery_tier_'+newTier);
  if(S&&S.user&&prev<1&&newTier>=1){S.user.masteriesTabBadgePending=true;}
  return true;
}
function bankHabitAfterLegendaryTierUp(h){
  const ts=Date.now();
  h.active=false;
  h.archived=true;
  h.archivedAt=ts;
}
function nextLegendaryPromptTierForHabit(h){
  if(!habitIsBankSlot(h))return null;
  const t=parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0;
  if(t<3||t>=7)return null;
  const wait=legendaryWaitMsForBankedTier(t);
  if(wait==null)return null;
  const earned=msFromAnyDate(h.lastMasteryEarnedAt||h.masteryTierUpdatedAt);
  let eligibleAt=earned+wait;
  if(h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs)eligibleAt=Math.max(eligibleAt,h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs);
  if(Date.now()<eligibleAt)return null;
  if(msFromAnyDate(h.masteryReactivationSnoozeUntil)>Date.now())return null;
  return t+1;
}
function findLegendaryPromptCandidate(){
  if(!S||!S.habits)return null;
  let best=null,bestAt=Infinity;
  for(let i=0;i<S.habits.length;i++){
    const h=S.habits[i];
    const next=nextLegendaryPromptTierForHabit(h);
    if(!next)continue;
    const t=parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0;
    const wait=legendaryWaitMsForBankedTier(t);
    const earned=msFromAnyDate(h.lastMasteryEarnedAt||h.masteryTierUpdatedAt);
    let eligibleAt=earned+wait;
    if(h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs)eligibleAt=Math.max(eligibleAt,h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs);
    if(eligibleAt<bestAt){bestAt=eligibleAt;best={h,nextTier:next};}
  }
  return best;
}
function legendaryBankPillHTML(h){
  if(!habitIsBankSlot(h))return'';
  if(nextLegendaryPromptTierForHabit(h))return'<span class="bank-reactive-pill">Reactivation ready</span>';
  const t=parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0;
  if(t<3||t>=7)return'';
  const wait=legendaryWaitMsForBankedTier(t);
  if(!wait)return'';
  const earned=msFromAnyDate(h.lastMasteryEarnedAt||h.masteryTierUpdatedAt);
  let eligibleAt=earned+wait;
  if(h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs)eligibleAt=Math.max(eligibleAt,h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs);
  if(msFromAnyDate(h.masteryReactivationSnoozeUntil)>Date.now())return'';
  const days=Math.ceil((eligibleAt-Date.now())/(24*3600000));
  if(days>0&&days<=60)return'<span class="bank-reactive-pill" style="opacity:.88">Maintenance window soon</span>';
  return'';
}
function syncHabitMasteryAwards(){
  if(!S||!Array.isArray(S.habits))return;
  for(let i=0;i<S.habits.length;i++){
    const h=S.habits[i];
    if(!h.active||h.archived)continue;
    const g=goalById(h.goalId);
    const goalOk=goalIsActive(g)||h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked;
    if(!goalOk)continue;
    const prev=parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0;
    if(h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked&&h.habitLegendarySinceWeek&&prev>=3&&prev<7){
      if(computeDeservedMasteryTierSince(h,h.habitLegendarySinceWeek)>=2){
        const next=prev+1;
        recordMasteryTierProgress(h,next);
        h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked=false;
        delete h.habitLegendarySinceWeek;
        delete h.legendaryMaintenancePromptAfterMs;
        bankHabitAfterLegendaryTierUp(h);
      }
      continue;
    }
    if(prev>=4)continue;
    const deserved=computeDeservedMasteryTier(h);
    const capped=Math.min(deserved,3);
    if(capped>prev)recordMasteryTierProgress(h,capped);
  }
}
function habitMasteryLevelDigit(tier){
  const t=Math.max(0,Math.min(7,parseInt(tier,10)||0));
  return t>=1?t:0;
}
function habitMasteryLevelName(t){
  const n=Math.max(0,Math.min(7,parseInt(t,10)||0));
  return MASTERY_LEVEL_NAMES[n]||'';
}
function habitMasteryRoman(t){
  const n=Math.max(0,Math.min(7,parseInt(t,10)||0));
  return['','I','II','III','IV','V','VI','VII'][n]||'';
}
function habitMasteryBadgeHTML(h, opts){
  opts=Object.assign({roman:true},opts||{});
  const t=habitMasteryLevelDigit(h.masteryTier);
  if(t<1)return'';
  const inner=opts.roman?habitMasteryRoman(t):String(t);
  const lab='Mastery Level '+t+(habitMasteryLevelName(t)?' — '+habitMasteryLevelName(t):'');
  const leg=t>=4?' mastery-badge--legendary':'';
  const cardCls=opts.masteryCard?' mastery-badge--mastery-card':'';
  return`<span class="mastery-badge${leg}${cardCls}" title="${escAttr(lab)}">${inner}</span>`;
}
function habitMasteryCardDashesHTML(tier){
  const t=Math.max(0,Math.min(7,parseInt(tier,10)||0));
  const cls=n=>(t>=n?' mastery-tier-dash--earned':'');
  return`<div class="mastery-tier-dashes" aria-hidden="true"><div class="mastery-tier-dash${cls(1)}"></div><div class="mastery-tier-dash${cls(2)}"></div><div class="mastery-tier-dash${cls(3)}"></div></div>`;
}
function masteryTierUpdatedAtMs(h){
  const u=(h&&h.lastMasteryEarnedAt)||(h&&h.masteryTierUpdatedAt);
  if(!u)return 0;
  const ms=Date.parse(String(u));
  return isNaN(ms)?0:ms;
}
function masteryLedgerSnapshotFromHabit(h){
  if(!h)return null;
  const t=parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0;
  if(t<1)return null;
  return{id:h.id,title:String(h.title||''),emoji:h.emoji||'🎯',masteryTier:t,lastMasteryEarnedAt:h.lastMasteryEarnedAt||null,masteryTierUpdatedAt:h.masteryTierUpdatedAt||null,listOrder:typeof h.listOrder==='number'?h.listOrder:0};
}
function pushMasteryLedgerSnapshot(snap){
  if(!S||!snap)return;
  if(!Array.isArray(S.masteryLedger))S.masteryLedger=[];
  const idx=S.masteryLedger.findIndex(e=>e.id===snap.id);
  if(idx>=0)S.masteryLedger[idx]=snap;else S.masteryLedger.push(snap);
}
function habitLikeFromMasteryLedger(e){
  return{id:e.id,title:e.title,emoji:e.emoji,masteryTier:e.masteryTier,lastMasteryEarnedAt:e.lastMasteryEarnedAt,masteryTierUpdatedAt:e.masteryTierUpdatedAt,listOrder:typeof e.listOrder==='number'?e.listOrder:0};
}
function masteryCardGlowClassForTier(tier){
  const t=Math.max(0,Math.min(7,parseInt(tier,10)||0));
  if(t<=0)return'glow-blue';
  if(t===1)return'glow-mastery-bronze';
  if(t===2)return'glow-mastery-silver';
  return'glow-mastery-gold';
}
function masteryTabMasteredHabitRows(){
  if(!S)return[];
  if(Array.isArray(S.masteryLedger)&&Array.isArray(S.habits))S.masteryLedger=S.masteryLedger.filter(e=>!S.habits.some(h=>h.id===e.id));
  const map=new Map();
  (S.habits||[]).forEach(h=>{if((parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0)>=1)map.set(h.id,h);});
  (S.masteryLedger||[]).forEach(e=>{const t=parseInt(e.masteryTier,10)||0;if(t<1||map.has(e.id))return;map.set(e.id,habitLikeFromMasteryLedger(e));});
  return sortMasteryTabHabits([...map.values()]);
}
function sortMasteryTabHabits(arr){
  const withBadge=[];
  const without=[];
  for(let i=0;i<arr.length;i++){
    const h=arr[i];
    if((parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0)>=1)withBadge.push(h);
    else without.push(h);
  }
  withBadge.sort((a,b)=>{
    const d=masteryTierUpdatedAtMs(b)-masteryTierUpdatedAtMs(a);
    if(d)return d;
    return habitListSort(a,b);
  });
  without.sort(habitListSort);
  return withBadge.concat(without);
}
function renderMastery(){
  const mount=document.getElementById('masteryBody');
  if(!mount)return;
  const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
  const actFilter=h=>h.active&&!h.archived&&(goalIsActive(goalById(h.goalId))||h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked);
  const mastered=masteryTabMasteredHabitRows();
  const workingToward=sortMasteryTabHabits(S.habits.filter(actFilter).filter(h=>(parseInt(h.masteryTier,10)||0)<1));
  if(!mastered.length&&!workingToward.length){
    mount.innerHTML=`<div class="card empty glow-blue"><div class="empty-icon">🏅</div><h3>${kid?'No habits to level up yet':'No habits yet'}</h3><p>${kid?'Add a habit and keep logging.':'Basic: goals use ISO weeks for consistency and recovery. Premium mastery compares actual logging to the minimum implied by your weekly habit (threshold × days ÷ 7) over 27 / 54 / 81 days at ≥70% / ≥80% / ≥90%.'}</p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  const row=h=>{
    const awarded=habitMasteryLevelDigit(h.masteryTier);
    const glow=masteryCardGlowClassForTier(awarded);
    const tierTitle=awarded>=1&&habitMasteryLevelName(awarded)?`<div class="mastery-card-tier-name"><strong>${escDash(habitMasteryLevelName(awarded))}</strong></div>`:'';
    const badgeSlot=awarded>=1?`<div class="mastery-badge-slot">${habitMasteryBadgeHTML(h,{masteryCard:true})}</div>`:'<div class="mastery-badge-slot"></div>';
    const dashes=habitMasteryCardDashesHTML(h.masteryTier);
    return`<div class="card config-card mastery-card ${glow}"><div class="config-head mastery-card-head">${habitEmojiDisplayHTML(h.emoji)}<div class="mastery-card-title-block"><div class="habit-name-row"><span class="goal-title">${escDash(h.title)}</span></div>${tierTitle}</div>${badgeSlot}${dashes}</div></div>`;
  };
  let html='';
  if(mastered.length)html+=`<div class="mastery-habit-list">${mastered.map(row).join('')}</div>`;
  if(workingToward.length)html+=`<div class="mastery-habit-list"${mastered.length?' style="margin-top:var(--s6)"':''}>${workingToward.map(row).join('')}</div>`;
  mount.innerHTML=html;
}
function syncPremiumTabs(){
  const prem=typeof isPremiumAccount==='function'&&isPremiumAccount();
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab[data-tab-premium="1"]').forEach(el=>{
    el.classList.toggle('tab--premium-locked',!prem);
    const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();
    el.title=prem?'':(kid?'Premium tab — ask a grown-up to pick Premium in Settings.':'Premium tab — choose Premium under Settings → Account plan (beta).');
  });
}
const REMINDER_DEBUG_ACCOUNT_EMAIL='dr.statiris@gmail.com';
const REMINDER_DEBUG_TAB_LS_KEY='evolve-reminder-debug-tab';
function reminderDebugUserAllowed(){const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;if(!u||!u.email)return false;return String(u.email).toLowerCase().trim()===REMINDER_DEBUG_ACCOUNT_EMAIL;}
function reminderDebugTabEnabledRead(){try{return localStorage.getItem(REMINDER_DEBUG_TAB_LS_KEY)==='1';}catch(e){return false;}}
function reminderDebugTabEnabledWrite(on){try{localStorage.setItem(REMINDER_DEBUG_TAB_LS_KEY,on?'1':'0');}catch(e){}}
function reminderDebugTabVisible(){return reminderDebugUserAllowed()&&reminderDebugTabEnabledRead();}
function syncReminderDebugSettingsUI(){const wrap=document.getElementById('advancedReminderDebugWrap');const btn=document.getElementById('sReminderDebugTab');const allowed=reminderDebugUserAllowed();if(wrap)wrap.hidden=!allowed;if(btn&&allowed)uiToggleSet(btn,reminderDebugTabEnabledRead());}
function toggleReminderDebugTabFromUI(){const el=document.getElementById('sReminderDebugTab');if(!el||!reminderDebugUserAllowed())return;const want=!uiToggleIsOn(el);uiToggleSet(el,want);reminderDebugTabEnabledWrite(want);syncReminderDebugTabVisibility();}
function syncReminderDebugTabVisibility(){const b=document.getElementById('tabReminderDebugBtn');if(!b)return;const show=reminderDebugTabVisible();b.hidden=!show;b.style.display=show?'':'none';if(!show){const p=document.getElementById('tab-reminderDebug');if(p&&p.classList.contains('active')){const d=document.querySelector('[data-guided-tour="tab-home"]');if(d)switchTab('dashboard',d);}}}
function normalizeReminderFireKey(iso){try{return new Date(iso).toISOString();}catch(e){return String(iso||'');}}
function reminderRowIsHabitClock(r){return String(r&&r.slot_key||'').indexOf('hrd:')===0;}
function reminderRowIsSundayClose(r){const sk=String(r&&r.slot_key||'');const tg=String(r&&r.tag||'');return/^sun_/.test(tg)||/^sun_/.test(sk);}
function countReminderRowsByKind(arr){const a=arr||[];let habit=0,sun=0,other=0;a.forEach(function(r){if(reminderRowIsHabitClock(r))habit++;else if(reminderRowIsSundayClose(r))sun++;else other++;});return{habit,sun,other};}
function reminderDebugRowKey(sk,iso){return String(sk||'')+'\0'+normalizeReminderFireKey(iso);}
function reminderDebugHabitLabel(slot_key,tag){
  const sk=String(slot_key||'');const tg=String(tag||'');
  if(sk.indexOf('hrd:')===0||tg.indexOf('hrd:')===0){
    const hid=habitIdFromHabitReminderTag(tg)||habitIdFromHabitReminderTag(sk);
    const em=emojiFromHabitReminderTag(tg);
    const h=hid&&typeof habitById==='function'?habitById(hid):null;
    if(h)return(String(h.emoji||em||'').trim()+' '+String(h.title||'').trim()).trim().slice(0,48)||'Habit';
    if(em)return em+' Habit';
    if(hid)return String(hid);
  }
  if(sk.indexOf('_tempPush')===0)return 'Test push';
  if(tg==='habits_morning'||sk.indexOf('habits_morning')===0)return 'Daily nudge (morning)';
  if(tg==='habits_day'||sk.indexOf('habits_day')===0)return 'Daily nudge (unlogged)';
  if(/^sun_/.test(tg)||/^sun_/.test(sk))return 'Sunday week-close';
  return String(tg||sk.split(':')[0]||'—');
}
function reminderDebugSyncNow(){if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync('full');setTimeout(function(){void renderReminderDebugTab();},900);}
async function renderReminderDebugTab(){
  const mount=document.getElementById('reminderDebugBody');const meta=document.getElementById('reminderDebugMeta');const statusEl=document.getElementById('reminderDebugStatus');
  if(!mount)return;
  if(!reminderDebugTabVisible()){mount.innerHTML='<p class="small-note">Not available.</p>';if(meta)meta.textContent='';if(statusEl){statusEl.hidden=true;statusEl.innerHTML='';}return;}
  mount.innerHTML='<p class="small-note">Loading…</p>';
  if(statusEl){statusEl.hidden=true;statusEl.innerHTML='';}
  try{
  const liveRows=buildExactReminderScheduleRowsForSupabase(reminderSyncMaxFireMs('full'));
  const previewRows=buildExactReminderScheduleRowsForSupabase(reminderSyncMaxFireMs('full'),{debugPreview:true});
  const notifyOn=!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.browserNotifyEnabled);
  const paused=!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.trackingPaused);
  const stopped=!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.trackingStopped);
  const perm=typeof Notification!=='undefined'?Notification.permission:'n/a';
  const vapidOk=typeof CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY==='string'&&!!CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY.trim();
  const nowMs=Date.now();
  let srvRows=[];let srvErr='';let pushSubs=[];let pushErr='';
  const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;
  if(_supa&&u&&u.id&&_authSession){
    const q=await _supa.from('reminder_schedule').select('slot_key,fire_at_utc,sent_at,tag,body').eq('user_id',u.id).order('fire_at_utc',{ascending:true});
    if(q.error)srvErr=q.error.message||String(q.error);else srvRows=q.data||[];
    const ps=await _supa.from('push_subscriptions').select('id,endpoint,created_at').eq('user_id',u.id);
    if(ps.error)pushErr=ps.error.message||String(ps.error);else pushSubs=ps.data||[];
  }else if(!_supa)srvErr='No Supabase client';else if(!_authSession)srvErr='Sign in required for server rows';
  const overdue=(srvRows||[]).filter(function(r){if(!r||r.sent_at)return false;const t=new Date(r.fire_at_utc).getTime();return isFinite(t)&&t<=nowMs;});
  const pending=(srvRows||[]).filter(function(r){return r&&!r.sent_at;});
  const issues=[];const ok=[];
  if(perm!=='granted')issues.push('Notification permission is <strong>'+escAttr(perm)+'</strong> — allow notifications in your browser or phone settings.');
  else ok.push('Notification permission granted.');
  if(paused)issues.push('Tracking is <strong>paused</strong> — reminders are cleared.');
  if(stopped)issues.push('Tracking is <strong>stopped</strong> — reminders are cleared.');
  if(!_authSession)issues.push('No live Supabase session — sign in so the app can write <code>reminder_schedule</code> and <code>push_subscriptions</code>.');
  else ok.push('Signed in with live session.');
  if(!vapidOk)issues.push('<code>CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY</code> is empty in the app — push subscription cannot be created.');
  else ok.push('VAPID public key set in client.');
  if(notifyOn&&perm==='granted'&&_authSession&&!pushErr&&!pushSubs.length)issues.push('No row in <code>push_subscriptions</code> — tap <strong>Sync now</strong>, keep this PWA open a few seconds, then refresh.');
  else if(pushSubs.length)ok.push(pushSubs.length+' push subscription(s) on server.');
  if(overdue.length)issues.push('<strong>'+overdue.length+'</strong> reminder(s) are past due but still <code>pend</code> — the <code>push-reminders</code> cron is probably not calling the Edge Function (see checklist below).');
  else if(pending.length)ok.push(pending.length+' pending reminder(s) queued; none overdue yet.');
  if(statusEl){
    const esc=typeof escHTML==='function'?escHTML:function(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');};
    let sh='<strong>Delivery checklist</strong><ul>';
    issues.forEach(function(x){sh+='<li>'+x+'</li>';});
    ok.forEach(function(x){sh+='<li>'+esc(x)+'</li>';});
    if(issues.length){
      sh+='</ul><p class="small-note" style="margin:var(--s3) 0 0;line-height:1.55">If rows show <code>Up ✓</code> but nothing rings: in Supabase Dashboard → Edge Functions → <code>push-reminders</code> → add a schedule (every 3–5 min) <strong>POST</strong> with header <code>x-cron-secret</code>. Also confirm secrets <code>VAPID_*</code> and <code>CRON_SECRET</code> match the app. See <code>supabase/setup/push-reminders-cron.sql</code>.</p>';
      statusEl.className='reminder-debug-status reminder-debug-status--warn';
    }else{
      sh+='</ul><p class="small-note" style="margin:var(--s3) 0 0">Client side looks ready. If a due time passes with no notification, verify the Supabase cron invokes <code>push-reminders</code>.</p>';
      statusEl.className='reminder-debug-status reminder-debug-status--ok';
    }
    statusEl.innerHTML=sh;statusEl.hidden=false;
  }
  const srvMap=new Map();
  (srvRows||[]).forEach(function(r){if(!r)return;const k=reminderDebugRowKey(r.slot_key,r.fire_at_utc);srvMap.set(k,r);});
  const liveKeySet=new Set();
  liveRows.forEach(function(r){liveKeySet.add(reminderDebugRowKey(r.slot_key,r.fire_at_utc));});
  const previewKeySet=new Set();
  const rowsOut=[];
  previewRows.forEach(function(r){
    const k=reminderDebugRowKey(r.slot_key,r.fire_at_utc);
    if(previewKeySet.has(k))return;
    previewKeySet.add(k);
    const sr=srvMap.get(k);
    const liv=liveKeySet.has(k);
    rowsOut.push({slot_key:r.slot_key,fire_at_utc:r.fire_at_utc,habit:reminderDebugHabitLabel(r.slot_key,r.tag),up:!!sr,tx:sr?(sr.sent_at?'sent':'pend'):'—',liv:liv});
  });
  (srvRows||[]).forEach(function(r){
    const k=reminderDebugRowKey(r.slot_key,r.fire_at_utc);
    if(previewKeySet.has(k))return;
    rowsOut.push({slot_key:r.slot_key,fire_at_utc:r.fire_at_utc,habit:reminderDebugHabitLabel(r.slot_key,r.tag),up:true,tx:r.sent_at?'sent':'pend',srvOnly:true,liv:false});
  });
  rowsOut.sort(function(a,b){return new Date(a.fire_at_utc)-new Date(b.fire_at_utc);});
  if(meta){
    const lk=countReminderRowsByKind(liveRows);
    meta.textContent='Live sync rows: '+liveRows.length+' (habit today: '+lk.habit+', Sunday: '+lk.sun+(lk.other?', other: '+lk.other:'')+'). Preview: '+previewRows.length+'. Server: '+(srvRows?srvRows.length:0)+' ('+pending.length+' pending, '+overdue.length+' overdue). Subs: '+(pushErr?'err':pushSubs.length)+'. Profile reminders: '+(notifyOn?'on':'off')+'. Permission: '+perm+(srvErr?' · '+srvErr:'')+(pushErr?' · '+pushErr:'');
  }
  if(!rowsOut.length){
    mount.innerHTML='<p class="small-note">No preview rows in the next 7 days. Add habits with daily reminder times, or check a profile with data.</p>';
    return;
  }
  const esc=typeof escHTML==='function'?escHTML:function(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');};
  let tb='<table class="reminder-debug-table"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Time</th><th>Habit</th><th>Liv</th><th>Up</th><th>Tx</th><th>Slot</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
  rowsOut.forEach(function(row){
    let d=new Date(row.fire_at_utc);
    const dateStr=isNaN(d.getTime())?'—':new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA',{dateStyle:'short'}).format(d);
    const timeStr=isNaN(d.getTime())?'—':new Intl.DateTimeFormat(undefined,{timeStyle:'short'}).format(d);
    const liv=row.liv?'✓':'—';
    const up=row.up?'✓':'—';
    const tx=esc(String(row.tx));
    const slo=esc(String(row.slot_key||'').slice(0,56));
    tb+='<tr><td>'+esc(dateStr)+'</td><td>'+esc(timeStr)+'</td><td>'+esc(String(row.habit))+'</td><td>'+liv+'</td><td>'+up+'</td><td>'+tx+'</td><td><code>'+slo+(String(row.slot_key||'').length>56?'…':'')+'</code></td></tr>';
  });
  tb+='</tbody></table>';
  mount.innerHTML=tb;
  }catch(e){
    console.error('[reminderDebug]',e);
    mount.innerHTML='<p class="small-note">Could not load reminder table. Try Refresh, or update the app if this persists.</p>';
    if(meta)meta.textContent='Error: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:String(e));
  }
}
function habitEffectiveTier(h,wk){
  if(!h||!wk)return'core';
  const wd=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk];
  const hd=wd&&wd.habitData&&wd.habitData[h.id];
  const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);
  const weekEnded=off!==null&&isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(off);
  if(hd&&(hd.locked===true||weekEnded)){
    if(hd.tierAtLock==='growth'||hd.tierAtLock==='core')return hd.tierAtLock;
  }
  return h.tier==='growth'?'growth':'core';
}
function weekGoalConsistent(goalId,wk){const habits=habitsForGoalInWeek(goalId,wk);const core=habits.filter(h=>habitEffectiveTier(h,wk)==='core'&&habitAppliesToConsistencyWeek(h,wk));if(!core.length)return false;return core.every(h=>qualifies(h,wk));}
/** At least one habit qualified this week — the goal’s weekly treat is earned (first qualifying habit unlocks it). */
function goalWeeklyTreatEarned(goalId,wk){return habitsForGoalInWeek(goalId,wk).some(h=>qualifies(h,wk));}
/* trackedWeeksForGoal: Monday-start keys from goal start through this week’s Monday, only where the week counts toward the disc (week fully closed after midnight Sunday local lock). */
function trackedWeeksForGoal(goal){const start=weekStartFromDate(goal.startDate||S.user.startDate);const currentMonday=weekDates(0)[0];const keys=[];let ptr=new Date(start);while(ptr<=currentMonday){const k=dateToWeekKey(ptr);if(weekCountsTowardDisc(goal,k))keys.push(k);ptr.setDate(ptr.getDate()+7);}return keys;}
/** £ toward goal pot for one habit-week; growth = £0 while in recovery. Banked pot ignores weeks at/before `potExcludedUpToWeekKey` unless forHistory (History tab keeps literal £ earned that week). */
function habitPotContribution(h,wk,g,forHistory){if(!qualifies(h,wk))return 0;if(!g)g=goalById(h.goalId);if(!g)return Number(h.pot)||0;const tl=getRecoveryTimeline(g);const cutoff=tl.potExcludedUpToWeekKey;if(!forHistory&&cutoff&&weekKeyAtOrBeforePotCutoff(wk,cutoff))return 0;const rec=goalRecoveryActiveForWeek(g,wk,tl);const tier=habitEffectiveTier(h,wk);if(rec&&tier==='growth')return 0;const base=Number(h.pot)||0;if(rec&&tier==='core'&&g.recoveryBoostEnabled)return Math.ceil(base*1.3);return base;}
function goalWeekPotSumForHistory(wk,g){let s=0;habitsForGoalInWeek(g.id,wk).forEach(h=>{s+=habitPotContribution(h,wk,g,true);});return s;}
function habitPotCapForWeek(h,wk,g){if(!g)g=goalById(h.goalId);if(!g)return Number(h.pot)||0;const tl=getRecoveryTimeline(g);const cutoff=tl.potExcludedUpToWeekKey;if(cutoff&&weekKeyAtOrBeforePotCutoff(wk,cutoff))return 0;const rec=goalRecoveryActiveForWeek(g,wk,tl);const tier=habitEffectiveTier(h,wk);if(rec&&tier==='growth')return 0;const base=Number(h.pot)||0;if(rec&&tier==='core'&&g.recoveryBoostEnabled)return Math.ceil(base*1.3);return base;}
function habitPotTrackerSubline(h,wk){const g=goalById(h.goalId);const potAmt=Number(h.pot)||0;const fmtPot=(n)=>g&&g.goalType==='points'?Math.round(Number(n)||0)+' pts':fmtMoney(n);if(!g)return fmtPot(potAmt)+'/week if qualified';const tl=getRecoveryTimeline(g);const cutoff=tl.potExcludedUpToWeekKey;if(cutoff&&weekKeyAtOrBeforePotCutoff(wk,cutoff))return fmtMoney(0)+' toward pot (week before reset)';const rec=goalRecoveryActiveForWeek(g,wk,tl);const tier=habitEffectiveTier(h,wk);if(rec&&tier==='growth')return fmtMoney(0)+' toward pot (recovery — core only)';if(rec&&tier==='core'&&g.recoveryBoostEnabled)return fmtPot(Math.ceil(potAmt*1.3))+'/week (recovery boost)';return fmtPot(potAmt)+'/week if qualified';}
function computeGoalPotTotalForGoal(g){if(!g)return 0;const cf=goalPotTotalCacheFingerprint();if(cf!==_goalPotTotalCacheFp){_goalPotTotalCacheFp=cf;_goalPotTotalCache.clear();}if(_goalPotTotalCache.has(g.id))return _goalPotTotalCache.get(g.id);const keys=trackedWeeksForGoal(g);let pot=0;keys.forEach(wk=>{habitsForGoalInWeek(g.id,wk).forEach(h=>{pot+=habitPotContribution(h,wk,g);});});_goalPotTotalCache.set(g.id,pot);return pot;}
/* goalStats: rolling % excludes weeks at/before potExcludedUpToWeekKey after a hard drop, unless ignorePotExcludeForRollingPct (new savings milestone after hitting a target). Pot £ still honours the cutoff via habitPotContribution. */
function goalStatsInner(goal){const keys=trackedWeeksForGoal(goal);const rawEx=goal.potExcludedUpToWeekKey||'';const ex=goal.ignorePotExcludeForRollingPct?'':rawEx;const weeksForPct=ex?keys.filter(k=>compareIsoWeekKeys(k,ex)>0):keys.slice();const pot=computeGoalPotTotalForGoal(goal);const wkLive=weekKey(0);const thisWeekQualified=goalWeeklyTreatEarned(goal.id,wkLive);const thisWeekConsistent=weekGoalConsistent(goal.id,wkLive);const weeksAllTime=keys.length;if(!keys.length)return{weeks:0,pct:null,consistent:0,pot,thisWeekQualified,thisWeekConsistent,weeksAllTime:0};const consistentPctWeeks=weeksForPct.filter(k=>weekGoalConsistentForDisc(goal.id,k)).length;if(!weeksForPct.length)return{weeks:0,pct:null,consistent:0,pot,thisWeekQualified,thisWeekConsistent,weeksAllTime};const pct=Math.round((consistentPctWeeks/weeksForPct.length)*100);return{weeks:weeksForPct.length,pct,consistent:consistentPctWeeks,pot,thisWeekQualified,thisWeekConsistent,weeksAllTime};}
function goalStats(goal){if(_renderPassCache&&goal&&goal.id&&_renderPassCache.goalStats.has(goal.id))return _renderPassCache.goalStats.get(goal.id);const st=goalStatsInner(goal);if(_renderPassCache&&goal&&goal.id)_renderPassCache.goalStats.set(goal.id,st);return st;}
/** Advance recovery state; call before rendering. Returns true if profile should save. */
function syncAllGoalRecovery(){if(!S||!S.goals)return false;let touched=false;activeGoals().forEach(g=>{let recActive,cutoff,latestClosed='';if(goalRecoveryDeferredFirstWeek(g)){recActive=false;cutoff=g.potExcludedUpToWeekKey||'';}else{const tl=computeRecoveryTimeline(g);recActive=tl.recoveryActive;cutoff=tl.potExcludedUpToWeekKey;latestClosed=tl.weeks.length?tl.weeks[tl.weeks.length-1]:'';}const before=g.potExcludedUpToWeekKey||'';if(cutoff!==before){if(cutoff&&cutoff===latestClosed&&_potResetSupportQueue)_potResetSupportQueue.push({name:g.name,emoji:g.emoji});g.potExcludedUpToWeekKey=cutoff;if(cutoff)g.ignorePotExcludeForRollingPct=false;touched=true;}if(!!g.recoveryActive!==!!recActive){g.recoveryActive=recActive;touched=true;}if(!recActive&&g.recoveryLastPct!==null&&g.recoveryLastPct!==undefined){g.recoveryLastPct=null;touched=true;}});return touched;}
function openGaugeNoDataModal(){openM('mGaugeNoData');}
function gaugeTone(pct){if(pct===null)return{cls:'glow-blue',color:'var(--blue)',label:'Tracking starts soon',disc:'blue'};if(pct>=90)return{cls:'glow-green',color:'var(--green)',label:'Excellent',disc:'green'};if(pct>=80)return{cls:'glow-amber',color:'var(--amber)',label:'On threshold',disc:'amber'};return{cls:'glow-red',color:'var(--red)',label:'Needs attention',disc:'red'};}
function pctText(p){return p===null?'—':p+'%';}
function pctPillPart(p){const tip="Rolling % uses closed weeks in the current chapter only. After a strict drop reset, that starts at 0% until new weeks close. A week enters after midnight Sunday lock. This week's £ (not yet in the banked pot) shows on the dashboard / Log.";return p===null?'<span class="pill-no-pct" title="'+escAttr(tip)+'">No score yet</span>':'<span class="pill-pct" title="'+escAttr(tip)+'">'+p+'%</span>';}
function pctConsistentLine(p){return p===null?'No consistency score yet — keep logging weeks.':`${pctText(p)} consistent`;}
function goalConsistencyMetaHTML(pct,weeksChapter,weeksAllTime,labelText){const tone=gaugeTone(pct);const chip=tone.cls==='glow-green'?'chip-green':tone.cls==='glow-amber'?'chip-amber':tone.cls==='glow-red'?'chip-red':'chip-blue';const val=pct===null?'—':pct+'%';const wTot=typeof weeksAllTime==='number'?weeksAllTime:weeksChapter;const leadWeeks=weeksChapter;return`<div class="goal-consistency-meta"><div class="meta-chip ${chip}">${labelText||tone.label}</div><div class="goal-consistency-lead">${pct===null?'Waiting for more data':`You are ${val} consistent over ${leadWeeks} week${leadWeeks===1?'':'s'}`}</div><div class="small-note">Tracked for ${wTot} week${wTot!==1?'s':''} so far.</div></div>`;}
