function consistencyDiscHTML(pct,gid){const tone=gaugeTone(pct);const d=tone.disc;const noPct=pct===null;const inner=noPct?`<span class="consistency-disc-val">—</span>`:`<span class="consistency-disc-val">${pct}</span><span class="consistency-disc-pct">%</span>`;let a11y='';if(noPct){a11y=' role="button" tabindex="0" onclick="openGaugeNoDataModal()" onkeydown="if(event.key===\'Enter\'||event.key===\' \'){event.preventDefault();openGaugeNoDataModal();}" aria-label="Why there is no percentage yet — open explanation"';}else if(gid){a11y=' role="button" tabindex="0" onclick="openConsistencyDiscTourForGoal(\''+gid+'\')" onkeydown="if(event.key===\'Enter\'||event.key===\' \'){event.preventDefault();openConsistencyDiscTourForGoal(\''+gid+'\');}" aria-label="Open Consistency and recovery guide"';}const clickCls=noPct||gid?' consistency-disc--clickable':'';return`<div class="consistency-disc consistency-disc--${d}${clickCls}"${a11y}><div class="consistency-disc-inner">${inner}</div></div>`;}
function escDash(s){return String(s||'').replace(/</g,'&lt;');}
function collectionButtonLabel(){const n=(S.insights.unlocked||[]).length;const tot=INSIGHT_LIBRARY.length;return useKidsLanguage()?`Fun facts ${n}/${tot}`:`Insights ${n}/${tot}`;}
function refreshCollectionButtons(){const t='📚 '+collectionButtonLabel();const b=document.getElementById('btnInsightCollectionSettings');if(b)b.textContent=t;}
const DASH_INSIGHT_SESSION_KEY='consistencyDashInsightId';
const _scrambleChars='ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789!?@#&*%';
const DASH_INSIGHT_GROW_MS=350;
const DASH_INSIGHT_SHRINK_MS=500;
const DASH_INSIGHT_HEIGHT_PAUSE_MS=180;
const DASH_INSIGHT_CYCLE_SCRAMBLE_MS=550;
const DASH_INSIGHT_CYCLE_REVEAL_MS=1800;
const DASH_INSIGHT_REVEAL_MS=2200;
let _dashCarouselTimer=null;let _dashCarouselIdx=0;
let _dashCycleAnimId=null;let _dashHeightAnimCleanup=null;
function scrambleText(text){return text.split('').map(c=>c===' '?' ':_scrambleChars[Math.floor(Math.random()*_scrambleChars.length)]).join('');}
function clipInsightBody(ins){const d=insightForDisplay(ins);const body=(d.body||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return body.length>420?body.slice(0,417)+'…':body;}
function insightSourceHTML(ins){const srcDef=useKidsLanguage()?'More info':'Source';const blogDef=useKidsLanguage()?'Extra read':'Blog';let html='';const extUrl=absolutizeInsightSourceUrl(ins.sourceUrl);if(extUrl)html+=`<a href="${escInsightHtml(extUrl)}" class="insight-library-card-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${escInsightHtml(ins.sourceText||srcDef)}</a>`;else if(ins.sourceText)html+=`<span class="small-note">${escInsightHtml(ins.sourceText)}</span>`;if(ins.blogUrl){const bUrl=absolutizeInsightSourceUrl(ins.blogUrl);if(bUrl){if(html)html+=' · ';html+=`<a href="${escInsightHtml(bUrl)}" class="insight-library-card-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${escInsightHtml(ins.blogText||blogDef)}</a>`;}}return html?`<div class="dashboard-insight-source">${html}</div>`:'';}
function hasPendingNewInsight(){const unlocked=S.insights.unlocked||[];return unlocked.length>((S.insights.dashRevealedUpTo)||0);}
function newestUnrevealedInsightId(){const unlocked=S.insights.unlocked||[];const upTo=S.insights.dashRevealedUpTo||0;return unlocked.length>upTo?unlocked[unlocked.length-1]:null;}
function pickDashInsightDisplay(){const unlocked=S.insights.unlocked||[];if(!unlocked.length)return{id:null,isNew:false};const newId=newestUnrevealedInsightId();if(newId)return{id:newId,isNew:true};let id=null;try{id=sessionStorage.getItem(DASH_INSIGHT_SESSION_KEY);}catch(e){}if(id&&unlocked.includes(id))return{id,isNew:false};id=unlocked[Math.floor(Math.random()*unlocked.length)];try{sessionStorage.setItem(DASH_INSIGHT_SESSION_KEY,id);}catch(e){}return{id,isNew:false};}
function dashInsightScrambleString(text){return scrambleText(text);}
function dashInsightAnimActive(){const el=document.getElementById('dashInsightBody');return!!(el&&(el.dataset.cycling||el.dataset.unscrambling));}
function dashInsightVisibleEl(bodyEl){return bodyEl.querySelector('.dash-insight-anim-text')||bodyEl;}
function dashInsightReadText(bodyEl){return dashInsightVisibleEl(bodyEl).textContent||'';}
function dashInsightWriteText(bodyEl,text){dashInsightVisibleEl(bodyEl).textContent=text;}
function dashInsightBeginAnimShell(bodyEl,ghostText){let ghost=bodyEl.querySelector('.dash-insight-layout-ghost');let vis=bodyEl.querySelector('.dash-insight-anim-text');if(!vis){const cur=bodyEl.textContent||'';bodyEl.textContent='';bodyEl.classList.add('dash-insight-anim-shell');ghost=document.createElement('span');ghost.className='dash-insight-layout-ghost';ghost.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');vis=document.createElement('span');vis.className='dash-insight-anim-text';vis.textContent=cur;bodyEl.appendChild(ghost);bodyEl.appendChild(vis);}else if(!ghost){ghost=document.createElement('span');ghost.className='dash-insight-layout-ghost';ghost.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');bodyEl.insertBefore(ghost,vis);}if(ghostText!=null)ghost.textContent=ghostText;return vis;}
function dashInsightEndAnimShell(bodyEl,finalText){bodyEl.classList.remove('dash-insight-anim-shell');bodyEl.textContent=finalText;}
function cancelDashInsightHeightAnim(){if(_dashHeightAnimCleanup){_dashHeightAnimCleanup();_dashHeightAnimCleanup=null;}}
function lockDashInsightStaticHeight(container,h){if(!container)return;container.classList.add('dash-insight-height-anim');container.style.height=h+'px';container.style.transition='none';container.offsetHeight;}
function releaseDashInsightStaticHeight(container){if(!container)return;container.style.height='';container.style.transition='';container.classList.remove('dash-insight-height-anim');cancelDashInsightHeightAnim();}
function animateDashInsightStaticHeight(container,targetH,dur,cb){if(!container){if(cb)cb();return;}cancelDashInsightHeightAnim();container.classList.add('dash-insight-height-anim');container.style.transition='height '+dur+'ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)';container.style.height=targetH+'px';let done=false;const finish=()=>{if(done)return;done=true;container.removeEventListener('transitionend',onEnd);clearTimeout(fallback);_dashHeightAnimCleanup=null;if(cb)cb();};const onEnd=e=>{if(e.target===container&&e.propertyName==='height')finish();};container.addEventListener('transitionend',onEnd);const fallback=setTimeout(finish,dur+120);_dashHeightAnimCleanup=finish;}
function measureDashInsightStaticHeight(container,el,hint,src,apply){if(!container)return 0;const save={html:el.innerHTML,text:el.textContent,hd:hint?hint.style.display:'',sd:src?src.style.display:'',si:src?src.innerHTML:'',so:src?src.style.opacity:''};el.classList.remove('dash-insight-anim-shell');apply();const h=container.offsetHeight;if(save.html)el.innerHTML=save.html;else el.textContent=save.text;if(hint)hint.style.display=save.hd;if(src){src.innerHTML=save.si;src.style.display=save.sd;src.style.opacity=save.so;}return h;}
function runDashInsightUnscrambleReveal(bodyEl,clip,duration,onDone){const vis=dashInsightVisibleEl(bodyEl);const len=clip.length;const t0=performance.now();function frame(now){const elapsed=now-t0;const progress=Math.min(1,elapsed/duration);const eased=1-Math.pow(1-progress,2.5);const revealed=Math.floor(eased*len);let display='';for(let i=0;i<len;i++){if(i<revealed)display+=clip[i];else if(clip[i]===' ')display+=' ';else display+=_scrambleChars[Math.floor(Math.random()*_scrambleChars.length)];}vis.textContent=display;if(revealed<len)_dashCycleAnimId=requestAnimationFrame(frame);else{_dashCycleAnimId=null;if(onDone)onDone();}}_dashCycleAnimId=requestAnimationFrame(frame);}
function runDashInsightScrambleOut(bodyEl,text,duration,onDone){const vis=dashInsightVisibleEl(bodyEl);const len=text.length;const t0=performance.now();function frame(now){const elapsed=now-t0;const progress=Math.min(1,elapsed/duration);const sc=Math.floor(progress*len);let d='';for(let i=0;i<len;i++){if(i<sc)d+=_scrambleChars[Math.floor(Math.random()*_scrambleChars.length)];else d+=text[i]===' '?' ':text[i];}vis.textContent=d;if(progress<1)_dashCycleAnimId=requestAnimationFrame(frame);else{_dashCycleAnimId=null;if(onDone)onDone();}}_dashCycleAnimId=requestAnimationFrame(frame);}
function unscrambleDashInsight(id){const el=document.getElementById('dashInsightBody');if(!el||el.dataset.unscrambling)return;el.dataset.unscrambling='1';const ins=INSIGHT_LIBRARY.find(x=>x.id===id);if(!ins){delete el.dataset.unscrambling;return;}const clip=clipInsightBody(ins);el.classList.remove('dash-insight-scrambled');el.classList.add('dash-insight-unscrambling');const bx=el.closest('.dash-insight-new-box');if(bx){bx.classList.remove('dash-insight-new-box');bx.style.cursor='';bx.removeAttribute('onclick');}const container=el.closest('.dashboard-insight-static');const hint=document.getElementById('dashInsightHint');const src=document.getElementById('dashInsightSource');const srcHtml=insightSourceHTML(insightForDisplay(ins));const startH=container?container.offsetHeight:0;const targetH=container?measureDashInsightStaticHeight(container,el,hint,src,()=>{el.textContent=clip;if(hint)hint.style.display='none';if(src){src.innerHTML=srcHtml;src.style.display='';}}):startH;const growsH=container&&targetH>startH;const shrinksH=container&&startH>targetH+2;const letterBoxH=Math.max(startH,targetH);const finish=()=>{el.classList.remove('dash-insight-unscrambling');dashInsightEndAnimShell(el,clip);if(hint)hint.style.display='none';if(src){src.innerHTML=srcHtml;src.style.display='';}releaseDashInsightStaticHeight(container);delete el.dataset.unscrambling;S.insights.dashRevealedUpTo=(S.insights.unlocked||[]).length;save();initDashInsightCarousel();if(S&&S.user&&!S.user.dashboardBlockTourSeen)setTimeout(()=>maybeStartDashboardBlockTour(),720);};const startReveal=()=>{dashInsightBeginAnimShell(el,clip);runDashInsightUnscrambleReveal(el,clip,DASH_INSIGHT_REVEAL_MS,()=>{if(shrinksH)animateDashInsightStaticHeight(container,targetH,DASH_INSIGHT_SHRINK_MS,finish);else finish();});};if(container)lockDashInsightStaticHeight(container,growsH?startH:letterBoxH);if(growsH){animateDashInsightStaticHeight(container,targetH,DASH_INSIGHT_GROW_MS,()=>{setTimeout(startReveal,DASH_INSIGHT_HEIGHT_PAUSE_MS);});}else startReveal();}
function stopDashInsightCarousel(){if(_dashCarouselTimer){clearInterval(_dashCarouselTimer);_dashCarouselTimer=null;}if(_dashCycleAnimId){cancelAnimationFrame(_dashCycleAnimId);_dashCycleAnimId=null;}cancelDashInsightHeightAnim();}
function pauseDashInsightCarouselTimer(){if(_dashCarouselTimer){clearInterval(_dashCarouselTimer);_dashCarouselTimer=null;}}
let _dashHoldAbort=null;let _dashHoldDelayTimer=null;
function bindDashInsightHoldPause(){if(_dashHoldAbort){try{_dashHoldAbort.abort();}catch(e){}_dashHoldAbort=null;}if(_dashHoldDelayTimer){clearTimeout(_dashHoldDelayTimer);_dashHoldDelayTimer=null;}const el=document.getElementById('dashInsightHoldTarget');if(!el)return;_dashHoldAbort=new AbortController();const sig=_dashHoldAbort.signal;let paused=false;let tracking=false;let startX=0,startY=0,swipeDx=0;const swipeThreshold=()=>Math.min(72,Math.max(44,el.offsetWidth*0.14));el.addEventListener('pointerdown',e=>{if(e.button!==0&&e.pointerType==='mouse')return;if(hasPendingNewInsight())return;const unlocked=S.insights.unlocked||[];if(unlocked.length<=1)return;if(document.getElementById('dashInsightBody')?.dataset.cycling)return;tracking=true;startX=e.clientX;startY=e.clientY;swipeDx=0;try{if(e.pointerId!=null)el.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_e){}_dashHoldDelayTimer=setTimeout(()=>{_dashHoldDelayTimer=null;if(!tracking||Math.abs(swipeDx)>12)return;if(unlocked.length>1&&!_dashCarouselTimer)initDashInsightCarousel();if(!_dashCarouselTimer)return;pauseDashInsightCarouselTimer();paused=true;el.classList.add('dash-insight-hold-paused');},240);},{signal:sig});el.addEventListener('pointermove',e=>{if(!tracking)return;swipeDx=e.clientX-startX;const dy=e.clientY-startY;if(Math.abs(swipeDx)>10&&Math.abs(swipeDx)>Math.abs(dy)*1.15&&_dashHoldDelayTimer){clearTimeout(_dashHoldDelayTimer);_dashHoldDelayTimer=null;}},{signal:sig,passive:true});const up=e=>{if(e&&e.pointerId!=null){try{el.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_e){}}if(_dashHoldDelayTimer){clearTimeout(_dashHoldDelayTimer);_dashHoldDelayTimer=null;}const dx=swipeDx;const dy=e&&tracking?e.clientY-startY:0;if(tracking&&Math.abs(dx)>=swipeThreshold()&&Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy)){tracking=false;if(navigateDashInsight(dx<0?1:-1,{restartTimer:true})){if(paused){paused=false;el.classList.remove('dash-insight-hold-paused');}return;}}tracking=false;if(paused){paused=false;el.classList.remove('dash-insight-hold-paused');initDashInsightCarousel();}};el.addEventListener('pointerup',up,{signal:sig});el.addEventListener('pointercancel',up,{signal:sig});}
function initDashInsightCarousel(){const _body=document.getElementById('dashInsightBody');if(_body&&(_body.dataset.cycling||_body.dataset.unscrambling)){bindDashInsightHoldPause();return;}stopDashInsightCarousel();if(_dashHoldAbort){try{_dashHoldAbort.abort();}catch(e){}_dashHoldAbort=null;}const unlocked=S.insights.unlocked||[];if(unlocked.length<=1){bindDashInsightHoldPause();return;}if(hasPendingNewInsight()){bindDashInsightHoldPause();return;}if(guidedTourActive()){bindDashInsightHoldPause();return;}_dashCarouselIdx=0;const curId=document.getElementById('dashInsightBody')?.dataset.insightId;if(curId){const idx=unlocked.indexOf(curId);if(idx>=0)_dashCarouselIdx=idx;}_dashCarouselTimer=setInterval(rollDashInsightNext,25000);bindDashInsightHoldPause();}
function navigateDashInsight(delta,opts){opts=opts||{};const unlocked=S.insights.unlocked||[];if(unlocked.length<=1){stopDashInsightCarousel();return false;}if(hasPendingNewInsight()){stopDashInsightCarousel();return false;}const el=document.getElementById('dashInsightBody');const srcEl=document.getElementById('dashInsightSource');if(!el||el.dataset.cycling)return false;const curId=el.dataset.insightId;let idx=curId?unlocked.indexOf(curId):_dashCarouselIdx;if(idx<0)idx=0;const step=delta>=0?1:-1;_dashCarouselIdx=(idx+step+unlocked.length)%unlocked.length;const nextId=unlocked[_dashCarouselIdx];const nextIns=INSIGHT_LIBRARY.find(x=>x.id===nextId);if(!nextIns)return false;const box=el.closest('.dashboard-insight-static');const curText=dashInsightReadText(el);const nextClip=clipInsightBody(nextIns);const nextSrcHtml=insightSourceHTML(insightForDisplay(nextIns));const startH=box?box.offsetHeight:0;const targetH=box?measureDashInsightStaticHeight(box,el,null,srcEl,()=>{el.textContent=nextClip;if(srcEl){srcEl.innerHTML=nextSrcHtml;srcEl.style.opacity='1';}}):startH;const growsH=box&&targetH>startH;const shrinksH=box&&startH>targetH+2;const letterBoxH=Math.max(startH,targetH);el.dataset.cycling='1';el.classList.add('dash-insight-cycling');lockDashInsightStaticHeight(box,growsH?startH:letterBoxH);if(srcEl){srcEl.style.transition='opacity .35s ease';srcEl.style.opacity='0';}const finish=()=>{el.dataset.insightId=nextId;el.classList.remove('dash-insight-cycling');delete el.dataset.cycling;dashInsightEndAnimShell(el,nextClip);releaseDashInsightStaticHeight(box);if(srcEl){srcEl.innerHTML=nextSrcHtml;srcEl.style.opacity='1';srcEl.style.transition='';}try{sessionStorage.setItem(DASH_INSIGHT_SESSION_KEY,nextId);}catch(e){}if(opts.restartTimer)initDashInsightCarousel();};const afterReveal=()=>{if(shrinksH)animateDashInsightStaticHeight(box,targetH,DASH_INSIGHT_SHRINK_MS,finish);else finish();};const startLetterAnim=()=>{const padded=curText.length>=nextClip.length?curText:curText+' '.repeat(nextClip.length-curText.length);dashInsightBeginAnimShell(el,padded.length>=nextClip.length?padded:nextClip);runDashInsightScrambleOut(el,padded,DASH_INSIGHT_CYCLE_SCRAMBLE_MS,()=>{dashInsightWriteText(el,dashInsightScrambleString(nextClip));runDashInsightUnscrambleReveal(el,nextClip,DASH_INSIGHT_CYCLE_REVEAL_MS,afterReveal);});};if(growsH){animateDashInsightStaticHeight(box,targetH,DASH_INSIGHT_GROW_MS,()=>{setTimeout(startLetterAnim,DASH_INSIGHT_HEIGHT_PAUSE_MS);});}else startLetterAnim();return true;}
function rollDashInsightNext(){navigateDashInsight(1);}
function rollDashInsightPrev(){navigateDashInsight(-1);}
function htmlDashboardInsightsInGoals(){const coll=collectionButtonLabel();const kid=useKidsLanguage();const h2=kid?'Cool facts!':'Did you know?';const head=`<div class="dashboard-insights-in-card dashboard-insights-in-card--top"><div class="dashboard-insights-head"><h2 class="dashboard-insights-h2">${h2}</h2><button type="button" class="btn btn-neutral btn-sm" data-guided-tour="dashboard-insights-library" onclick="openInsightLibrary()">${coll}</button></div>`;const unlocked=S.insights.unlocked||[];let core;if(!unlocked.length)core=head+`<p class="small-note" style="margin-top:var(--s2)">${kid?'No fun facts yet. Keep going — they will pop up!':'Nothing discovered yet. Earn insights from habits, milestones, and more.'}</p></div>`;else{const pick=pickDashInsightDisplay();const i=pick.id?INSIGHT_LIBRARY.find(x=>x.id===pick.id):null;if(!i)core=head+`<p class="small-note" style="margin-top:var(--s2)">Nothing to show.</p></div>`;else{const clip=clipInsightBody(i);const displayText=pick.isNew?scrambleText(clip):clip.replace(/</g,'&lt;');const bodyClass=pick.isNew?'dashboard-insight-featured-body dash-insight-scrambled':'dashboard-insight-featured-body';const boxClick=pick.isNew?` onclick="unscrambleDashInsight('${pick.id}')"`:'';const boxClass=pick.isNew?'dashboard-insight-static dash-insight-new-box':'dashboard-insight-static';const srcHtml=pick.isNew?'':insightSourceHTML(i);const hintHtml=pick.isNew?`<div class="dash-insight-hint" id="dashInsightHint">${kid?'New fun fact — tap to open!':'New Insight Discovered!'}</div>`:'';core=head+`<div id="dashInsightHoldTarget" class="${boxClass}" style="margin-top:var(--s2)"${boxClick}><div class="${bodyClass}" id="dashInsightBody" data-insight-id="${pick.id}">${displayText}</div><div id="dashInsightSource"${pick.isNew?' style="display:none"':''}>${srcHtml}</div>${hintHtml}</div></div>`;}}return `<div data-guided-tour="dashboard-insights" style="margin-top:var(--s2)">${core}</div>`;}
function dashboardConsistencyAdviceHtml(active){if(!active.length){return`<div class="dashboard-advice" role="note"><p>Add a goal and habits to see personalised consistency advice here.</p></div>`;}const rows=active.map(g=>{const st=goalStats(g);return{g,st,tier:motivTierForGoal(g,st.pct),pct:st.pct};});const withData=rows.filter(r=>r.pct!==null);if(!withData.length)return'';const reds=withData.filter(r=>r.tier==='red');const ambers=withData.filter(r=>r.tier==='amber');if(reds.length){const r=reds.reduce((a,b)=>a.st.pct<=b.st.pct?a:b);const n=escDash(r.g.name||'Goal');const fl=r.g.floor||80;const floorLine=`<strong>Needs attention</strong> — <span style="color:var(--text)">${n}</span> is below your ${fl}% floor (${r.st.pct}% consistency). Protect core habits this week; at 60–79% recovery applies: only core habits add ${currencySymbol()}0 to the pot until rolling % is back at the floor; a strict drop in % can reset the saved pot.`;return`<div class="dashboard-advice dashboard-advice-warn" role="note"><p>${floorLine}</p></div>`;}if(ambers.length){const a=ambers.reduce((x,y)=>x.st.pct<=y.st.pct?x:y);const n=escDash(a.g.name||'Goal');return`<div class="dashboard-advice dashboard-advice-amber" role="note"><p><strong>Room to tighten</strong> — <span style="color:var(--text)">${n}</span> is above the floor but not yet in the green zone (90%+). Small, repeatable weeks beat occasional hero weeks.</p></div>`;}return`<div class="dashboard-advice dashboard-advice-good" role="note"><p><strong>On track</strong> — your tracked goals are in the green zone. Keep friction low so you do not slip back toward the floor.</p></div>`;}
function dashboardGoalsLiveSubline(active){const p=_buildSublinePool(active);return p.length?p[0]:'';}
function insightParticipationWeekCandidates(){const a=[];if(isWeekMondayCatchupWindow(-1))a.push(weekKey(-1));a.push(weekKey(0));return a;}
function maybeQueueInsightPeriods(active){if(!S.insights||!active.length)return;if(!Array.isArray(S.insights.participationInsightWeekKeysFired))S.insights.participationInsightWeekKeysFired=[];const fired=S.insights.participationInsightWeekKeysFired;const cand=insightParticipationWeekCandidates();for(let i=0;i<cand.length;i++){const wk=cand[i];if(fired.includes(wk))continue;const anyQ=active.some(g=>goalHabits(g.id).some(h=>qualifies(h,wk)));if(anyQ){fired.push(wk);S.insights.participationInsightWeekKey=wk;queueInsight('week_participation');}}const d=new Date();if(d.getDate()<=5){const y=d.getFullYear(),mo=d.getMonth()+1;const mk=`${y}-${String(mo).padStart(2,'0')}`;if(S.insights.monthOnTrackYM!==mk){const ok=active.some(g=>{const st=goalStats(g);if(st.pct===null)return false;const t=motivTierForGoal(g,st.pct);return t==='amber'||t==='green';});if(ok){S.insights.monthOnTrackYM=mk;queueInsight('month_on_track');}}}if(d.getMonth()===0&&d.getDate()<=14){const y=d.getFullYear();if(S.insights.yearOnTrackY!==y){const ok=active.some(g=>{const st=goalStats(g);if(st.pct===null)return false;const t=motivTierForGoal(g,st.pct);return t==='amber'||t==='green';});if(ok){S.insights.yearOnTrackY=y;queueInsight('year_on_track');}}}const wkCur=weekKey(0);if(isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(-1)&&S.insights.comebackFiredWeekKey!==wkCur){const wPrev=weekKey(-1);const hadMiss=active.some(g=>!weekGoalConsistent(g.id,wPrev));const nowOnTrack=active.some(g=>weekGoalConsistent(g.id,wkCur));if(hadMiss&&nowOnTrack){S.insights.comebackFiredWeekKey=wkCur;queueInsight('comeback');}}}
function _buildSublinePoolKid(active){const pool=[];if(!active.length){pool.push('No goals yet! This is where your cheerleader lives — add one and let\u2019s get going! 🎉');return pool;}const wkK=weekKey(0);const habitCountK=active.reduce((n,g)=>n+goalHabits(g.id).length,0);if(!habitCountK){pool.push('You\u2019ve got goals — nice! Now pick a habit to go with one and the fun really starts. 🐾');return pool;}const rowsK=active.map(g=>{const st=goalStats(g);return{g,st,tier:motivTierForGoal(g,st.pct),pct:st.pct,weekOk:goalWeeklyTreatEarned(g.id,wkK)};});const qualifiedCountK=rowsK.filter(r=>r.weekOk).length;const withDataK=rowsK.filter(r=>r.pct!==null);const redsK=withDataK.filter(r=>r.tier==='red');const ambersK=withDataK.filter(r=>r.tier==='amber');const greensK=withDataK.filter(r=>r.tier==='green');if(qualifiedCountK===active.length)pool.push('Every single goal is going well this week! You\u2019re doing it — keep being you! ⭐');else if(qualifiedCountK>0)pool.push(`${qualifiedCountK} out of ${active.length} goals are doing great this week. The others still have time — don\u2019t worry! 💪`);if(qualifiedCountK===0){const dl=daysLeftInIsoWeekFromToday();let line=dl>0?`Still ${dl} day${dl===1?'':'s'} to go! Pick one small thing and give it a go. You\u2019ve totally got this. 🚀`:'The week is almost done. That\u2019s okay — a brand new week starts very soon! 🌈';if(!withDataK.length)line+=' See a “—” on a circle? Give it a tap and we\u2019ll tell you what it means! 👆';pool.push(line);}if(redsK.length){const r=redsK.reduce((a,b)=>a.st.pct<=b.st.pct?a:b);pool.push(`${escDash(r.g.name)} needs a little help this week. No big deal — just try one small habit today and see how it feels. 🌱`);}if(ambersK.length){const a=ambersK.reduce((x,y)=>x.st.pct<=y.st.pct?x:y);pool.push(`${escDash(a.g.name)} is doing okay but not great yet. A few more tries this week and it\u2019ll get there! 🐢`);}if(greensK.length===withDataK.length&&withDataK.length>0)pool.push('Everything is GREEN! That means you\u2019ve been working really hard. Amazing! 🌟🌟🌟');pool.push('You don\u2019t have to feel excited to start — just pick one thing and do it. That\u2019s the whole secret. 🔑','Not feeling it today? That\u2019s okay. Even tiny steps still count. 🐾','Quiet weeks still count. Every little habit adds up to something big. 🏆');return pool;}
function _buildSublinePool(active){if(useKidsLanguage())return _buildSublinePoolKid(active);const pool=[];if(!active.length){pool.push('No goals yet. This is where the encouragement lives \u2014 once there\u2019s something to encourage.');return pool;}const wk=weekKey(0);const habitCount=active.reduce((n,g)=>n+goalHabits(g.id).length,0);if(!habitCount){pool.push('Goals are set but no habits attached yet. Wire one up and this space will actually have something useful to say.');return pool;}const rows=active.map(g=>{const st=goalStats(g);return{g,st,tier:motivTierForGoal(g,st.pct),pct:st.pct,weekOk:goalWeeklyTreatEarned(g.id,wk)};});const qualifiedCount=rows.filter(r=>r.weekOk).length;const withData=rows.filter(r=>r.pct!==null);const reds=withData.filter(r=>r.tier==='red');const ambers=withData.filter(r=>r.tier==='amber');const greens=withData.filter(r=>r.tier==='green');if(qualifiedCount===active.length)pool.push('Every goal is on track this week. Good weeks don\u2019t need to be dramatic \u2014 this is what consistent looks like.');else if(qualifiedCount>0)pool.push(`${qualifiedCount} of ${active.length} goals on track this week. The rest still have time \u2014 the week isn\u2019t written yet.`);if(qualifiedCount===0){const dl=daysLeftInIsoWeekFromToday();let line=dl>0?`Still ${dl} day${dl===1?'':'s'} left. That\u2019s enough. Start with the smallest habit on the list.`:'Week\u2019s nearly done. Log it honestly and move on \u2014 Monday has no memory for this week\u2019s drama.';if(!withData.length)line+=' Seeing \u201c\u2014\u201d on a disc? Tap it \u2014 there\u2019s a plain-English explanation waiting.';pool.push(line);}if(reds.length){const r=reds.reduce((a,b)=>a.st.pct<=b.st.pct?a:b);pool.push(`${escDash(r.g.name)} is at ${r.st.pct}% this week. Forget the big push \u2014 just close the next habit, then the one after that.`);}if(ambers.length){const a=ambers.reduce((x,y)=>x.st.pct<=y.st.pct?x:y);pool.push(`${escDash(a.g.name)} is above the floor but not comfortable yet. Repeat weeks move the needle more than one big effort.`);}if(greens.length===withData.length&&withData.length>0)pool.push('All green. Enjoy it \u2014 and notice what conditions got you here, because those are worth keeping.');pool.push('You don\u2019t need to feel inspired \u2014 you need a slot in the diary and a kettle.','Motivation ghosted you? Fine. Tea and a calendar rarely do.','Consistency is built in the forgettable weeks, not the good ones.');return pool;}
let _sublinePool=[],_sublineIdx=0,_sublineRotateTimer=null,_sublineTypeTimer=null,_sublineHeightAnimCleanup=null;
const SUBLINE_ROTATE_MS=10000;
const SUBLINE_GROW_MS=350;
const SUBLINE_SHRINK_MS=500;
const SUBLINE_HEIGHT_PAUSE_MS=180;
const SUBLINE_FADE_MS=200;
const SUBLINE_TYPEWRITER_MIN_MS=900;
const SUBLINE_TYPEWRITER_MAX_MS=3200;
const SUBLINE_TYPEWRITER_MS_PER_CHAR=24;
function sublineReducedMotion(){return typeof matchMedia==='function'&&matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;}
function sublineAnimActive(){const el=document.getElementById('dashboardGoalsSubline');return!!(el&&(el.dataset.sublineAnim||el.dataset.sublineTyping));}
function cancelSublineHeightAnim(){if(_sublineHeightAnimCleanup){_sublineHeightAnimCleanup();_sublineHeightAnimCleanup=null;}}
function stopSublineTypewriter(){if(_sublineTypeTimer){clearTimeout(_sublineTypeTimer);_sublineTypeTimer=null;}}
function stopSublineRotateTimer(){if(_sublineRotateTimer){clearTimeout(_sublineRotateTimer);_sublineRotateTimer=null;}}
function stopSublineCarousel(){stopSublineRotateTimer();stopSublineTypewriter();cancelSublineHeightAnim();const el=document.getElementById('dashboardGoalsSubline');if(el){delete el.dataset.sublineAnim;delete el.dataset.sublineTyping;}}
function scheduleSublineNext(afterMs){stopSublineRotateTimer();if(_sublinePool.length<2||sublineAnimActive())return;_sublineRotateTimer=setTimeout(rollSublineNext,afterMs==null?SUBLINE_ROTATE_MS:afterMs);}
function lockSublineShellHeight(shell,h){if(!shell)return;shell.classList.add('overview-subline-height-anim');shell.style.height=h+'px';shell.style.transition='none';shell.offsetHeight;}
function releaseSublineShellHeight(shell){if(!shell)return;shell.style.height='';shell.style.transition='';shell.classList.remove('overview-subline-height-anim');cancelSublineHeightAnim();}
function animateSublineShellHeight(shell,targetH,dur,cb){if(!shell){if(cb)cb();return;}cancelSublineHeightAnim();shell.classList.add('overview-subline-height-anim');shell.style.transition='height '+dur+'ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)';shell.style.height=targetH+'px';let done=false;const finish=()=>{if(done)return;done=true;shell.removeEventListener('transitionend',onEnd);clearTimeout(fallback);_sublineHeightAnimCleanup=null;if(cb)cb();};const onEnd=e=>{if(e.target===shell&&e.propertyName==='height')finish();};shell.addEventListener('transitionend',onEnd);const fallback=setTimeout(finish,dur+120);_sublineHeightAnimCleanup=finish;}
function measureSublineShellHeight(shell,sublineEl,nextText){const save=sublineEl.textContent;const saveOp=sublineEl.style.opacity;sublineEl.textContent=nextText;sublineEl.style.opacity='0';const h=shell.offsetHeight;sublineEl.textContent=save;sublineEl.style.opacity=saveOp||'';return h;}
function sublineTypewriterDuration(text){const len=(text||'').length;return Math.max(SUBLINE_TYPEWRITER_MIN_MS,Math.min(SUBLINE_TYPEWRITER_MAX_MS,Math.round(len*SUBLINE_TYPEWRITER_MS_PER_CHAR)));}
function runSublineTypewriter(sublineEl,text,onDone){stopSublineTypewriter();sublineEl.dataset.sublineTyping='1';if(sublineReducedMotion()){sublineEl.textContent=text;delete sublineEl.dataset.sublineTyping;if(onDone)onDone();return;}const len=text.length;const dur=sublineTypewriterDuration(text);const t0=performance.now();const frame=()=>{const elapsed=performance.now()-t0;const progress=Math.min(1,elapsed/dur);const eased=1-Math.pow(1-progress,1.8);const chars=Math.floor(eased*len);sublineEl.textContent=text.slice(0,chars);if(chars<len)_sublineTypeTimer=setTimeout(frame,16);else{sublineEl.textContent=text;_sublineTypeTimer=null;delete sublineEl.dataset.sublineTyping;if(onDone)onDone();}};sublineEl.textContent='';frame();}
function syncSublineRecoveryClass(sublineEl,active){if(!sublineEl)return;sublineEl.classList.toggle('subline-recovery-warn',active.some(g=>g.recoveryActive&&!goalRecoveryDeferredFirstWeek(g)));}
function showSublineText(sublineEl,shell,nextText,active,opts){opts=opts||{};const onComplete=opts.onComplete||function(){};if(sublineReducedMotion()){sublineEl.textContent=nextText;syncSublineRecoveryClass(sublineEl,active);releaseSublineShellHeight(shell);delete sublineEl.dataset.sublineAnim;onComplete();return;}const startH=shell?shell.offsetHeight:0;const targetH=shell?measureSublineShellHeight(shell,sublineEl,nextText):0;const growsH=shell&&targetH>startH;const shrinksH=shell&&startH>targetH+2;const letterBoxH=Math.max(startH,targetH);sublineEl.dataset.sublineAnim='1';const afterFade=()=>{sublineEl.textContent='';syncSublineRecoveryClass(sublineEl,active);sublineEl.style.opacity='1';const finish=()=>{releaseSublineShellHeight(shell);delete sublineEl.dataset.sublineAnim;onComplete();};const startType=()=>{runSublineTypewriter(sublineEl,nextText,()=>{if(shrinksH)animateSublineShellHeight(shell,targetH,SUBLINE_SHRINK_MS,finish);else finish();});};if(shell)lockSublineShellHeight(shell,growsH?startH:letterBoxH);if(growsH){animateSublineShellHeight(shell,targetH,SUBLINE_GROW_MS,()=>{setTimeout(startType,SUBLINE_HEIGHT_PAUSE_MS);});}else startType();};if(opts.skipFade){sublineEl.style.opacity='1';afterFade();}else{sublineEl.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(afterFade,SUBLINE_FADE_MS+10);}}
function todayIsoWeekDayIndex(){const ds=weekDates(0);const t=new Date();t.setHours(0,0,0,0);for(let i=0;i<7;i++){const d=new Date(ds[i]);d.setHours(0,0,0,0);if(d.getTime()===t.getTime())return i;}return -1;}
function habitHasLogForDayIndex(h,wk,di){const hd=ensureHD(wk,h.id);if(h.metric==='days')return !!(hd.days&&hd.days[di]);const v=Number((hd.dayValues&&hd.dayValues[di])||0)||0;if(v>0)return true;return !!(hd.days&&hd.days[di]);}
function dashboardMotivationExtras(){const wk=weekKey(0);const di=todayIsoWeekDayIndex();if(di<0)return[];const habits=trackerHabitsOrdered().filter(h=>canEditHabitDay(h,0,di));const cores=habits.filter(h=>habitEffectiveTier(h,wk)==='core');const growth=habits.filter(h=>habitEffectiveTier(h,wk)==='growth');const coreNeed=cores.filter(h=>!habitHasLogForDayIndex(h,wk,di));const growthNeed=growth.filter(h=>!habitHasLogForDayIndex(h,wk,di));const d=new Date().getDay();const hr=new Date().getHours();const out=[];if(d===0){out.push("It's Sunday — your week locks at midnight. Make sure everything's logged.");if(hr>=14)out.push('Last chance — your week locks in a few hours.');return out;}if(cores.length&&!coreNeed.length){out.push("You're on track. Keep the momentum.");return out;}if(coreNeed.length){if(di<=2&&hr<15)out.push("You've still got time — make today count.");else out.push("Don't let today slip — log your core habits when you get a moment.");}else if(growthNeed.length)out.push('Good work — consider logging growth habits too.');return out;}
function initSublineCarousel(){if(dashInsightAnimActive()||sublineAnimActive())return;stopSublineCarousel();const active=activeGoals();const raw=_buildSublinePool(active);const pool=raw.concat(dashboardMotivationExtras());for(let i=pool.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));const t=pool[i];pool[i]=pool[j];pool[j]=t;}_sublinePool=pool;_sublineIdx=0;const sublineEl=document.getElementById('dashboardGoalsSubline');const shell=document.getElementById('overviewSublineShell');if(!sublineEl)return;if(!pool.length){sublineEl.textContent='';syncSublineRecoveryClass(sublineEl,active);return;}showSublineText(sublineEl,shell,pool[0],active,{skipFade:true,onComplete:()=>{if(_sublinePool.length>1)scheduleSublineNext();}});}
function rollSublineNext(){if(dashInsightAnimActive()||sublineAnimActive())return;if(_sublinePool.length<2)return;stopSublineRotateTimer();const sublineEl=document.getElementById('dashboardGoalsSubline');const shell=document.getElementById('overviewSublineShell');if(!sublineEl)return;_sublineIdx=(_sublineIdx+1)%_sublinePool.length;showSublineText(sublineEl,shell,_sublinePool[_sublineIdx],activeGoals(),{onComplete:()=>scheduleSublineNext()});}
function refreshDashboardGoalsSubline(){if(sublineAnimActive())return;initSublineCarousel();}
function maybeShowPotTargetCelebration(){if(!S)return;if(adultWhatsNewVersionNotePending())return;if(typeof milestoneAnyOverlayActive==='function'&&milestoneAnyOverlayActive())return;const gcf=document.getElementById('goalCompleteFloat');if(gcf&&gcf.classList.contains('show'))return;const prf=document.getElementById('potResetFloat');if(prf&&prf.classList.contains('show'))return;if(document.querySelector('.overlay.open'))return;const now=Date.now();for(const g of activeGoals()){const t=Number(g.target)||0;if(t<=0||g.potTargetCelebrationShown)continue;const sn=Number(g.potTargetCelebrationSnoozeUntil)||0;if(sn&&now<sn)continue;const pot=computeGoalPotTotalForGoal(g);if(pot<t)continue;showGoalCompleteCelebration({kind:'pot',goalId:g.id,name:g.name,emoji:g.emoji,target:t,pot});break;}}

${g.reward||'—'}</div></div>${archTgl}<button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" function mondayBasedDayIndex(){const dayOfWeek=new Date().getDay();return dayOfWeek===0?6:dayOfWeek-1;}
function daysLeftInIsoWeekFromToday(){return 7-mondayBasedDayIndex();}
function invalidateTrackerRenderFp(){_trackerRenderFp='';}
function syncTrackerWeekHeader(){const weekLocked=isIsoWeekEndedForOffset(S.offset);const wkLabelEl=document.getElementById('wkLabel');const wkSubEl=document.getElementById('wkSub');const navNextEl=document.getElementById('navNext');if(!wkLabelEl||!wkSubEl||!navNextEl)return;wkLabelEl.textContent=fmtRange(S.offset);let sub=(S.offset===0?'Current week':S.offset<0?`${Math.abs(S.offset)} week${Math.abs(S.offset)>1?'s':''} ago`:'Future week')+(weekLocked?' · Locked':'')+(S.offset===0&&!weekLocked&&!trackingLogLocked()?' · Edits close Sunday midnight':'');if(trackingLogLocked())sub+=(S.user.trackingStopped?' · Logging locked (stopped)':' · Logging paused');wkSubEl.innerHTML=sub;navNextEl.disabled=S.offset>=0;}
function trackerRenderFingerprint(wk){if(!S)return '';const off=S.offset;const dates=weekDates(off);const weekSun=isoDate(new Date(dates[6]));const habits=trackerHabitsForWeekOffset(off).filter(function(h){return habitShownOnTrackerWeek(h,off,weekSun);});const wd=S.weeks&&S.weeks[wk];const hd=wd&&wd.habitData||{};const habitPart=habits.map(function(h){const d=hd[h.id]||{};const days=(d.days||[]).map(function(x){return x?1:0;}).join('');const dv=(d.dayValues||[]).map(function(x){return String(Number(x)||0);}).join(',');const val=String(Number(d.value)||0);const exp=isLogCardExpanded(wk,h.id)?1:0;return [h.id,h.title,h.tier,h.metric,h.pot,h.goalId,h.listOrder||0,days,dv,val,exp].join(':');}).join('|');return [off,wk,habitPart,trackingLogLocked()?1:0,S.user.trackingStopped?1:0,typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage()?1:0,guidedTourActive()?1:0,goalPotTotalCacheFingerprint()].join('::');}

style="margin-top:6px">Weekly savings: £${h.pot} when weekly targets are met.</div></div>`;return `<div class="card habit-card${growthQualCls} ${glow}${logCollCls}" data-habit-id="${h.id}" title="Hold class="habit-log-extra habit-expandhide"><div class="habit-tags"><span class="pill pill-goal">${goal?.name || 'No goal'}</span></div><div class="habit-sub">${habitPotTrackerSubline(h,wk)}</div></div></div></div></div>${headSide}</div><div class="days-row">${days.map((d,i)=>{const disabled=!canEditHabitDay(h,S.offset,i)||habLocked;return style="width:${pct}%"></div></div>${statusBlock}</div>`;}const isImp=S.user.units==='imperial'&&h.metric==='km';const effTarget=effectiveWeeklyTargetForWeek(h,wk);const dispThr=isImp?(effTarget*0.621371).toFixed(1):h.metric==='sessions'?String(Math.round(effTarget)):effTarget;const pct=Math.min(100,effTarget<=0?0:Math.round((rawVal/effTarget)*100));const cls=pct>=100?'done':pct>=50?'mid':'low';if(h.metric==='km'||h.metric==='sessions'){const isSess=h.metric==='sessions';const dv=hd.dayValues||Array(7).fill(0);const needMore=pct>=100?'':(isSess?String(Math.max(0,Math.round(effTarget-rawVal))):(isImp?((effTarget-rawVal)*0.621371).toFixed(1):(effTarget-rawVal).toFixed(1)));let tapNote=isSess?'Tap a day to log how many sessions you did that day.':`Tap a day to log ${unit}.`;let pctBar=pct,clsBar=cls,mainLine=`${dispVal}/${dispThr} ${unit} ${pct>=100?'— qualified':'— need '+needMore+' more '+unit}`;return `<div class="card habit-card${growthQualCls} ${glow}${logCollCls}" data-habit-id="${h.id}" title="Hold to reorder">${masteryCorner}<div class="habit-head-wrap"><div class="habit-expand-toggle habit-head-zone" tabindex="0" role="button" onclick="toggleLogCardExpand('${wk}','${h.id}')"><div class="habit-log-head-grid"><div class="habit-log-left">${habitEmojiDisplayHTML(h.emoji)}<span class="pill habit-log-tier-pill ${effTier==='core'?'pill-core':'pill-growth'}">${effTier.toUpperCase()}</span></div><div class="habit-log-right"><div class="habit-log-title-row"><span class="habit-sub">Weekly savings £${h.pot}</div></div></div></div></div>${headSide}</div><div class="days-row">${['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'].map((d,i)=>{const disabled=!canEditHabitDay(h,S.offset,i)||habLocked;const hasVal=dv[i]>0;const dispDayVal=isSess?String(Math.max(0,Math.round(Number(dv[i])||0))):(isImp?(dv[i]*0.621371).toFixed(1):dv[i]);return `<div class='day-wrap'><div class='day-lbl'>${d}</div><button type="button" class="day-btn day-btn--km${hasVal?' done':''}" ${disabled?'disabled':''} onclick="openLogMetricDayModal('${wk}','${h.id}',${i})"><span class="day-btn-km-val">${hasVal?dispDayVal:''}</span></button></div>`;}).join('')}</div><div class="qual-bar-outer"><div class="qual-bar-inner ${clsBar}" style="width:${pctBar}%"></div></div><div class="habit-expandhide"><div class="habit-sub" style="margin-top:var(--s2);color:${q?'var(--green)':'var(--text-muted)'}">${mainLine}</div><div class="small-note" style="margin-top:6px">${tapNote} Weekly savings: £${h.pot} when weekly targets are met.</div></div></div>`;}const metricFrozen=habLocked||!canEditHabitWeekMetric(h,S.offset);let pctM=pct,clsM=cls,lineM=`${rawVal}/${effTarget} ${unit}`,noteM='Goal contribution: £'+h.pot+' when the block qualifies.';return `<div class="card habit-card${growthQualCls} ${glow}${logCollCls}" data-habit-id="${h.id}" title="Hold to reorder">${masteryCorner}<div class="habit-head-wrap"><div class="habit-expand-toggle habit-head-zone" tabindex="0" role="button" onclick="toggleLogCardExpand('${wk}','${h.id}')"><div class="habit-log-head-grid"><div class="habit-log-right"><div class="habit-log-title-row"><span class="habit-name">${h.title}</span></div><div class="habit-log-extra habit-expandhide"><div class="habit-tags"><span class="pill this week</div><input class="metric-num" type="number" inputmode="decimal" min="0" step="${h.metric==='km'?0.1:1}" value="${rawVal}" ${metricFrozen?'disabled':''} style="margin-top:6px">${noteM.replace(/Goal contribution/g,'Weekly savings').replace(/when the block qualifies/g,'when weekly targets are met')}</div></div><div class="qual-bar-outer"><div class="qual-bar-inner ${clsM}" function renderWeekSummary(wk){const off=S.offset;const habitInView=h=>habitShownOnTrackerWeek(h,off);const goals=activeGoals();let totalEarned=0;let totalCap=0;goals.forEach(g=>habitsForGoalInWeek(g.id,wk).filter(habitInView).forEach(h=>{totalEarned+=habitPotContribution(h,wk,g);totalCap+=habitPotCapForWeek(h,wk,g);}));const treatGoals=goals.filter(g=>habitsForGoalInWeek(g.id,wk).filter(habitInView).some(h=>qualifies(h,wk)));const weeklyTreatAll=treatGoals.length===goals.length&&goals.length>0;const cls=weeklyTreatAll?'glow-green':'glow-blue';const capStr=totalCap>0?` <span class='small-note' style='font-weight:400'>/ ${fmtMoney(totalCap)} max</span>`:'';const goalRows=goals.length?`<div class="dashboard-week-goal-pots" style="margin-top:var(--s3)">${goals.map(g=>{let ge=0,gm=0;habitsForGoalInWeek(g.id,wk).filter(habitInView).forEach(h=>{gm+=habitPotCapForWeek(h,wk,g);ge+=habitPotContribution(h,wk,g);});const treatOk=habitsForGoalInWeek(g.id,wk).filter(habitInView).some(h=>qualifies(h,wk));return `<div class="dashboard-week-goal-pot-row"><span class="dashboard-week-goal-name">${escDash(g.name)}</span><span class="dashboard-week-goal-amt" style="color:${ge>0?'var(--green)':'var(--text-muted)'}">${fmtMoney(ge)}<span class="small-note" style="font-weight:400"> / ${fmtMoney(gm)}</span></span><span class="meta-chip ${treatOk?'chip-green':'chip-amber'}" style="font-size:var(--xs)">${treatOk?(escDash(g.reward||'Treat earned')):'Treat open'}</span>${recoveryStatusHTML(g,wk,S.offset)}</div>`;}).join('')}</div>`:'';document.getElementById('weekSummaryWrap').innerHTML=`<div class="card summary summary--tracker ${cls}"><div class="section-head"><div class="section-title">Week summary</div><div class="meta-chip ${weeklyTreatAll?'chip-green':'chip-blue'}">${weeklyTreatAll?'All goals: weekly treat earned':'Week still in progress'}</div></div><div class="summary-kpis summary-kpis-tracker"><div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-lbl">Pot (this week)</div><div class="kpi-val" style="color:var(--green)">${fmtMoney(totalEarned)}${capStr}</div></div><div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-lbl">Weekly treat</div><div class="kpi-val">${treatGoals.length}/${goals.length}</div></div></div>${goalRows}</div>`;}
function wkKeyToRange(wk){const[yr,wNum]=wk.split('-W').map(Number);const jan4=new Date(Date.UTC(yr,0,4));const monday=new Date(jan4);monday.setUTCDate(jan4.getUTCDate()-((jan4.getUTCDay()+6)%7)+(wNum-1)*7);const sunday=new Date(monday);sunday.setUTCDate(monday.getUTCDate()+6);const o={day:'numeric',month:'short'};return `${monday.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',o)} – ${sunday.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',o)}`;}
function bindHistoryTableScroll(){const root=document.getElementById('historyBody');if(!root)return;const sc=root.querySelector('.hist-table-scroll');if(!sc||sc.dataset.histScrollBound)return;sc.dataset.histScrollBound='1';const maxScroll=()=>Math.max(0,sc.scrollWidth-sc.clientWidth);const wheelDeltaPixels=function(e){const el=e.currentTarget;if(e.deltaMode===1){const lh=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).fontSize)||16;return{dx:e.deltaX*lh,dy:e.deltaY*lh};}if(e.deltaMode===2){const h=el.clientHeight||window.innerHeight||1;return{dx:e.deltaX*h,dy:e.deltaY*h};}return{dx:e.deltaX,dy:e.deltaY};};sc.addEventListener('wheel',function(e){const max=maxScroll();if(max<=1)return;const{dx,dy}=wheelDeltaPixels(e);let apply=0;if(e.shiftKey&&dy!==0)apply=dy;else if(Math.abs(dy)>=Math.abs(dx)&&dy!==0)apply=dy;else if(dx!==0)apply=dx;if(apply===0)return;const before=sc.scrollLeft;const next=Math.max(0,Math.min(max,before+apply));if(next===before)return;e.preventDefault();sc.scrollLeft=next;},{passive:false});let startX=0,startScroll=0,tracking=false,horizontal=false,pid=null;const endDrag=e=>{if(!tracking||e.pointerId!==pid)return;tracking=false;horizontal=false;pid=null;sc.classList.remove('is-hist-dragging');try{sc.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){}};sc.addEventListener('pointerdown',e=>{if(maxScroll()<=1)return;if(e.pointerType==='mouse'&&e.button!==0)return;startX=e.clientX;startScroll=sc.scrollLeft;tracking=true;horizontal=false;pid=e.pointerId;try{sc.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){}});sc.addEventListener('pointermove',e=>{if(!tracking||e.pointerId!==pid)return;const dx=e.clientX-startX,dy=e.clientY-startY;if(!horizontal){if(Math.abs(dx)>8&&Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy)*1.05)horizontal=true;else if(Math.abs(dy)>12&&Math.abs(dy)>=Math.abs(dx)){endDrag(e);return;}}if(horizontal){e.preventDefault();sc.classList.add('is-hist-dragging');sc.scrollLeft=Math.max(0,Math.min(maxScroll(),startScroll-dx));}},{passive:false});sc.addEventListener('pointerup',endDrag);sc.addEventListener('pointercancel',endDrag);let touchX=0,touchY=0,touchScroll=0,touchOn=false,touchHoriz=false;sc.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{if(maxScroll()<=1||e.touches.length!==1)return;touchX=e.touches[0].clientX;touchY=e.touches[0].clientY;touchScroll=sc.scrollLeft;touchOn=true;touchHoriz=false;},{passive:true});sc.addEventListener('touchmove',e=>{if(!touchOn||e.touches.length!==1)return;const dx=e.touches[0].clientX-touchX,dy=e.touches[0].clientY-touchY;if(!touchHoriz){if(Math.abs(dx)>6&&Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy)*1.05)touchHoriz=true;else if(Math.abs(dy)>10&&Math.abs(dy)>=Math.abs(dx)){touchOn=false;return;}}if(touchHoriz){e.preventDefault();sc.classList.add('is-hist-dragging');sc.scrollLeft=Math.max(0,Math.min(maxScroll(),touchScroll-dx));}},{passive:false});const endTouch=()=>{touchOn=false;touchHoriz=false;sc.classList.remove('is-hist-dragging');};sc.addEventListener('touchend',endTouch);sc.addEventListener('touchcancel',endTouch);}
function bindHomeWeekHistoryDetailsOnce(){const det=document.getElementById('homeWeekHistoryDetails');if(!det||det.dataset.histDetailsBound)return;det.dataset.histDetailsBound='1';det.addEventListener('toggle',()=>{if(!det.open)return;renderHistory();const sc=document.querySelector('#historyBody .hist-table-scroll');if(sc)delete sc.dataset.histScrollBound;requestAnimationFrame(()=>bindHistoryTableScroll());});}
function homeWeekHistoryOpen(){const det=document.getElementById('homeWeekHistoryDetails');return!!(det&&det.open);}
function renderHistoryIfNeeded(){if(homeWeekHistoryOpen())renderHistory();}
function patchLogDayUI(wk,hId,idx){const h=habitById(hId);if(!h||h.metric!=='days')return false;const card=document.querySelector('#habitRows .habit-card[data-habit-id="'+CSS.escape(String(hId))+'"]');if(!card)return false;const hd=ensureHD(wk,hId);const q=qualifies(h,wk);const btn=card.querySelectorAll('.day-btn')[idx];if(!btn)return false;btn.classList.toggle('done',!!hd.days[idx]);const startIdxs=eligibleDayIndicesForHabitStartWeek(h,wk);const partial=startIdxs.length>0&&startIdxs.length<7;const effThr=effectiveWeeklyTargetForWeek(h,wk);const dayCount=partial?aggregateTurnUpCountForIndices(hd,startIdxs):hd.days.filter(Boolean).length;const pct=Math.min(100,effThr<=0?0:Math.round((dayCount/effThr)*100));const cls=pct>=100?'done':pct>=50?'mid':'low';const bar=card.querySelector('.qual-bar-inner');if(bar){bar.style.width=pct+'%';bar.className='qual-bar-inner '+cls;}const statusEl=card.querySelector('.habit-expandhide .habit-sub');if(statusEl){statusEl.textContent=dayCount+'/'+effThr+' days '+(q?'— qualified':'— need '+Math.max(0,effThr-dayCount)+' more');statusEl.style.color=q?'var(--green)':'var(--text-muted)';}card.classList.remove('glow-green','glow-blue');card.classList.add(q?'glow-green':'glow-blue');return true;}
function renderHistory(){if(syncAllGoalRecovery())save();const startMon=weekStartFromDate(S.user.startDate||isoDate(new Date()));const startWk=dateToWeekKey(startMon);const keys=Object.keys(S.weeks).filter(wk=>{if(wk<startWk)return false;const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);if(off===null)return true;return !weekEntirelyBeforeTrackingStart(off);}).sort().reverse();if(!keys.length){document.getElementById('historyBody').innerHTML=`<div class="card empty glow-blue"><div class="empty-icon">📈</div><h3>No history yet</h3><p>Tracked weeks will appear here.</p></div>`;return;}const active=activeGoals();if(!active.length){document.getElementById('historyBody').innerHTML=`<div class="card empty glow-blue"><div class="empty-icon">📈</div><h3>No goals</h3><p>Add a goal to see week history with per-goal pot.</p></div>`;return;}const n=active.length;const headPots=active.map(g=>`<div class="hist-pot-head">${escHTML(g.name)}</div>`).join('');const rows=keys.map(wk=>{const potCells=active.map(g=>{const ok=weekGoalConsistent(g.id,wk);const sum=goalWeekPotSumForHistory(wk,g);const cls=ok?'hist-pot-cell--ok':'hist-pot-cell--bad';return `<div class="hist-pot-cell ${cls}"><span class="hist-pot-amt">${fmtMoney(sum)}</span></div>`;}).join('');return `<div class="hist-week-cell hist-sticky-week"><div class="hist-wk-num">${escHTML(wk)}</div><div class="hist-wk-range">${escHTML(wkKeyToRange(wk))}</div></div>${potCells}`;}).join('');document.getElementById('historyBody').innerHTML=`<div class="card hist-card" style="--hist-pots-cols:${n}"><div class="hist-table-scroll"><div class="hist-grid-table"><div class="hist-week-head hist-sticky-week">Week</div>${headPots}${rows}</div></div></div>`;bindHistoryTableScroll();flushPotResetSupportQueue();}
function metricLabel(h){const map={days:'days/wk',sessions:'sessions/wk',km:'km/wk',minutes:'min/wk',pages:'pages/wk'};return `${h.threshold} ${map[h.metric]||((h.customUnit||'units')+'/wk')}`;}
function indexActiveHabitsByGoalId(){const map=new Map();(S.habits||[]).forEach(function(h){if(!h||!h.active||h.archived)return;if(!map.has(h.goalId))map.set(h.goalId,[]);map.get(h.goalId).push(h);});map.forEach(function(arr){arr.sort(manageHabitSort);});return map;}
function goalsTabPillsHTML(habits,g,edit,kid){if(!habits.length)return '<span class="small-note" style="color:var(--text-muted)">'+(kid?'No habits on this goal yet.':'No active habits on this goal yet.')+'</span>';return habits.map(function(h){const ms=habitGoalRetetherCooldownRemainingMs(h);const frozen=ms>0;const tierCls=h.tier==='growth'?'goals-tab-pill--growth':'goals-tab-pill--core';const baseCls='goals-tab-pill '+tierCls+(frozen?' goals-tab-pill--cooldown':'');const label=escDash(h.title);const hidEsc=escHTML(h.id);const gidEsc=escHTML(g.id);const emRaw=(String(h.emoji||'').trim().slice(0,8));const emPart=emRaw?'<span class="goals-tab-pill__emoji" aria-hidden="true">'+escHTML(emRaw)+'</span>':'';const inner='<span class="goals-tab-pill__inner">'+emPart+'<span class="goals-tab-pill__text">'+label+'</span></span>';if(frozen){const tip=(kid?('Unlocks '+formatRetetherUnlockDate(ms)):('Cooldown until '+formatRetetherUnlockDate(ms)));return '<button type="button" class="'+baseCls+' goals-tab-pill--interactive goals-tab-pill--cooldown-tap" data-goals-cooldown-habit="1" data-habit-id="'+hidEsc+'" title="'+escHTML(tip)+'" aria-label="'+escHTML(tip)+'">'+inner+'</button>';}if(edit){return '<button type="button" class="'+baseCls+' goals-tab-pill--interactive" data-goals-move-habit="1" data-habit-id="'+hidEsc+'" data-goal-id="'+gidEsc+'">'+inner+'</button>';}return '<span class="'+baseCls+'">'+inner+'</span>';}).join('');}
function goalsTabCardExpandableHTML(g,edit,kid){if(!g||!g.id)return'';const habits=(indexActiveHabitsByGoalId().get(g.id)||[]);const archTgl=goalArchiveToggleButtonHTML(g);const pills=goalsTabPillsHTML(habits,g,edit,kid);return '<div class="goals-tab-card__expandable"><div class="goals-tab-pills">'+pills+'</div>'+(archTgl?'<div class="goals-tab-card__archive-row" style="margin-top:var(--s3);display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:var(--s2)">'+archTgl+'</div>':'')+'</div>';}
function toggleGoalsTabCard(gid){if(!gid)return;const expanding=!_goalsTabExpandedGoals.has(gid);if(expanding)_goalsTabExpandedGoals.add(gid);else _goalsTabExpandedGoals.delete(gid);const host=document.getElementById('goalsTabBody');const btn=host&&host.querySelector('button[data-goals-card-toggle][data-goal-id="'+CSS.escape(String(gid))+'"]');if(!btn){renderGoalsTab(false);return;}const card=btn.closest('.goals-tab-card');if(!card){renderGoalsTab(false);return;}btn.classList.toggle('is-expanded',expanding);btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded',expanding?'true':'false');btn.setAttribute('aria-label',expanding?'Collapse goal':'Expand goal');let exp=card.querySelector('.goals-tab-card__expandable');if(!expanding){if(exp)exp.remove();refreshGoalsTabRenderFp();return;}const g=goalById(gid);if(!g){renderGoalsTab(false);return;}const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const html=goalsTabCardExpandableHTML(g,_goalsTabEditMode,kid);if(exp)exp.outerHTML=html;else{const inner=card.querySelector('.goals-tab-card__inner');if(inner)inner.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',html);else renderGoalsTab(false);}refreshGoalsTabRenderFp();}
function toggleSavedHabitsSection(){_savedHabitsSectionExpanded=!_savedHabitsSectionExpanded;syncSavedHabitsSectionUi(true);}
function syncSavedHabitsSectionUi(maybeRender){const wrap=document.getElementById('manageSavedExpandable');const btn=document.getElementById('savedHabitsToggle');if(wrap)wrap.hidden=!_savedHabitsSectionExpanded;if(btn){btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded',_savedHabitsSectionExpanded?'true':'false');btn.classList.toggle('is-expanded',_savedHabitsSectionExpanded);btn.setAttribute('aria-label',_savedHabitsSectionExpanded?'Collapse saved habits':'Expand saved habits');}if(!_savedHabitsSectionExpanded){const list=document.getElementById('archiveList');if(list)list.innerHTML='';_archiveListRenderFp='';return;}if(maybeRender)renderArchive();}
function renderManageTab(fromUser,sections){const all=!sections;const s=all?{goals:true,habits:true,saved:true}:Object.assign({goals:true,habits:true,saved:true},sections||{});if(s.goals)renderGoalsTab(!!fromUser);if(s.habits)renderHabitsConfig();if(s.saved)syncSavedHabitsSectionUi(_savedHabitsSectionExpanded);}
function renderHabitsConfig(){bindGoalAndArchiveConfirmDialogsOnce();bindManageActiveHabitCardsOnce();refreshManageHabitsLockUi();const list=document.getElementById('habitsList');if(!list)return;const habits=S.habits.filter(h=>h.active&&!h.archived&&(goalIsActive(goalById(h.goalId))||h.masteryLegendaryCoreLocked)).sort(manageHabitSort);const fp=habits.map(function(h){return [h.id,h.title,h.emoji,h.tier,h.goalId,h.active,h.archived,h.createdViaClone?1:0,_manageHabitsEditUnlocked?1:0].join(':');}).join('|')+'::'+habits.length;if(!habits.length){_habitsListRenderFp='';list.innerHTML=`<div class="card empty glow-blue"><div class="empty-icon">🎯</div><h3>No active habits</h3><p>Add a habit to start tracking.</p></div>`;return;}if(fp===_habitsListRenderFp&&list.querySelector('.manage-habit-card'))return;_habitsListRenderFp=fp;list.innerHTML=habits.map(h=>manageHabitCardHTML(h,{unlocked:_manageHabitsEditUnlocked,deleteTop:h.createdViaClone?"deleteHabit('"+h.id+"')":'',toggleOn:true,toggleTitle:'Active — click to send to Saved habits',toggleClick:"openArchiveHabitConfirm('"+h.id+"',this.closest('.config-card'))"})).join('');}
function maybeStartHabitRetetherRulesStepper(done){if(typeof done!=='function')done=function(){};if(!S||!S.user)return done();if(S.user.habitRetetherRulesStepperSeen)return done();if(typeof milestoneStepperActive==='function'&&milestoneStepperActive())return done();const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();startMilestoneStepper({steps:kid?[{title:'Moving habits',html:'<p>Grown-ups can move a habit to another goal from this tab when life changes.</p><p>Old <strong>locked weeks</strong> still score against the goal the habit was on when that week ended.</p>'},{title:'Cool-down',html:'<p>After a move, that habit rests <strong>7 days</strong> before it can change structure again on kid profiles.</p>'}]:[{title:'Habit structure cooldowns',html:'<p>Moving a habit between goals, switching Core ↔ Growth, fresh activations, archives, and bank reinstatements all trigger <strong>structure cooldowns</strong>.</p><p>Adults: <strong>7 days</strong> for a brand-new active habit; <strong>28 days</strong> for moves, Core↔Growth, reinstatements, and most archives (first-ever archive on a profile is 7 days).</p>'},{title:'Goals tab moves',html:'<p>Use <strong>Edit</strong> on this tab to move pills. While cooling down, a habit shows the swirling state and cannot move again until the unlock date.</p>'},{title:'Core slots (adults)',html:'<p>Grown-ups start with <strong>two</strong> Core habit slots. Each Core habit that reaches <strong>Mastery Level 2</strong> unlocks another slot — and those mastered Cores do not consume a slot.</p>'}],finishLabel:kid?'OK':'Got it',onFinish:function(){S.user.habitRetetherRulesStepperSeen=true;save();done();}});}
function bindGoalsTabDelegationOnce(){if(_goalsTabDelegationBound)return;const tab=document.getElementById('tab-manage');if(!tab)return;_goalsTabDelegationBound=true;tab.addEventListener('click',function(e){const cardTgl=e.target.closest('button[data-goals-card-toggle]');if(cardTgl){e.preventDefault();const gid=cardTgl.getAttribute('data-goal-id');if(gid)toggleGoalsTabCard(gid);return;}const arc=e.target.closest('button[data-goal-archive-toggle]');if(arc){e.preventDefault();const id=arc.getAttribute('data-gid');if(id)onGoalArchiveToggleClick(id);return;}const coolBtn=e.target.closest('button[data-goals-cooldown-habit]');if(coolBtn){e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();const hid=coolBtn.getAttribute('data-habit-id');if(hid)openGoalsTabCooldownPrompt(hid);return;}const btn=e.target.closest('button[data-goals-move-habit]');if(!btn||!_goalsTabEditMode)return;e.preventDefault();const hid=btn.getAttribute('data-habit-id');const gid=btn.getAttribute('data-goal-id');if(hid&&gid)goalsTabOpenMoveHabit(hid,gid);});}
function syncGoalsTabToolbar(goals){const btn=document.getElementById('goalsTabEditBtn');if(!btn)return;const n=(goals&&goals.length)||0;const can=n>=2;btn.disabled=!can;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();if(_goalsTabEditMode)setIconActionBtn(btn,'text',{text:kid?'Done':'Done',title:''});else setIconActionBtn(btn,'pencil',{pencil:kid?'Edit goals':'Edit goals',pencilTitle:can?'':(kid?'Add another goal first — then you can move habits.':'Add another active goal before moving habits between goals.')});}
function bindGoalCardsArchiveToggleOnce(){const root=document.getElementById('goalCards');if(!root||root.dataset.goalArchToggleBound)return;root.dataset.goalArchToggleBound='1';root.addEventListener('click',function(e){const arc=e.target.closest('button[data-goal-archive-toggle]');if(!arc||!root.contains(arc))return;e.preventDefault();const id=arc.getAttribute('data-gid');if(id)onGoalArchiveToggleClick(id);});}

function goalsTabOpenMoveHabit(hid,fromGid){const h=habitById(hid);if(!h)return;const ms=habitGoalRetetherCooldownRemainingMs(h);if(ms>0){openGoalsTabCooldownPrompt(hid);return;}const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const targets=activeGoals().filter(g=>String(g.id)!==String(fromGid));if(!targets.length)return;_goalsTabMoveCtx={hid,fromGid};const sel=document.getElementById('goalsTabMoveSelect');const line=document.getElementById('goalsTabMoveHabitLine');const tit=document.getElementById('goalsTabMoveTitle');const lbl=document.getElementById('goalsTabMoveSelectLbl');const ok=document.getElementById('goalsTabMoveOkBtn');const cancel=document.getElementById('goalsTabMoveCancelBtn');if(tit)tit.textContent=kid?'Move a habit':'Move habit';if(line)line.textContent=kid?('Pick another goal for “'+escDash(h.title)+'”. Locked weeks still count on the old goal.'):('Move “'+escDash(h.title)+'” to which goal? Locked ISO weeks keep the goal the habit was on when each week ended.');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=kid?'Move to':'Move to goal';if(cancel)cancel.textContent=kid?'Cancel':'Cancel';if(ok)ok.textContent=kid?'Move':'Move';if(sel){sel.innerHTML=targets.map(g=>'<option value="'+escHTML(g.id)+'">'+escDash(g.name)+'</option>').join('');}openM('mGoalsTabMove');}
function goalsTabConfirmMoveHabit(){const ctx=_goalsTabMoveCtx;if(!ctx)return;const sel=document.getElementById('goalsTabMoveSelect');const newGid=sel?String(sel.value||''):'';goalsTabApplyRetetherWithGid(ctx.hid,newGid);}
function goalsTabApplyRetetherWithGid(hid,newGid){const h=habitById(hid);if(!h)return;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();if(String(newGid||'')===String(h.goalId||'')){closeM('mGoalsTabMove');_goalsTabMoveCtx=null;return;}if(habitFrozenForRetether(h)){alert(kid?'This habit is still on cooldown.':'This habit is still on structure cooldown.');return;}const ng=goalById(newGid);if(!ng){alert(kid?'Pick a real goal.':'Choose an active goal.');return;}if(!confirm(kid?('Move “'+h.title+'” to “'+ng.name+'”? Locked weeks still use the old goal for scores.'):('Move “'+h.title+'” to “'+ng.name+'”? Locked ISO weeks keep the goal the habit was on when each week ended.')))return;if(!confirm(kid?'Really move? A 7-day wait starts after this.':'Second confirm: this starts a structure cooldown for this habit (28 days for adults, 7 for kid profiles).'))return;h.goalId=newGid;h.lastHabitGoalChangeAt=Date.now();bumpHabitStructureCooldownFromNow(h,habitCooldownLongMsForProfile());save();closeM('mGoalsTabMove');_goalsTabMoveCtx=null;renderAll();}

pill, then choose which goal it should move to.')+'</div>';}goals.forEach(function(g){const potLine=goalsTabPotLinePlaceholder(g);const expanded=edit||_goalsTabExpandedGoals.has(g.id);const class="goals-tab-card__head goals-tab-card__head--toggle'+chevCls+'" data-goals-card-toggle="1" data-goal-id="'+gidEsc+'" aria-expanded="'+(expanded?'true':'false')+'" function renderArchive(){if(!_savedHabitsSectionExpanded)return syncSavedHabitsSectionUi(false);bindArchiveBankRemove();const habits=S.habits.filter(h=>h.archived||!h.active).sort(manageHabitSort);const list=document.getElementById('archiveList');if(!list)return;const fp=habits.map(function(h){return [h.id,h.title,h.emoji,h.tier,h.goalId,h.archived?1:0,h.active?1:0].join(':');}).join('|')+'::'+habits.length;if(!habits.length){_archiveListRenderFp='';list.innerHTML=`<div class="card empty glow-blue"><div class="empty-icon">🗂</div><h3>No saved habits yet</h3><p>Finished or archived habits gather here ready to reuse.</p></div>`;return;}if(fp===_archiveListRenderFp&&list.querySelector('.manage-habit-card'))return;_archiveListRenderFp=fp;list.innerHTML=habits.map(h=>{const origin=goalById(h.originGoalId);const sub='Originally from '+escDash(h.bankedFromGoalName||origin?.name||'a previous goal')+' · '+metricLabel(h);const delBtn='<button type="button" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm bank-delete-btn bank-delete-btn--round" data-habit-id="'+h.id+'" aria-label="Remove from saved habits" title="Remove from saved habits">×</button>';return manageHabitCardHTML(h,{subline:sub,toggleOn:false,toggleTitle:'Saved — click to reactivate',toggleClick:"openReactivate('"+h.id+"')",footExtra:delBtn});}).join('');}
function scrollAppMainToTop(){if(typeof guidedTourActive==='function'&&guidedTourActive())return;try{window.scrollTo({top:0,left:0,behavior:'auto'});}catch(e){window.scrollTo(0,0);}const se=document.scrollingElement;if(se)se.scrollTop=0;}
let _deferredRenderRaf=0;
function cancelDeferredRender(){if(_deferredRenderRaf){cancelAnimationFrame(_deferredRenderRaf);_deferredRenderRaf=0;}}
function deferRender(fn){cancelDeferredRender();_deferredRenderRaf=requestAnimationFrame(()=>{_deferredRenderRaf=0;fn();});}
function activeTabName(){const id=document.querySelector('.panel.active')?.id||'';return id.startsWith('tab-')?id.slice(4):'dashboard';}
function renderActiveTabOnly(){const name=activeTabName();if(name==='dashboard'){renderDashboard();renderHistoryIfNeeded();return;}if(name==='tracker'){renderTracker();return;}if(name==='manage'){renderManageTab(true);return;}if(name==='mastery'){renderMastery();return;}if(name==='reminderDebug')void renderReminderDebugTab();}
function renderAfterLogChange(opts){opts=opts||{};if(!opts.skipTracker){if(opts.patchedLog&&S.offset===0)renderWeekSummary(weekKey(0));else renderTracker();}deferRender(()=>{renderDashboard();renderHistoryIfNeeded();});}

function countLogTicksAcrossCurrentWeekViews(){try{let ticks=0;const wk=weekKey(S.offset||0);const list=trackerHabitsOrdered().filter(function(h){return h.active&&!h.archived&&habitShownOnTrackerWeek(h,S.offset||0)});list.forEach(function(h){const hd=ensureHD(wk,h.id);if(h.metric==='days'){for(let di=0;di<7;di++){if(hd.days&&hd.days[di])ticks++;}}else if(h.metric==='sessions'||h.metric==='km'){const dv=hd.dayValues||[];for(let di=0;di<7;di++){if((Number(dv[di])||0)>0)ticks++;}}else{if((Number(hd.value)||0)>0)ticks++;}});return ticks;}catch(e){return 0;}}

function logExpandKey(wk,id){return wk+'|'+id;}function toggleLogCardExpand(wk,id){const k=logExpandKey(wk,id);if(!window._logCardExpanded)_logCardExpanded={};const expanding=!window._logCardExpanded[k];window._logCardExpanded[k]=expanding;const card=document.querySelector('#habitRows .habit-card[data-habit-id="'+CSS.escape(String(id))+'"]');if(card){card.classList.toggle('habit-card--log-collapsed',!expanding);const toggle=card.querySelector('.habit-expand-toggle');if(toggle)toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded',expanding?'true':'false');_trackerRenderFp=trackerRenderFingerprint(wk);return;}invalidateTrackerRenderFp();renderTracker();}
function isLogCardExpanded(wk,id){const k=logExpandKey(wk,id);if(!window._logCardExpanded)return false;return !!window._logCardExpanded[k];}
function switchTab(name,btn){flushPendingSave();if(name==='mastery'&&typeof isPremiumAccount==='function'&&!isPremiumAccount()){const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();alert(kid?'Ask a grown-up to pick Premium in Settings to open this tab.':'Choose Premium under Settings → Account plan (beta) to use this tab.');return;}if(name==='reminderDebug'&&!reminderDebugTabVisible()){alert('This tab is not available.');return;}const prevPanel=document.querySelector('.panel.active')?.id||'';if(prevPanel==='tab-manage'&&name!=='manage'){const mh=document.getElementById('mHabit');if(_manageHabitsEditUnlocked&&mh&&mh.classList.contains('open')&&typeof habitsEditorDiffersFromBaseline==='function'&&habitsEditorDiffersFromBaseline()){const kidSw=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const msg=kidSw?'Save your habit before you go — or tap Cancel in the habit window to drop edits. Leave this tab anyway and discard those edits (you will lose changes)?':'Save your habit changes before leaving Manage — or cancel in the habit editor. Switch tabs anyway and discard unsaved edits?';if(!confirm(msg))return;}}document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));document.getElementById('tab-'+name).classList.add('active');btn.classList.add('active');scrollAppMainToTop();deferRender(()=>{if(name==='dashboard'){renderDashboard();renderHistoryIfNeeded();}else if(name==='tracker')renderTracker();else if(name==='manage'){renderGoalsTab(true);renderHabitsConfig();syncSavedHabitsSectionUi(_savedHabitsSectionExpanded);}else if(name==='mastery'){renderMastery();if(S&&S.user&&S.user.masteriesTabBadgePending){S.user.masteriesTabBadgePending=false;save({immediate:true});}syncMasteriesTabBadge();}else if(name==='reminderDebug')void renderReminderDebugTab();syncKidCritterLoop();if(name==='tracker'&&S&&S.user&&S.user.setupDone&&!S.user.firstLogStepperSeen&&hasAnyActiveHabits())setTimeout(()=>maybeStartFirstLogStepper(),420);if(name==='dashboard')setTimeout(()=>maybeStartConsistencyRuleDeferred(),520);if(name==='manage'&&S&&S.user&&S.user.setupDone&&!S.user.firstBankStepperSeen)setTimeout(()=>maybeStartFirstBankStepper(),420);});}
