function toggleDay(wk,id,idx){const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);const h=habitById(id);if(off===null||!h||!canEditHabitDay(h,off,idx)||isHabitDataLocked(wk,id))return;const hd=ensureHD(wk,id);const wasQ=qualifies(h,wk);hd.days[idx]=!hd.days[idx];if(hd.days[idx])soundCheck();else soundUncheck();if(qualifies(habitById(id),wk))setTimeout(soundQualify,80);kidCritterMaybePlayRocketOnHabitQualified(wk,habitById(id),wasQ);if(activeGoals().length&&activeGoals().every(g=>weekGoalConsistent(g.id,wk))&&wk===weekKey(0)){setTimeout(()=>{soundWeekComplete();confetti();},180);}save();const patched=patchLogDayUI(wk,id,idx);renderAfterLogChange({patchedLog:patched,skipTracker:patched});}
function setMetric(wk,id,val){const off=offsetForWeekKey(wk);const h=habitById(id);if(off===null||!h||!canEditHabitWeekMetric(h,off)||isHabitDataLocked(wk,id))return;const wasQ=qualifies(h,wk);ensureHD(wk,id).value=parseFloat(val)||0;if(qualifies(habitById(id),wk))setTimeout(soundQualify,60);kidCritterMaybePlayRocketOnHabitQualified(wk,h,wasQ);save();renderAfterLogChange();}
function weekSlideDurationMs(steps){if(typeof matchMedia==='function'&&matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches)return 0;const s=Math.max(1,steps);const k=Math.min(s,8);return Math.max(200,Math.min(560,520-48*k));}
function sanitizeTrackerSnapshot(html){return String(html||'').replace(/\bid="logRevealHostAboveHabits"/g,'data-snap="logRevealHostAboveHabits"').replace(/\bid="habitRows"/g,'data-snap="habitRows"').replace(/\bid="weekSummaryWrap"/g,'data-snap="weekSummaryWrap"');}
function restoreTrackerSwipeInnerShell(){const inner=document.getElementById('trackerSwipeInner');if(!inner)return;inner.innerHTML='<div id="logRevealHostAboveHabits" class="log-reveal-stack"></div><div id="habitRows" class="habit-list"></div><div id="weekSummaryWrap" style="margin-top:var(--s5)"></div>';}
function beginWeekNavigation(newOffset){const inner=document.getElementById('trackerSwipeInner');if(!inner)return;const old=S.offset;const target=Math.min(0,newOffset);if(target===old)return;if(inner.dataset.sliding==='1')return;const dur=weekSlideDurationMs(Math.abs(target-old));if(dur===0){S.offset=target;renderTracker();return;}inner.dataset.sliding='1';const dir=target>old?1:-1;const oldSnap=sanitizeTrackerSnapshot(inner.innerHTML);S.offset=target;renderTracker();const newHtml=inner.innerHTML;const strip=document.createElement('div');strip.className='tracker-slide-strip';strip.style.cssText='display:flex;flex-direction:row;width:200%;will-change:transform;align-items:flex-start;box-sizing:border-box';const mkPane=html=>{const el=document.createElement('div');el.className='tracker-slide-pane';el.style.cssText='flex:0 0 50%;width:50%;min-width:0;box-sizing:border-box';el.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');el.style.pointerEvents='none';el.innerHTML=html;return el;};const pA=mkPane(dir===1?oldSnap:newHtml),pB=mkPane(dir===1?newHtml:oldSnap);strip.appendChild(pA);strip.appendChild(pB);inner.style.overflow='hidden';inner.innerHTML='';inner.appendChild(strip);strip.style.transition='none';strip.style.transform=dir===1?'translateX(0)':'translateX(-50%)';void strip.offsetWidth;strip.style.transition=`transform ${dur}ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)`;requestAnimationFrame(()=>{strip.style.transform=dir===1?'translateX(-50%)':'translateX(0)';});let doneNav=false;const finish=()=>{if(doneNav)return;doneNav=true;clearTimeout(tmo);strip.removeEventListener('transitionend',onEnd);inner.style.overflow='';restoreTrackerSwipeInnerShell();renderTracker();inner.removeAttribute('data-sliding');bindHabitRowsReorder();};const tmo=setTimeout(finish,dur+120);function onEnd(e){if(e.propertyName!=='transform')return;finish();}strip.addEventListener('transitionend',onEnd);}
function nav(n){beginWeekNavigation(S.offset+n);}
function goToday(){beginWeekNavigation(0);}
function bindTrackerSwipe(){const zone=document.getElementById('trackerSwipeZone');if(!zone||zone.dataset.swipeBound)return;zone.dataset.swipeBound='1';const inner=document.getElementById('trackerSwipeInner');let startX=0,startY=0,tracking=false,horizontal=false,lastDx=0,pid=null,blockClick=false;const TH=()=>Math.min(72,Math.max(48,zone.offsetWidth*0.16));const applyRubber=(dx)=>{if(S.offset===0&&dx<0)return dx*0.22;return dx;};zone.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target.closest&&e.target.closest('#habitRows button, #habitRows a, #habitRows input, #habitRows select, #habitRows textarea, #habitRows .day-btn, #habitRows .metric-num, #habitRows .habit-inline-delete, #habitRows .habit-expand-toggle'))return;if(blockClick){e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();blockClick=false;}},{capture:true});zone.addEventListener('pointerdown',e=>{if(!inner||inner.dataset.sliding==='1')return;if(e.pointerType==='mouse'&&e.button!==0)return;const t=e.target;if(t.closest&&(t.closest('button, a, input, select, textarea, .day-btn, .metric-num, .habit-inline-delete, .habit-head, .habit-expand-toggle')))return;startX=e.clientX;startY=e.clientY;tracking=true;horizontal=false;lastDx=0;pid=e.pointerId;try{zone.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){}});zone.addEventListener('pointermove',e=>{if(!tracking||e.pointerId!==pid)return;const dx=e.clientX-startX,dy=e.clientY-startY;if(!horizontal){if(Math.abs(dx)>10&&Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy)*1.1){horizontal=true;}else if(Math.abs(dy)>12&&Math.abs(dy)>=Math.abs(dx)){tracking=false;horizontal=false;try{zone.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){}return;}}if(horizontal){e.preventDefault();lastDx=dx;const slideRoot=inner.querySelector('.tracker-slide-strip')||inner;if(slideRoot){slideRoot.style.transition='none';slideRoot.style.transform=`translateX(${applyRubber(dx)}px)`;}}},{passive:false});const endSwipe=e=>{if(!tracking||e.pointerId!==pid)return;tracking=false;const capId=e.pointerId;pid=null;try{zone.releasePointerCapture(capId);}catch(_){}if(!horizontal){if(inner){const slideRoot=inner.querySelector('.tracker-slide-strip')||inner;slideRoot.style.transition='';}return;}horizontal=false;const dx=lastDx,th=TH();if(Math.abs(dx)>12)blockClick=true;if(dx<-th&&S.offset<0){const slideRoot=inner.querySelector('.tracker-slide-strip')||inner;if(slideRoot){slideRoot.style.transition='none';slideRoot.style.transform='translateX(0)';void slideRoot.offsetWidth;}beginWeekNavigation(S.offset+1);}else if(dx>th){const slideRoot=inner.querySelector('.tracker-slide-strip')||inner;if(slideRoot){slideRoot.style.transition='none';slideRoot.style.transform='translateX(0)';void slideRoot.offsetWidth;}beginWeekNavigation(S.offset-1);}else if(inner){const slideRoot=inner.querySelector('.tracker-slide-strip')||inner;slideRoot.style.transition='transform .28s cubic-bezier(0.33,1,0.35,1)';slideRoot.style.transform='translateX(0)';}setTimeout(()=>{blockClick=false;},420);};zone.addEventListener('pointerup',endSwipe);zone.addEventListener('pointercancel',endSwipe);}
function applyTrackerHabitOrder(orderedIds){if(!S||!orderedIds||!orderedIds.length||trackingLogLocked())return;orderedIds.forEach((id,i)=>{const h=habitById(id);if(h)h.listOrder=i*10;});save();}
function bindHabitRowsReorder(){const root=document.getElementById('habitRows');if(!root||root.dataset.reorderBound)return;root.dataset.reorderBound='1';const longMsFor=e=>(e.pointerType==='touch'||e.pointerType==='pen')?400:420;const moveCancelFor=e=>(e.pointerType==='touch'||e.pointerType==='pen')?40:14;const setReorderTouchLock=v=>{document.documentElement.classList.toggle('habit-reorder-lock',!!v);};let arm=null;let drag=null;const blockNextClick=()=>{const b=function(e){if(e.target.closest&&e.target.closest('#habitRows button, #habitRows a, #habitRows input, #habitRows .metric-num, #habitRows .habit-inline-delete, #habitRows .habit-expand-toggle'))return;e.preventDefault();e.stopImmediatePropagation();document.removeEventListener('click',b,true);};document.addEventListener('click',b,true);setTimeout(()=>document.removeEventListener('click',b,true),380);};function removeArmListenersOnly(){if(!arm)return;clearTimeout(arm.timer);document.removeEventListener('pointermove',arm.mv);document.removeEventListener('pointerup',arm.up);document.removeEventListener('pointercancel',arm.up);arm=null;}function clearArm(){if(!arm)return;clearTimeout(arm.timer);document.removeEventListener('pointermove',arm.mv);document.removeEventListener('pointerup',arm.up);document.removeEventListener('pointercancel',arm.up);try{if(arm.card&&arm.pid!=null)arm.card.releasePointerCapture(arm.pid)}catch(_){}setReorderTouchLock(false);root.classList.remove('habit-list--reorder-arm');arm=null;}function finishDrag(cy){if(!drag)return;const dc=drag.card,gh=drag.ghost,hid=drag.hid;const rw=document.getElementById('habitRows');rw.classList.remove('habit-list--dragging');const others=[...rw.querySelectorAll('.habit-card[data-habit-id]')].filter(c=>c!==dc);let ins=others.length;for(let i=0;i<others.length;i++){const r=others[i].getBoundingClientRect();if(cy<r.top+r.height/2){ins=i;break;}}const ord=others.map(c=>c.getAttribute('data-habit-id'));ord.splice(ins,0,hid);gh.remove();dc.classList.remove('habit-card--placeholder');dc.style.minHeight='';drag=null;blockNextClick();applyTrackerHabitOrder(ord);renderTracker();}root.addEventListener('pointerdown',e=>{if(drag)return;if(e.pointerType==='mouse'&&e.button!==0)return;const card=e.target.closest('.habit-card');if(!card||!root.contains(card))return;if(e.target.closest('button,a,input,select,textarea,.metric-num,.habit-inline-delete,.habit-expand-toggle'))return;const hid=card.getAttribute('data-habit-id');if(!hid)return;clearArm();setReorderTouchLock(true);root.classList.add('habit-list--reorder-arm');try{card.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)}catch(_){}const st={pid:e.pointerId,card,hid,startX:e.clientX,startY:e.clientY,lastX:e.clientX,lastY:e.clientY};st.mv=ev=>{if(ev.pointerId!==st.pid)return;ev.preventDefault();st.lastX=ev.clientX;st.lastY=ev.clientY;if(Math.hypot(ev.clientX-st.startX,ev.clientY-st.startY)>moveCancelFor(ev))clearArm();};st.up=ev=>{if(ev.pointerId!==st.pid)return;clearArm();};arm=st;st.timer=setTimeout(()=>{if(arm!==st)return;const hold=st;removeArmListenersOnly();const rect=hold.card.getBoundingClientRect();const ghost=hold.card.cloneNode(true);ghost.classList.add('habit-card--drag-ghost');ghost.querySelectorAll('button,input').forEach(el=>{el.disabled=true;});document.body.appendChild(ghost);ghost.style.cssText=`position:fixed;left:${rect.left}px;top:${rect.top}px;width:${rect.width}px;z-index:10050;pointer-events:none;margin:0;box-sizing:border-box`;hold.card.classList.add('habit-card--placeholder');hold.card.style.minHeight=rect.height+'px';const offY=hold.lastY-rect.top;const dragMove=ev=>{if(ev.pointerId!==hold.pid)return;ev.preventDefault();ghost.style.top=(ev.clientY-offY)+'px';ghost.style.left=rect.left+'px';};const dragEnd=ev=>{if(ev.pointerId!==hold.pid)return;ev.preventDefault();try{hold.card.releasePointerCapture(hold.pid)}catch(_){}document.removeEventListener('pointermove',dragMove);document.removeEventListener('pointerup',dragEnd);document.removeEventListener('pointercancel',dragEnd);setReorderTouchLock(false);root.classList.remove('habit-list--reorder-arm');finishDrag(ev.clientY);};document.addEventListener('pointermove',dragMove,{passive:false});document.addEventListener('pointerup',dragEnd);document.addEventListener('pointercancel',dragEnd);drag={card:hold.card,ghost,hid};root.classList.add('habit-list--dragging');root.classList.remove('habit-list--reorder-arm');try{if(navigator.vibrate)navigator.vibrate(16);}catch(_){}},longMsFor(e));document.addEventListener('pointermove',st.mv,{passive:false});document.addEventListener('pointerup',st.up);document.addEventListener('pointercancel',st.up);});}
function downloadFullAppBackup(){if(!ROOT||!Object.keys(ROOT.profiles||{}).length){const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();alert(kid?'Nothing to save yet.':'Nothing to export yet.');return;}annotateProfilesForSave();const snap=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ROOT));snap.evolveExportFormat=1;snap.consistencyExportFormat=1;snap.exportedAt=new Date().toISOString();const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(snap,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});const u=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=u;a.download=`evolve-full-backup-${isoDate(new Date())}.json`;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(u);}
function normalizeImportFileToV5Root(raw){if(!raw||typeof raw!=='object')return null;if(raw.storageVersion===5&&raw.profiles&&typeof raw.profiles==='object'){const keys=Object.keys(raw.profiles);if(!keys.length)return null;const copy=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(raw));if(!copy.activeProfileId||!copy.profiles[copy.activeProfileId])copy.activeProfileId=keys[0];if(!copy.profileMeta)copy.profileMeta={};if(copy.accountPlanTier!=='basic'&&copy.accountPlanTier!=='premium')copy.accountPlanTier='basic';return copy;}if(raw.user&&typeof raw.user==='object'&&!raw.profiles){const id=uid('profile');const nm=String((raw.user&&raw.user.name)||'').trim()||'Imported profile';return{storageVersion:5,accountPlanTier:'basic',activeProfileId:id,profileMeta:{[id]:{name:nm}},profiles:{[id]:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(raw))}};}return null;}
function sliceProfilesFromImportRoot(importRoot,selectedProfileIds){if(!importRoot||!importRoot.profiles)return null;const all=Object.keys(importRoot.profiles);if(!all.length)return null;let pids=all;if(selectedProfileIds!=null){const set=new Set(selectedProfileIds.map(String));pids=all.filter(p=>set.has(String(p)));if(!pids.length)return null;}const out={storageVersion:5,profileMeta:{},profiles:{}};if(importRoot.accountPlanTier==='premium')out.accountPlanTier='premium';for(const pid of pids){const P=importRoot.profiles[pid];if(!P)continue;out.profiles[pid]=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(P));const meta=importRoot.profileMeta&&importRoot.profileMeta[pid];out.profileMeta[pid]=meta?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(meta)):{name:'Profile'};}out.activeProfileId=pids[0];return out;}
function mergeWeekHabitDataInto(weeks,keepId,dropId){if(!weeks||keepId===dropId)return;const n=7;Object.keys(weeks).forEach(wk=>{const w=weeks[wk];if(!w||!w.habitData)return;const fr=w.habitData[dropId],kp=w.habitData[keepId];if(!fr){delete w.habitData[dropId];return;}if(!kp){w.habitData[keepId]=fr;delete w.habitData[dropId];return;}if(!kp.days)kp.days=Array(n).fill(false);if(!fr.days)fr.days=Array(n).fill(false);for(let i=0;i<n;i++){kp.days[i]=!!(kp.days[i]||fr.days[i]);}if(!kp.dayValues)kp.dayValues=Array(n).fill(0);if(!fr.dayValues)fr.dayValues=Array(n).fill(0);for(let i=0;i<n;i++){kp.dayValues[i]=Math.max(Number(kp.dayValues[i])||0,Number(fr.dayValues[i])||0);}kp.value=kp.dayValues.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0);if(fr.locked)kp.locked=true;delete w.habitData[dropId];});}
function mergeImportIntoRoot(existing,incoming){const base=existing&&existing.storageVersion===5&&existing.profiles?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(existing)):migrateStorageRoot(null);if(!incoming||!incoming.profiles)return base;if(incoming.accountPlanTier==='premium')base.accountPlanTier='premium';if(!base.profileMeta)base.profileMeta={};Object.keys(incoming.profiles).forEach(oldPid=>{let finalPid=oldPid;if(base.profiles[finalPid]){do{finalPid=uid('profile');}while(base.profiles[finalPid]);}const P=incoming.profiles[oldPid];const meta=incoming.profileMeta&&incoming.profileMeta[oldPid]!==undefined?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(incoming.profileMeta[oldPid])):{name:'Profile'};if(meta.name===undefined||meta.name===null||meta.name==='')meta.name='Profile';base.profiles[finalPid]=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(P));base.profileMeta[finalPid]=meta;});if(!base.profiles[base.activeProfileId]){const k=Object.keys(base.profiles);base.activeProfileId=k[0]||base.activeProfileId;}return base;}
function cancelImportBackup(){window._pendingImportRaw=null;const sec=document.getElementById('importProfileSection'),wrap=document.getElementById('importProfileCheckboxes');if(sec)sec.hidden=true;if(wrap)wrap.innerHTML='';closeM('mImportBackup');}
function stageImportBackup(e){const file=e.target.files?.[0];if(!file)return;const inp=e.target;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{try{const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();const parsed=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);const d=normalizeImportFileToV5Root(parsed);if(!d){alert(kid?'That file does not look like one of our backups. Ask a grown-up for help.':'Unrecognised file. Use a full backup or multi-profile export from this app, or the legacy single-profile JSON.');inp.value='';return;}const n=Object.keys(d.profiles).length;window._pendingImportRaw=d;const sum=document.getElementById('importBackupSummary');if(sum)sum.textContent=n>1?(kid?`Found ${n} people in this file. Tick who to add. Nothing here gets erased — only new profiles appear.`:`Found ${n} profiles in this file. Tick which copies to add. Nothing already on this device will be changed except new profiles appearing.`):(kid?'Found 1 person in the file. They will be added as a new profile (fresh ID if that one is already taken).':'Found 1 profile. It will be added as a new profile (new ID if that one is already taken).');const sec=document.getElementById('importProfileSection'),wrap=document.getElementById('importProfileCheckboxes');if(n>1&&sec&&wrap){const incName=pid=>String((d.profileMeta&&d.profileMeta[pid]&&d.profileMeta[pid].name)||'Profile').trim();const pids=[...Object.keys(d.profiles)].sort((a,b)=>incName(a).localeCompare(incName(b)));wrap.innerHTML=pids.map(pid=>{const rawName=incName(pid);const safePid=String(pid).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/</g,'&lt;');return`<label class="form-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="import-profile-cb" data-profile-id="${safePid}" checked><span>${escDash(rawName)}</span></label>`;}).join('');sec.hidden=false;}else{if(sec)sec.hidden=true;if(wrap)wrap.innerHTML='';}syncSettingsPanelsKidCopy();openM('mImportBackup');inp.value='';}catch(err){const kid2=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();alert(kid2?'That file could not be read. A grown-up can check it is real JSON.':'Import failed — file may be damaged or not JSON.');inp.value='';}};r.readAsText(file);}

function tone(freq,dur=.12,type='sine',vol=.08,delay=0){whenAudioRunning().then(c=>{try{const o=c.createOscillator(),g=c.createGain();o.type=type;o.frequency.value=freq;o.connect(g);g.connect(c.destination);const t=c.currentTime+delay;g.gain.setValueAtTime(.001,t);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(vol,t+.01);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,t+dur);o.start(t);o.stop(t+dur+.03);}catch(e){}});}

var _swReminderSyncTimer=null;var _swReminderPendingMode='edit';
function nextReminderCutoff0010Ms(nowMs){
  try{
    const tz=(S&&S.user&&S.user.reminderTimeZone)||(typeof Intl!=='undefined'&&Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone)||'UTC';
    if(typeof Temporal!=='undefined'){
      const inst=Temporal.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(nowMs);
      let z=inst.toZonedDateTimeISO(tz);
      let target=z.with({hour:0,minute:10,second:0,millisecond:0});
      if(Temporal.ZonedDateTime.compare(z,target)>=0)target=target.add({days:1});
      return Number(target.epochMilliseconds);
    }
  }catch(e){}
  const d=new Date(nowMs);
  const x=new Date(d.getTime());
  x.setHours(0,10,0,0);
  if(x.getTime()<=nowMs)x.setDate(x.getDate()+1);
  return x.getTime();
}
function reminderSyncMaxFireMs(mode){
  const nowMs=appNowMs();
  return nowMs+7*86400000;
}
function scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync(mode){
  if(mode==='full')_swReminderPendingMode='full';
  else if(_swReminderPendingMode!=='full')_swReminderPendingMode='edit';
  if(_swReminderSyncTimer)clearTimeout(_swReminderSyncTimer);
  _swReminderSyncTimer=setTimeout(function(){
    _swReminderSyncTimer=null;
    const m=_swReminderPendingMode;
    _swReminderPendingMode='edit';
    void syncReminderScheduleToSupabase(m);
  },350);
}
var _utcReminderResyncTimer=null;
function armUtc0010ReminderScheduleResync(){
  if(_utcReminderResyncTimer){clearTimeout(_utcReminderResyncTimer);_utcReminderResyncTimer=null;}
  const now=Date.now();
  const u=new Date(now);
  let t=new Date(Date.UTC(u.getUTCFullYear(),u.getUTCMonth(),u.getUTCDate(),0,10,30,0));
  if(t.getTime()<=now)t=new Date(t.getTime()+86400000);
  const delay=Math.min(Math.max(t.getTime()-now,8000),2147483647);
  _utcReminderResyncTimer=setTimeout(function(){
    _utcReminderResyncTimer=null;
    if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync('full');
    armUtc0010ReminderScheduleResync();
  },delay);
}
function buildExactReminderScheduleRowsForSupabase(maxFireMsOpt, opts){
  opts=opts||{};
  const debugPreview=!!opts.debugPreview;
  const rows=[];
  const nowMs=appNowMs();
  const maxFireMs=typeof maxFireMsOpt==='number'&&isFinite(maxFireMsOpt)?maxFireMsOpt:(nowMs+7*86400000);
  const notify=debugPreview||!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.browserNotifyEnabled);
  const paused=debugPreview?false:!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.trackingPaused);
  const stopped=debugPreview?false:!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.trackingStopped);
  const kidWantsHabitTimes=debugPreview||(S&&S.user&&kidHabitSpecificRemindersWanted());
  const todayYmd=new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA').format(new Date(nowMs));
  function add(ymd,hm,tag,body){
    const t=new Date(ymd+'T'+hm+':00').getTime();
    if(!(t>nowMs&&t<=maxFireMs))return;
    rows.push({slot_key:tag+':'+ymd+':'+hm.replace(':',''),fire_at_utc:new Date(t).toISOString(),title:'Evolve',body:body||'',tag});
  }
  /* Per-habit clock times: today only. Pending rows are replaced on each sync; nightly-backup-roll
   * (~00:10 UTC) rebuilds from cloud state so tomorrow’s times appear when that day starts. */
  if(S&&S.user&&kidWantsHabitTimes&&notify&&!paused&&!stopped){
    const di=todayIsoWeekDayIndex();
    if(di>=0){
      trackerHabitsOrdered().forEach(function(h){
        if(!h||!h.active||h.archived||!h.remindersEnabled||!Array.isArray(h.reminderTimes)||!h.reminderTimes.length)return;
        if(!canScheduleHabitReminderOnDay(h,0,di))return;
        h.reminderTimes.forEach(function(hm){
          const fire=new Date(todayYmd+'T'+hm+':00').getTime();
          if(fire<=nowMs||fire>maxFireMs)return;
          const tag=habitReminderPushTag(h,hm);
          rows.push({slot_key:habitReminderSlotKey(h.id,hm,todayYmd),fire_at_utc:new Date(fire).toISOString(),title:'Evolve',body:notificationBodyForSavedHabit(h),tag});
        });
      });
    }
  }
  if(S&&S.user&&notify&&!paused&&!stopped){
    const hasHabits=trackerHabitsOrdered().length>0;
    let c=new Date(nowMs);c.setHours(0,0,0,0);
    const endCap=new Date(maxFireMs);
    while(c.getTime()<=endCap.getTime()){
      const ymd=isoDate(c);
      if(c.getDay()===0){
        add(ymd,'10:00','sun_m',"It's Sunday — your week locks at midnight. Make sure everything's logged.");
        add(ymd,'13:00','sun_mid','Midday Sunday — week locks at midnight. Anything still open?');
        add(ymd,'15:00','sun_a','A few hours left before your week locks. Any missing entries?');
        add(ymd,'18:00','sun_ev','Early evening — your week locks at midnight. Time to check the log.');
        add(ymd,'20:00','sun_e','Last chance — your week locks in a few hours.');
      }
      if(hasHabits){
        add(ymd,'09:15','habits_morning','Good morning!\nDon\'t forget to stay on track with your habits today!');
      }
      c.setDate(c.getDate()+1);
    }
    const wk=weekKey(0);
    const di=todayIsoWeekDayIndex();
    if(di>=0){
      const habits=trackerHabitsOrdered().filter(h=>canEditHabitDay(h,0,di));
      const cores=habits.filter(h=>habitEffectiveTier(h,wk)==='core');
      const growth=habits.filter(h=>habitEffectiveTier(h,wk)==='growth');
      const coreUn=cores.some(h=>!habitHasLogForDayIndex(h,wk,di));
      const growthUn=growth.some(h=>!habitHasLogForDayIndex(h,wk,di));
      if(coreUn||growthUn){
        add(todayYmd,'14:00','habits_day','Some habits are not logged yet today — open Evolve when you can.');
      }
    }
  }
  if(CONSISTENCY_TEMP_PUSH_TEST&&S&&S.user&&notify&&!paused&&!stopped){
    const hm=typeof CONSISTENCY_TEMP_PUSH_TEST_AT==='string'&&/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(CONSISTENCY_TEMP_PUSH_TEST_AT.trim())?CONSISTENCY_TEMP_PUSH_TEST_AT.trim():'00:01';
    let fireYmd=todayYmd;
    let fire=new Date(fireYmd+'T'+hm+':00').getTime();
    if(fire<=nowMs){
      const nd=new Date(nowMs);nd.setDate(nd.getDate()+1);
      fireYmd=new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA').format(nd);
      fire=new Date(fireYmd+'T'+hm+':00').getTime();
    }
    if(!(fire>nowMs&&fire<=maxFireMs))fire=Math.ceil((nowMs+120000)/60000)*60000;
    if(fire>nowMs&&fire<=maxFireMs){
      const tag='_tempPushTest';
      const ymdForKey=new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA').format(new Date(fire));
      const hmFlat=hm.replace(':','');
      rows.push({slot_key:tag+':'+ymdForKey+':'+hmFlat,fire_at_utc:new Date(fire).toISOString(),title:'Evolve',body:'Test push 00:01 — reminders working.',tag});
    }
  }
  const dayStart=new Date(nowMs);dayStart.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  const dayEnd=new Date(nowMs);dayEnd.setHours(23,59,59,999);
  return rows.filter(function(r){
    if(!reminderRowIsHabitClock(r))return true;
    const t=new Date(r.fire_at_utc).getTime();
    return t>=dayStart.getTime()&&t<=dayEnd.getTime();
  });
}
function urlBase64ToUint8Array(base64String){const pad='='.repeat((4-base64String.length%4)%4);const base64=(base64String+pad).replace(/-/g,'+').replace(/_/g,'/');const rawData=atob(base64);const outputArray=new Uint8Array(rawData.length);for(let i=0;i<rawData.length;++i)outputArray[i]=rawData.charCodeAt(i);return outputArray;}
function tryRegisterPeriodicBackgroundSync(){return Promise.resolve();}
async function ensureWebPushSubscription(uid){if(!uid||!_supa||!_authSession)return;if(!CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY||typeof CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY!=='string'||!CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY.trim())return;if(!('serviceWorker'in navigator)||Notification.permission!=='granted')return;const reg=await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;let sub=await reg.pushManager.getSubscription();if(!sub){try{sub=await reg.pushManager.subscribe({userVisibleOnly:true,applicationServerKey:urlBase64ToUint8Array(CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY.trim())});}catch(e){console.warn('[push] subscribe failed',e);return;}}const j=sub.toJSON();if(!j.keys||!j.endpoint)return;const ins=await _supa.from('push_subscriptions').upsert({user_id:uid,endpoint:j.endpoint,p256dh:j.keys.p256dh,auth:j.keys.auth},{onConflict:'user_id,endpoint'});if(ins.error)console.warn('[push] upsert subscription',ins.error);}

async function removeThisDevicePushSubscription(uid){if(!uid||!_supa||!_authSession)return;if(!('serviceWorker'in navigator))return;try{const reg=await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;const sub=await reg.pushManager.getSubscription();if(!sub)return;const ep=sub.endpoint;if(ep){try{await _supa.from('push_subscriptions').delete().eq('user_id',uid).eq('endpoint',ep);}catch(e){console.warn('[push] delete local subscription row',e);}}try{await sub.unsubscribe();}catch(e){}}catch(e){console.warn('[push] remove local subscription',e);}}
async function syncReminderScheduleToSupabase(mode){mode=mode||'edit';if(!_supa)return;const u=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;if(!u||!u.id)return;const notify=!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.browserNotifyEnabled);const paused=!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.trackingPaused);const stopped=!!(S&&S.user&&S.user.trackingStopped);const ok=Notification.permission==='granted'&&!!_authSession;if(paused||stopped){await clearAllPushStateForUser(u.id);return;}if(!notify||!ok){await removeThisDevicePushSubscription(u.id);return;}const vapidOk=typeof CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY==='string'&&CONSISTENCY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY.trim().length>0;if(!vapidOk){try{await _supa.from('reminder_schedule').delete().eq('user_id',u.id).is('sent_at',null);}catch(e){console.warn('[push] clear pending (no vapid)',e);}return;}try{await _supa.from('reminder_schedule').delete().eq('user_id',u.id).is('sent_at',null);}catch(e){console.warn('[push] delete pending',e);}await ensureWebPushSubscription(u.id);const rows=buildExactReminderScheduleRowsForSupabase(reminderSyncMaxFireMs(mode));if(!rows.length)return;const withUser=rows.map(r=>Object.assign({user_id:u.id},r));const seen=new Set();const deduped=withUser.filter(function(r){const k=String(r.slot_key||'')+'\0'+String(r.fire_at_utc||'');if(seen.has(k))return false;seen.add(k);return true;});const ins=await _supa.from('reminder_schedule').upsert(deduped,{onConflict:'user_id,slot_key,fire_at_utc',ignoreDuplicates:true});if(ins.error)console.warn('[push] insert schedule',ins.error);try{const dayStart=new Date();dayStart.setHours(0,0,0,0);const dayEnd=new Date();dayEnd.setHours(23,59,59,999);const stale=await _supa.from('reminder_schedule').select('id,fire_at_utc').eq('user_id',u.id).is('sent_at',null).like('slot_key','hrd:%');if(!stale.error&&stale.data&&stale.data.length){const drop=stale.data.filter(function(r){const t=new Date(r.fire_at_utc).getTime();return t<dayStart.getTime()||t>dayEnd.getTime();}).map(function(r){return r.id;});if(drop.length)await _supa.from('reminder_schedule').delete().in('id',drop);}}catch(e){console.warn('[push] prune stale habit rows',e);}}
refreshAppClockSkew().then(()=>renderAll());
setInterval(()=>{refreshAppClockSkew().then(()=>{if(document.getElementById('tab-tracker')?.classList.contains('active'))renderTracker();});},900000);
try{document.addEventListener('visibilitychange',function(){if(document.visibilityState==='visible'){if(typeof scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync==='function')scheduleServiceWorkerReminderSync('edit');if(typeof maybeRepromptAfterPermissionRevoked==='function')setTimeout(maybeRepromptAfterPermissionRevoked,600);}},{passive:true});}catch(e){}
try{armUtc0010ReminderScheduleResync();}catch(e){}

/* ===========================
 * Phase C: Cloud auth (Supabase) — behaviour (client + _authSession live above load()/setupScreen()).
 * Auth UI only — no data sync yet (Phase D adds that).
 * =========================== */
function authReady(){return !!_supa;}
function authGateSessionPresent(){return !!(_authSession&&_authSession.user)||!!(_offlineShadowUser&&_offlineShadowUser.id);}
function authCurrentUser(){if(_authSession&&_authSession.user)return _authSession.user;if(_offlineShadowUser&&_offlineShadowUser.id)return _offlineShadowUser;return null;}
function titleCaseWord(s){if(!s)return '';return s.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+s.slice(1).toLowerCase();}
function looksLikePersonalNameToken(s){if(!s)return false;const t=String(s).trim();if(t.length<2||t.length>24)return false;if(/\d/.test(t))return false;if(!/^[a-zA-Z\u00C0-\u024F\u1E00-\u1EFF'-]+$/.test(t))return false;const block=new Set(['mail','user','users','test','admin','info','noreply','no-reply','support','help','hello','contact','sales','team','office']);if(block.has(t.toLowerCase()))return false;return true;}
function authExtractFirstNameCandidate(u){if(!u)return{first:'',confident:false};const meta=u.user_metadata||{};const g0=String(meta.given_name||'').trim();if(g0&&looksLikePersonalNameToken(g0))return{first:titleCaseWord(g0),confident:true};const full=(meta.full_name||meta.name||'').trim();if(full){const first=(full.split(/\s+/)[0]||'').replace(/^[^a-zA-Z\u00C0-\u024F\u1E00-\u1EFF]+/,'');if(looksLikePersonalNameToken(first))return{first:titleCaseWord(first),confident:true};}if(u.email){const local=String(u.email).split('@')[0]||'';const seg=(local.split(/[._\-+]/)[0]||'').replace(/^\d+/,'');if(looksLikePersonalNameToken(seg))return{first:titleCaseWord(seg),confident:true};}return{first:'',confident:false};}
function authSuggestedName(){const u=authCurrentUser();if(!u)return '';const cand=authExtractFirstNameCandidate(u);if(cand.first)return cand.first;const meta=u.user_metadata||{};let name=(meta.full_name||meta.name||'').trim();if(!name&&(meta.given_name||meta.family_name)){name=((meta.given_name||'')+' '+(meta.family_name||'')).trim();}if(name)return name;if(u.email){const local=String(u.email).split('@')[0]||'';return local.split(/[._\-]+/).filter(Boolean).map(s=>titleCaseWord(s)).join(' ').trim();}return '';}
function applyAuthFirstNameToProfileIfNeeded(){if(!S||!S.user||S.user.setupDone)return;const u=authCurrentUser();if(!u)return;const{first,confident}=authExtractFirstNameCandidate(u);if(!confident||!first)return;if((S.user.name||'').trim())return;S.user.name=first;syncActiveProfileMetaNameFromDisplayName();save();const sn=document.getElementById('setupName');if(sn)sn.value=first;}
function syncSetupNameRowVisibility(){const col=document.getElementById('setupNameFieldCol');const autoLine=document.getElementById('setupNameAutoLine');const autoStr=document.getElementById('setupNameAutoStrong');if(!col)return;if(S&&S.user&&S.user.setupDone){col.style.display='';if(autoLine)autoLine.style.display='none';return;}const u=authCurrentUser();if(!u){col.style.display='';if(autoLine)autoLine.style.display='none';return;}const{first,confident}=authExtractFirstNameCandidate(u);const cur=(S.user&&S.user.name||'').trim();const hide=!!(confident&&first&&cur===first);col.style.display=hide?'none':'';if(autoLine&&autoStr){if(hide){autoStr.textContent=first;autoLine.style.display='block';}else{autoLine.style.display='none';}}}
function authUrlHasPendingCallback(){try{const u=window.location.href;if(/[?&#]code=/.test(u))return true;if(/[?&#]error_description=/.test(u)||/[?&]error=/.test(u))return true;if(/#.*access_token=/.test(u))return true;}catch(_){}return false;}
function authApplyOfflineShadowIfNeeded(){
  if(typeof navigator!=='undefined'&&navigator.onLine!==false)return false;
  if(_authSession)return false;
  if(authUrlHasPendingCallback())return false;
  const t=authDeviceTrustRead();
  if(!t||!t.uid)return false;
  _offlineShadowUser={id:t.uid,email:t.email||'',user_metadata:t.meta||{}};
  return true;
}
function bindAppConnectivityListeners(){
  if(window._consistencyConnectivityBound)return;
  window._consistencyConnectivityBound=true;
  const onOn=()=>{if(typeof authRefresh==='function')void authRefresh().then(()=>{syncAuthGate();syncAccountUI();renderHeader();syncCloudSyncPanelUI();void syncCloudHistoryPanel();});};
  const onOff=()=>{void authApplyOfflineShadowIfNeeded();syncAuthGate();syncAccountUI();renderHeader();syncCloudSyncPanelUI();};
  window.addEventListener('online',onOn,{passive:true});
  window.addEventListener('offline',onOff,{passive:true});
}
function authPeekImplicitHash(){try{return /#(?:.*&)?access_token=/.test(String(window.location.hash||''))||/#.*access_token=/.test(String(window.location.href||''));}catch(_){return false;}}
/** Some mobile mail apps (Gmail in-app browser, etc.) deliver #access_token after first paint or on a second navigation; listen so we still pick up the session. */
function authBindDeferredHashSessionRecovery(){
  if(!_supa||window.__consistencyAuthHashBound)return;
  window.__consistencyAuthHashBound=true;
  const kick=async function(){
    if(!authPeekImplicitHash())return;
    await authRefresh();
    authFinalizeAuthUrl();
    syncAccountUI();
    syncAuthGate();
    await cloudSyncAfterAuthBootstrap();
    prefillNameFromAuth();
    syncSetupNameRowVisibility();
  };
  window.addEventListener('hashchange',function(){void kick();},{passive:true});
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange',function(){if(document.visibilityState==='visible')void kick();},{passive:true});
  window.addEventListener('pageshow',function(ev){if(ev.persisted)void kick();},{passive:true});
}
/** Remove OAuth/magic-link fragments from the address bar once a session exists. If there is still an access_token in the hash but no session yet, do nothing — stripping here raced ahead of GoTrue and broke sign-in. */
function authFinalizeAuthUrl(){try{const u=new URL(window.location.href);const hasImplicitHash=u.hash&&u.hash.includes('access_token');if(_authSession){if(u.hash)u.hash='';u.searchParams.delete('code');u.searchParams.delete('state');const qs=u.searchParams.toString();window.history.replaceState({},document.title,u.pathname+(qs?'?'+qs:'')+u.hash);return;}if(hasImplicitHash)return;u.searchParams.delete('code');u.searchParams.delete('state');const qs=u.searchParams.toString();window.history.replaceState({},document.title,u.pathname+(qs?'?'+qs:'')+u.hash);}catch(_){}}
async function authBootstrapSession(){
  bindAppConnectivityListeners();
  authBindDeferredHashSessionRecovery();
  authSubscribe();
  authHandleRedirectFromUrl();
  await authRefresh();
  if(!authGateSessionPresent())authApplyOfflineShadowIfNeeded();
  const delays=[50,120,280,450,900];
  for(let i=0;i<delays.length&&!_authSession&&authPeekImplicitHash();i++){
    await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,delays[i]));
    await authRefresh();
  }
  if(!authGateSessionPresent())authApplyOfflineShadowIfNeeded();
  authFinalizeAuthUrl();
  syncAccountUI();
  syncAuthGate();
  await cloudSyncAfterAuthBootstrap();
  prefillNameFromAuth();
  syncSetupNameRowVisibility();
  renderHeader();
  setTimeout(function(){maybeScheduleNotifyPromptFromAuthSession();maybeRepromptAfterPermissionRevoked();},900);
}
async function authHandleRedirectFromUrl(){
  /* Session-from-URL is handled inside the first getSession() via GoTrueClient._initialize(). Do not call exchangeCodeForSession here — it duplicated PKCE exchange and broke Google sign-in (had to "sign in twice"). */
  if(!_supa)return;try{const url=new URL(window.location.href);const errDesc=url.searchParams.get('error_description')||url.searchParams.get('error');if(errDesc)console.warn('[auth] redirect error:',errDesc);}catch(e){console.warn('[auth] authHandleRedirectFromUrl:',e);}
}
function authSetBusy(busy){_authBusy=!!busy;['authGoogleBtn','authMagicBtn','authGateGoogleBtn','authGateMagicBtn'].forEach(function(id){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.disabled=_authBusy;});}
function authSendMagicLinkFromGate(){const el=document.getElementById('authGateEmail');if(!el)return;authSendMagicLink(el.value,{onSent:showAuthGateSent});}
function showAuthGateSent(email){const a=document.getElementById('authGateViewSignIn');const b=document.getElementById('authGateViewSent');const lbl=document.getElementById('authGateSentEmail');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=email||'';if(a)a.hidden=true;if(b)b.hidden=false;}
function authGateBackToSignIn(){const a=document.getElementById('authGateViewSignIn');const b=document.getElementById('authGateViewSent');if(b)b.hidden=true;if(a)a.hidden=false;const el=document.getElementById('authGateEmail');if(el){try{el.focus();el.select();}catch(_){}}}
function authSplashBlocksGate(){const sp=document.getElementById('authSplash');return !!(sp&&sp.classList.contains('is-visible')&&!sp.classList.contains('is-fading'));}
function authClearLaunchSplashTimers(){if(typeof window==='undefined')return;if(window.__authGateRevealTimer){try{clearTimeout(window.__authGateRevealTimer);}catch(_){}window.__authGateRevealTimer=null;}if(window.__authSplashFadeTimer){try{clearTimeout(window.__authSplashFadeTimer);}catch(_){}window.__authSplashFadeTimer=null;}}
function authDismissLaunchSplashNow(){authClearLaunchSplashTimers();const splash=document.getElementById('authSplash');if(splash){splash.classList.remove('is-visible');splash.classList.remove('is-fading');splash.style.pointerEvents='';}document.documentElement.classList.remove('evolve-auth-intro');}
function syncAuthGate(){const gate=document.getElementById('authGate');if(!gate)return;if(authGateSessionPresent()){gate.classList.remove('is-visible');authGateBackToSignIn();if(authSplashBlocksGate())return;authDismissLaunchSplashNow();scheduleHeaderBrandMarkTheme();}else{resetHeaderBrandMarkTheme();if(authUrlHasPendingCallback())return;if(authSplashBlocksGate()){gate.classList.remove('is-visible');return;}gate.classList.add('is-visible');}}
async function authRefresh(){if(!_supa)return null;try{const r=await _supa.auth.getSession();_authSession=(r&&r.data)?r.data.session:null;}catch(e){_authSession=null;} if(_authSession){_offlineShadowUser=null;authDeviceTrustWrite(_authSession);return _authSession;} if(authApplyOfflineShadowIfNeeded())return null;return null;}
function persistAuthDisplayNameFromAccountIfEmpty(){if(!S||!S.user||!S.user.setupDone)return;const u=authCurrentUser();if(!u)return;if((S.user.name||'').trim())return;const s=authSuggestedName();if(!s)return;S.user.name=s;syncActiveProfileMetaNameFromDisplayName();save();const su=document.getElementById('sUserName');if(su)su.value=s;if(typeof renderHeader==='function')renderHeader();}
function prefillNameFromAuth(){try{applyAuthFirstNameToProfileIfNeeded();persistAuthDisplayNameFromAccountIfEmpty();syncSetupNameRowVisibility();const suggested=authSuggestedName();if(!suggested)return;const sn=document.getElementById('setupName');if(sn&&!sn.value)sn.value=suggested;const su=document.getElementById('sUserName');if(su&&!su.value)su.value=suggested;}catch(_){}}
function authSubscribe(){if(!_supa)return;try{_supa.auth.onAuthStateChange((event,session)=>{_authSession=session||null;if(_authSession){_offlineShadowUser=null;authDeviceTrustWrite(_authSession);}else if(typeof navigator!=='undefined'&&navigator.onLine===false){authApplyOfflineShadowIfNeeded();}else{_offlineShadowUser=null;}if(_authSession&&(event==='SIGNED_IN'||event==='INITIAL_SESSION'))authFinalizeAuthUrl();syncAccountUI();try{syncPwaAddToHomeBar();}catch(_){}if(event==='SIGNED_IN'||event==='INITIAL_SESSION'||event==='TOKEN_REFRESHED'||event==='USER_UPDATED'){if(event==='SIGNED_IN'){const m=document.getElementById('mAuthLogin');if(m&&m.classList.contains('show'))closeM('mAuthLogin');}if(event==='INITIAL_SESSION')return;if(event==='SIGNED_IN'||event==='USER_UPDATED'){void (async()=>{if(event==='SIGNED_IN')await cloudSyncAfterAuthBootstrap();prefillNameFromAuth();syncSetupNameRowVisibility();renderHeader();if(event==='SIGNED_IN')setTimeout(function(){maybeScheduleNotifyPromptFromAuthSession();maybeRepromptAfterPermissionRevoked();},900);})();return;}prefillNameFromAuth();syncSetupNameRowVisibility();renderHeader();}});}catch(e){}}
function authRedirectURL(){return window.location.origin+window.location.pathname;}
async function authSignInWithGoogle(){if(!_supa){alert('Auth not ready — try refreshing.');return;}authSetBusy(true);try{const r=await _supa.auth.signInWithOAuth({provider:'google',options:{redirectTo:authRedirectURL()}});if(r&&r.error)throw r.error;}catch(e){authSetBusy(false);alert('Google sign-in failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e));}}
function authFormatMagicLinkError(err){const msg=String(err&&err.message?err.message:err||'');const low=msg.toLowerCase();if(low.includes('rate limit')||low.includes('too many')){return'Too many sign-in emails were sent recently (Supabase limits how many magic links go out per hour on your plan).\n\nWhat you can do:\n• Wait an hour and try again, or use “Continue with Google” now.\n• If you are testing a lot, open your Supabase dashboard → Authentication → Rate Limits, or add custom SMTP (often higher throughput).\n\nMore detail: https://supabase.com/docs/guides/auth/rate-limits';}return msg||'Something went wrong.';}
async function authSendMagicLink(email,opts){opts=opts||{};if(!_supa){alert('Auth not ready — try refreshing.');return;}email=(email||'').trim();if(!email||!email.includes('@')){alert('Enter a valid email.');return;}authSetBusy(true);try{const r=await _supa.auth.signInWithOtp({email,options:{emailRedirectTo:authRedirectURL()}});if(r&&r.error)throw r.error;if(typeof opts.onSent==='function'){opts.onSent(email);}else{alert('Magic link sent to '+email+'. Open it on this device to sign in.');}}catch(e){alert('Magic link failed:\n\n'+authFormatMagicLinkError(e));}finally{authSetBusy(false);}}
function authSendMagicLinkFromUI(){const el=document.getElementById('authEmailInput');if(!el)return;authSendMagicLink(el.value,{onSent:showAuthModalSent});}
function showAuthModalSent(email){const a=document.getElementById('authModalViewSignIn');const b=document.getElementById('authModalViewSent');const lbl=document.getElementById('authModalSentEmail');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=email||'';if(a)a.hidden=true;if(b)b.hidden=false;}
function authModalBackToSignIn(){const a=document.getElementById('authModalViewSignIn');const b=document.getElementById('authModalViewSent');if(b)b.hidden=true;if(a)a.hidden=false;const el=document.getElementById('authEmailInput');if(el){try{el.focus();el.select();}catch(_){}}}
async function authSignOut(){if(!_supa)return;authSetBusy(true);try{const u0=typeof authCurrentUser==='function'?authCurrentUser():null;const uid=u0&&u0.id?u0.id:null;clearTimeout(_cloudPushTimer);_cloudPushTimer=null;_cloudSyncLastError=null;await cleanupWebPushOnSignOut(uid);authDeviceTrustClear();try{await _supa.auth.signOut();}catch(_){}_authSession=null;}catch(e){}finally{authSetBusy(false);resetHeaderBrandMarkTheme();syncAccountUI();renderHeader();}}
function openAuthLoginModal(){closeM('mSettings');setTimeout(()=>{openM('mAuthLogin');const a=document.getElementById('authModalViewSignIn');const b=document.getElementById('authModalViewSent');if(b)b.hidden=true;if(a)a.hidden=false;const el=document.getElementById('authEmailInput');if(el)el.value='';authSetBusy(false);},120);}
function syncAccountUI(){const anon=document.getElementById('accountAnonView');const signed=document.getElementById('accountSignedInView');const lbl=document.getElementById('accountEmailLabel');const u=authCurrentUser();if(anon&&signed){if(u){anon.hidden=true;signed.hidden=false;if(lbl)lbl.textContent=u.email||'(signed in)';}else{anon.hidden=false;signed.hidden=true;}}syncAuthGate();syncCloudSyncPanelUI();syncAccountPlanUI();syncReminderDebugSettingsUI();syncSettingsPanelsKidCopy();void syncCloudHistoryPanel();syncReminderDebugTabVisibility();}
function confirmDeleteCloudAccount(){if(!authCurrentUser()){alert('You are not signed in.');return;}if(!confirm('This will delete your cloud row and sign you out. Local data on this device stays intact. Continue?'))return;deleteCloudAccount();}
async function deleteCloudAccount(){if(!_supa)return;const kid=typeof useKidsLanguage==='function'&&useKidsLanguage();if(authCurrentUser()&&!_authSession){alert(kid?'You need the internet to delete cloud data. Ask a grown-up to connect.':'Connect to the internet to delete cloud data, then try again.');return;}authSetBusy(true);try{const u=authCurrentUser();if(u&&_authSession){await cleanupWebPushOnSignOut(u.id);const del=await _supa.from('user_state').delete().eq('user_id',u.id);if(del&&del.error)throw del.error;}try{await _supa.auth.signOut();}catch(_){}_authSession=null;authDeviceTrustClear();syncAccountUI();renderHeader();alert('Cloud data deleted. You are now signed out. Local data on this device is untouched.');}catch(e){alert('Delete failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e));}finally{authSetBusy(false);}}
if(authReady()){void authBootstrapSession();}else{console.warn('[auth] Supabase SDK did not load — sign-in is unavailable. Gate stays visible until the SDK loads or the page is refreshed.');syncAuthGate();}
